      setNodes([])
      setEdges([])
      setNodeIdCounter(1)
      console.log('✅ FlowWorkspace cleared via event')
    }

    window.addEventListener('clearFlowWorkspace', handleClearFlowWorkspace)
    
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('clearFlowWorkspace', handleClearFlowWorkspace)
    }
  }, [setNodes, setEdges])

  // Note: useDrop moved to WorkbenchContent to avoid duplicate DnD configuration

  // Handle new connections between nodes
  const onConnect = useCallback(
    (params: Connection) => {
      console.log('🔗 Creating connection:', params)
      setEdges((eds) => addEdge({
        ...params,
        type: 'smoothstep',
        animated: true,
        style: { stroke: '#3182ce', strokeWidth: 2 }
      }, eds))
    },
    [setEdges]
  )

  // Add a new application node with enhanced data handling
  const addApplicationNode = useCallback((applicationData?: any, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    const newNodeId = `app-${nodeIdCounter}`
    setNodeIdCounter(prev => prev + 1)

    // Use provided position or generate random position
    const nodePosition = position || { x: Math.random() * 300 + 100, y: Math.random() * 200 + 100 }
    const diskChildren = applicationData?.children?.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === 'disk') || []

    const newNode: Node = {
      id: newNodeId,
      type: 'application',
      position: nodePosition,
      data: {
        id: newNodeId,
        applicationId: applicationData?.id, // 添加applicationId字段，用于关联SPACES中的stickyNote
        name: applicationData?.name || `Application ${nodeIdCounter}`,
        description: applicationData?.description || 'New application node',
        area: applicationData?.area,
        category: applicationData?.category,
        owner: applicationData?.owner,
        disks: diskChildren,
        isPinned: false,
        onRename: handleNodeRename,
        onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
        onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
      },
    }

    setNodes((nds) => nds.concat(newNode))

    // Note: 不再在FlowWorkspace中创建stickyNote
    // SPACES区域应该只显示传统画布模式的画布，流程图模式的节点不需要在SPACES中显示
    console.log('🎯 Created flow application node:', {
      nodeId: newNodeId,
      applicationName: applicationData?.name,
      position: nodePosition
    })

    // Debug: Log the complete application data structure
    console.log('🔍 Complete application data structure:', {
      applicationData,
      hasChildren: !!applicationData?.children,
      childrenCount: applicationData?.children?.length || 0,
      children: applicationData?.children,
      childrenTypes: applicationData?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
        id: child.id,
        name: child.name,
        node_type: child.node_type,
        hasChildren: !!child.children,
        childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0
      })) || [],
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    })

    // Auto-create disk nodes if application has disks
    if (applicationData?.children && applicationData.children.length > 0) {
      const disks = diskChildren
      console.log(`🔍 Found ${disks.length} disks for application ${applicationData.name}:`, disks)
      
      if (disks.length > 0) {
        disks.forEach((disk: any, index: number) => {
          console.log(`💾 Creating disk node ${index + 1}/${disks.length}:`, {
            diskId: disk.id,
            diskName: disk.name,
            diskType: disk.node_type,
            diskData: disk,
            applicationNodeId: newNodeId,
            index
          })
          
          // Position disk nodes to the right and below the application node
          const diskPosition = {
            x: nodePosition.x + 400 + (index % 2) * 200, // Stagger horizontally
            y: nodePosition.y + 150 + Math.floor(index / 2) * 200 // Stack vertically every 2 disks
          }
          console.log(`📍 Disk position calculated:`, diskPosition)
          addDiskNode(disk, newNodeId, index, diskPosition)
        })
      } else {
        console.log('⚠️ No disk nodes found in children array')
        console.log('🔍 All children types:', applicationData.children.map((child: any) => ({
          id: child.id,
          name: child.name,
          node_type: child.node_type
        })))
      }
    } else {
      console.log('⚠️ No children found in application data or children array is empty')
      console.log('🔍 Application data keys:', Object.keys(applicationData || {}))
    }

    toast({
      title: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreated"),
      description: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreatedDesc", {
        name: applicationData?.name || newNode.data.name,
        count: diskChildren.length
      }),
      status: "success",
      duration: 3000,
    })

    return newNodeId
  }, [handleNodeDelete, handleNodeRename, handleNodeTogglePin, nodeIdCounter, t, toast])

  // Add a new disk node with enhanced data handling
  const addDiskNode = useCallback((diskData: any, parentNodeId?: string, index: number = 0, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    const newNodeId = `disk-${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`
    
    console.log(`💾 addDiskNode called with:`, {
      diskData,
      parentNodeId,
      index,
      position,
      newNodeId,
      nodeIdCounter
    })
    
    // Use provided position or generate default position
    const nodePosition = position || { 
      x: Math.random() * 300 + 400, 
      y: Math.random() * 200 + 200 + (index * 150)
    }
    
    const newNode: Node = {
      id: newNodeId,
      type: 'disk',
      position: nodePosition,
      data: {
        id: newNodeId,
        diskId: diskData?.id || Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000),
        name: diskData?.name || `Disk ${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`,
        description: diskData?.description || 'New disk node',
        applicationId: diskData?.applicationId || (parentNodeId ? parseInt(parentNodeId.replace('app-', '')) : undefined),
        isPinned: false,
        onRename: handleNodeRename,
        onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
        onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
        onExpand: handleNodeExpand,
      },
    }

    console.log(`💾 Creating disk node with data:`, {
      newNodeId,
      nodeType: 'disk',
      nodePosition,
      nodeData: newNode.data,
      diskId: diskData?.id,
      diskName: diskData?.name
    })
    
    setNodes((nds) => {
      const newNodes = nds.concat(newNode)
      console.log(`💾 Total nodes after adding disk: ${newNodes.length}`)
      return newNodes
    })

    // Auto-connect to parent application node
    if (parentNodeId) {
      const newEdge: Edge = {
        id: `${parentNodeId}-${newNodeId}`,
        source: parentNodeId,
        target: newNodeId,
        sourceHandle: 'disks',
        targetHandle: 'input',
        type: 'smoothstep',
        animated: true,
        style: { stroke: '#10b981', strokeWidth: 2 },
        label: t("workbench.mountDisk")
      }
      console.log(`🔗 Creating edge:`, newEdge)
      setEdges((eds) => {
        const newEdges = eds.concat(newEdge)
        console.log(`🔗 Total edges after adding: ${newEdges.length}`)
        return newEdges
      })
    } else {
      console.log(`⚠️ No parentNodeId provided for disk node ${newNodeId}`)
    }

    console.log(`✅ Successfully created disk node: ${newNode.data.name} (ID: ${diskData?.id})`)
  }, [handleNodeDelete, handleNodeExpand, handleNodeRename, handleNodeTogglePin, nodeIdCounter, setEdges, setNodes, t])

  // Handle node rename
  const handleNodeRename = useCallback((nodeId: string, newName: string) => {
    setNodes((nds) =>
      nds.map((node) =>
        node.id === nodeId
          ? { ...node, data: { ...node.data, name: newName } }
          : node
      )
    )
    
    // 如果是应用节点，同步更新SPACES中的对应画布名称
    const node = nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    if (node && node.type === 'application') {
      const applicationId = (node.data as any).applicationId
      if (applicationId) {
        // 找到对应的stickyNote并更新名称
        const correspondingNote = stickyNotes.find(note => 
          note.metadata?.applicationId === applicationId
        )
        if (correspondingNote) {
          console.log('🔄 Syncing application rename to SPACES:', {
            applicationId,
            newName,
            noteId: correspondingNote.id
          })
          renameNote(correspondingNote.id, newName)
        }
      }
    }
    
    console.log('🔄 Renamed flow node:', { nodeId, newName })
    
    toast({
      title: t("workbench.nodeRenamedTitle"),
      description: t("workbench.nodeRenamedDesc", { name: newName }),
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [nodes, renameNote, stickyNotes, t, toast])

  // Handle node delete
  const handleNodeDelete = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    console.log('🔄 Deleting flow node:', { nodeId })
    
    // 如果是应用节点，同步删除SPACES中的对应画布
    const node = nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    if (node && node.type === 'application') {
      const applicationId = (node.data as any).applicationId
      if (applicationId) {
        // 找到对应的stickyNote并删除
        const correspondingNote = stickyNotes.find(note => 
          note.metadata?.applicationId === applicationId
        )
        if (correspondingNote) {
          console.log('🔄 Syncing application delete to SPACES:', {
            applicationId,
            noteId: correspondingNote.id
          })
          deleteNote(correspondingNote.id)
        }
      }
    }
    
    setNodes((nds) => nds.filter((node) => node.id !== nodeId))
    setEdges((eds) => eds.filter((edge) => edge.source !== nodeId && edge.target !== nodeId))
    toast({
      title: t("workbench.nodeDeletedTitle"),
      description: t("workbench.nodeDeletedDesc"),
      status: "info",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [deleteNote, nodes, stickyNotes, t, toast])

  // Handle node pin toggle
  const handleNodeTogglePin = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    setNodes((nds) =>
      nds.map((node) =>
        node.id === nodeId
          ? { 
              ...node, 
              data: { ...node.data, isPinned: !(node.data as any).isPinned },
              draggable: (node.data as any).isPinned // Toggle draggable based on pin state
            }
          : node
      )
    )
  }, [])

  // Handle node expand - open disk properties panel
  const handleNodeExpand = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    console.log('🔍 Expanding node:', nodeId)
    console.log('🔍 Available nodes (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current.map(n => ({ id: n.id, type: n.type })))
    console.log('🔍 Nodes length (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current.length)
    console.log('🔍 Nodes details (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current)
    console.log('🔍 Looking for nodeId:', nodeId)
    
    // Find the node to check if it's a disk node using nodesRef.current
    const node = nodesRef.current.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    console.log('🔍 Found node:', node)
    console.log('🔍 Node type:', node?.type)
    console.log('🔍 Node data:', node?.data)
    
    if (node && node.type === 'disk') {
      const diskData = node.data as any
      console.log('💾 Opening disk properties panel for:', diskData)
      console.log('💾 Setting panel state:', {
        selectedDiskId: diskData.diskId,
        selectedDiskName: diskData.name,
        isDiskPanelOpen: true
      })
      
      setSelectedDiskId(diskData.diskId)
      setSelectedDiskName(diskData.name)
      setIsDiskPanelOpen(true)
      
      toast({
        title: t("workbench.diskPanelOpenedTitle"),
        description: t("workbench.diskPanelOpenedDesc", { name: diskData.name }),
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    } else {
      console.warn('⚠️ Node not found or not a disk node:', { nodeId, node, nodeType: node?.type })
    }
  }, [t, toast])

  // Clear all nodes and edges
  const clearCanvas = useCallback(() => {
    if (window.confirm(t("workbench.confirmClearWorkflow"))) {
      setNodes([])
      setEdges([])
      toast({
        title: t("workbench.workflowClearedTitle"),
        description: t("workbench.workflowClearedDesc"),
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    }
  }, [setEdges, setNodes, t, toast])

  // Handle application drop from sidebar
  const handleApplicationDropInternal = useCallback(async (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    console.log('📱 Application dropped on flow workspace:', application, position)
    
    try {
      // 获取完整的application信息，包括children (disks)
      const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)
      console.log("🔍 Complete application data structure:", {
        applicationData: completeApp,
        hasChildren: !!completeApp?.children,
        childrenCount: completeApp?.children?.length || 0,
        children: completeApp?.children,
        childrenTypes: completeApp?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
          id: child.id,
          name: child.name,
          node_type: child.node_type,
          hasChildren: !!child.children,
          childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0
        })) || [],
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      
      // 检查是否有children
      if (!completeApp?.children || completeApp.children.length === 0) {
        console.log("⚠️ No children found for application:", completeApp.name)
        toast({
          title: "No Disks Found",
          description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no associated disks`,
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }
      
      // 过滤出disk类型的children
      const disks = completeApp.children.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === "disk")
      console.log("💾 Filtered disks:", {
        totalDisks: disks.length,
        disks: disks.map((disk: any) => ({
          id: disk.id,
          name: disk.name,
          node_type: disk.node_type
        }))
      })
      
      if (disks.length === 0) {
        console.log("⚠️ No disk children found for application:", completeApp.name)
        toast({
          title: "No Disks Found",
          description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no disk children`,
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }
      
      // Create application node with proper position
      addApplicationNode(completeApp, position)
      
      // Notify parent component
      onApplicationDrop?.(completeApp, position)
      
      toast({
        title: "应用已添加到流程图",
        description: `${completeApp.name} 及其关联磁盘已成功添加到画布`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("❌ Failed to handle application drop:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to add application to flow",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [addApplicationNode, onApplicationDrop, toast])

  // 使用传入的handleApplicationDrop函数
  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (handleApplicationDrop) {
      console.log("🔗 FlowWorkspace received handleApplicationDrop function")
    }
  }, [handleApplicationDrop])

  // 暴露handleApplicationDropInternal函数给父组件
  React.useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
    handleApplicationDrop: handleApplicationDropInternal
  }), [handleApplicationDropInternal])

  // Memoize the flow component for performance
  const flowComponent = useMemo(() => (
    <div
      style={{
        width: '100%',
        height: '100%',
        transition: 'all 0.2s ease'
      }}
    >
      <ReactFlow
        nodes={nodes}
        edges={edges}
        onNodesChange={onNodesChange}
        onEdgesChange={onEdgesChange}
        onConnect={onConnect}
        nodeTypes={nodeTypes}
        connectionMode={ConnectionMode.Loose}
        fitView
        fitViewOptions={{ padding: 0.2 }}
        defaultViewport={{ x: 0, y: 0, zoom: 0.8 }}
        minZoom={0.2}
        maxZoom={2}
        snapToGrid={true}
        snapGrid={[15, 15]}
        onPaneClick={() => {
          // 点击空白区域时关闭磁盘属性面板
          if (isDiskPanelOpen) {
            setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
            setSelectedDiskId(null)
            setSelectedDiskName('')
          }
        }}
      >
      <Background variant={BackgroundVariant.Dots} gap={20} size={1} />
      <Controls />
      
      {/* Control Panel */}
      <Panel position="top-left">
        <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
          <HStack spacing={2}>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
              colorScheme="blue"
              onClick={() => addApplicationNode()}
            >
              {t("workbench.addApplication")}
            </Button>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
              colorScheme="green"
              onClick={() => addDiskNode({})}
            >
              {t("workbench.addDisk")}
            </Button>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiTrash2 />}
              variant="outline"
              colorScheme="red"
              onClick={clearCanvas}
            >
              {t("workbench.clearWorkflow")}
            </Button>
          </HStack>
        </Box>
      </Panel>

      {/* Info Panel */}
      <Panel position="top-right">
        <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
          <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">
            {t("workbench.nodeStats", { nodes: nodes.length, connections: edges.length })}
          </Text>
        </Box>
      </Panel>
    </ReactFlow>
    </div>
  ), [nodes, edges, onNodesChange, onEdgesChange, onConnect, addApplicationNode, addDiskNode, clearCanvas])

  return (
    <Box w="full" h="full" position="relative">
      {flowComponent}
      
      {/* Disk Properties Panel */}
      <DiskPropertiesPanel
        diskId={selectedDiskId || 0}
        diskName={selectedDiskName}
        isOpen={isDiskPanelOpen}
        onClose={() => {
          setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
          setSelectedDiskId(null)
          setSelectedDiskName('')
        }}
      />
    </Box>
  )
})

FlowWorkspace.displayName = 'FlowWorkspace'

export default FlowWorkspace

```

```typescriptreact
import React, { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
import {
  ReactFlow,
  Node,
  Edge,
  addEdge,
  Connection,
  useNodesState,
  useEdgesState,
  Controls,
  Background,
  BackgroundVariant,
  NodeTypes,
  ConnectionMode,
  Panel,
} from '@xyflow/react'
import '@xyflow/react/dist/style.css'
import { Box, Button, HStack, Text, useToast } from '@chakra-ui/react'
import { FiPlus, FiTrash2 } from 'react-icons/fi'
// import { useDrop } from 'react-dnd' // 已移动到WorkbenchContent，避免重复DnD配置
import ApplicationNode from './FlowNodes/ApplicationNode'
import DiskNode from './FlowNodes/DiskNode'
import DiskPropertiesPanel from './DiskPropertiesPanel'
import AppNodeService from '@/services/appNodeService'
import { useWorkbenchStore } from '@/stores/workbenchStore'
import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'

interface FlowWorkspaceProps {
  onApplicationDrop?: (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => void
  handleApplicationDrop?: (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => void
}

// Define node types
const nodeTypes: NodeTypes = {
  application: ApplicationNode,
  disk: DiskNode,
}

// Initial nodes and edges
const initialNodes: Node[] = []
const initialEdges: Edge[] = []

export const FlowWorkspace = React.forwardRef<any, FlowWorkspaceProps>(({
  onApplicationDrop,
  handleApplicationDrop
}, ref) => {
  const [nodes, setNodes, onNodesChange] = useNodesState(initialNodes)
  const [edges, setEdges, onEdgesChange] = useEdgesState(initialEdges)
  const [nodeIdCounter, setNodeIdCounter] = useState(1)
  const toast = useToast()
  const { t } = useTranslation()
  
  // 创建nodesRef来存储最新的nodes状态
  const nodesRef = React.useRef(nodes)
  
  // Disk properties panel state
  const [selectedDiskId, setSelectedDiskId] = useState<number | null>(null)
  const [selectedDiskName, setSelectedDiskName] = useState<string>('')
  const [isDiskPanelOpen, setIsDiskPanelOpen] = useState(false)
  
  // 添加调试日志来跟踪nodes状态
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodes count:', nodes.length)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodes:', nodes.map(n => ({ id: n.id, type: n.type })))
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodeIdCounter:', nodeIdCounter)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - selectedDiskId:', selectedDiskId)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - isDiskPanelOpen:', isDiskPanelOpen)
  
  // 获取workbench store的函数
  const { renameNote, deleteNote, stickyNotes } = useWorkbenchStore()

  // 更新nodesRef以保持最新的nodes状态
  React.useEffect(() => {
    nodesRef.current = nodes
    console.log('🔄 nodesRef updated:', nodes.length, 'nodes')
  }, [nodes])

  // 监听clearFlowWorkspace事件
  React.useEffect(() => {
    const handleClearFlowWorkspace = () => {
      console.log('📡 FlowWorkspace received clear event')
      setNodes([])
      setEdges([])
      setNodeIdCounter(1)
      console.log('✅ FlowWorkspace cleared via event')
    }

    window.addEventListener('clearFlowWorkspace', handleClearFlowWorkspace)
    
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('clearFlowWorkspace', handleClearFlowWorkspace)
    }
  }, [setNodes, setEdges])

  // Note: useDrop moved to WorkbenchContent to avoid duplicate DnD configuration

  // Handle new connections between nodes
  const onConnect = useCallback(
    (params: Connection) => {
      console.log('🔗 Creating connection:', params)
      setEdges((eds) => addEdge({
        ...params,
        type: 'smoothstep',
        animated: true,
        style: { stroke: '#3182ce', strokeWidth: 2 }
      }, eds))
    },
    [setEdges]
  )

  // Add a new application node with enhanced data handling
  const addApplicationNode = useCallback((applicationData?: any, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    const newNodeId = `app-${nodeIdCounter}`
    setNodeIdCounter(prev => prev + 1)

    // Use provided position or generate random position
    const nodePosition = position || { x: Math.random() * 300 + 100, y: Math.random() * 200 + 100 }
    const diskChildren = applicationData?.children?.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === 'disk') || []

    const newNode: Node = {
      id: newNodeId,
      type: 'application',
      position: nodePosition,
      data: {
        id: newNodeId,
        applicationId: applicationData?.id, // 添加applicationId字段，用于关联SPACES中的stickyNote
        name: applicationData?.name || `Application ${nodeIdCounter}`,
        description: applicationData?.description || 'New application node',
        area: applicationData?.area,
        category: applicationData?.category,
        owner: applicationData?.owner,
        disks: diskChildren,
        isPinned: false,
        onRename: handleNodeRename,
        onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
        onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
      },
    }

    setNodes((nds) => nds.concat(newNode))

    // Note: 不再在FlowWorkspace中创建stickyNote
    // SPACES区域应该只显示传统画布模式的画布，流程图模式的节点不需要在SPACES中显示
    console.log('🎯 Created flow application node:', {
      nodeId: newNodeId,
      applicationName: applicationData?.name,
      position: nodePosition
    })

    // Debug: Log the complete application data structure
    console.log('🔍 Complete application data structure:', {
      applicationData,
      hasChildren: !!applicationData?.children,
      childrenCount: applicationData?.children?.length || 0,
      children: applicationData?.children,
      childrenTypes: applicationData?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
        id: child.id,
        name: child.name,
        node_type: child.node_type,
        hasChildren: !!child.children,
        childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0
      })) || [],
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    })

    // Auto-create disk nodes if application has disks
    if (applicationData?.children && applicationData.children.length > 0) {
      const disks = diskChildren
      console.log(`🔍 Found ${disks.length} disks for application ${applicationData.name}:`, disks)
      
      if (disks.length > 0) {
        disks.forEach((disk: any, index: number) => {
          console.log(`💾 Creating disk node ${index + 1}/${disks.length}:`, {
            diskId: disk.id,
            diskName: disk.name,
            diskType: disk.node_type,
            diskData: disk,
            applicationNodeId: newNodeId,
            index
          })
          
          // Position disk nodes to the right and below the application node
          const diskPosition = {
            x: nodePosition.x + 400 + (index % 2) * 200, // Stagger horizontally
            y: nodePosition.y + 150 + Math.floor(index / 2) * 200 // Stack vertically every 2 disks
          }
          console.log(`📍 Disk position calculated:`, diskPosition)
          addDiskNode(disk, newNodeId, index, diskPosition)
        })
      } else {
        console.log('⚠️ No disk nodes found in children array')
        console.log('🔍 All children types:', applicationData.children.map((child: any) => ({
          id: child.id,
          name: child.name,
          node_type: child.node_type
        })))
      }
    } else {
      console.log('⚠️ No children found in application data or children array is empty')
      console.log('🔍 Application data keys:', Object.keys(applicationData || {}))
    }

    toast({
      title: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreated"),
      description: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreatedDesc", {
        name: applicationData?.name || newNode.data.name,
        count: diskChildren.length
      }),
      status: "success",
      duration: 3000,
    })

    return newNodeId
  }, [handleNodeDelete, handleNodeRename, handleNodeTogglePin, nodeIdCounter, t, toast])

  // Add a new disk node with enhanced data handling
  const addDiskNode = useCallback((diskData: any, parentNodeId?: string, index: number = 0, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    const newNodeId = `disk-${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`
    
    console.log(`💾 addDiskNode called with:`, {
      diskData,
      parentNodeId,
      index,
      position,
      newNodeId,
      nodeIdCounter
    })
    
    // Use provided position or generate default position
    const nodePosition = position || { 
      x: Math.random() * 300 + 400, 
      y: Math.random() * 200 + 200 + (index * 150)
    }
    
    const newNode: Node = {
      id: newNodeId,
      type: 'disk',
      position: nodePosition,
      data: {
        id: newNodeId,
        diskId: diskData?.id || Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000),
        name: diskData?.name || `Disk ${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`,
        description: diskData?.description || 'New disk node',
        applicationId: diskData?.applicationId || (parentNodeId ? parseInt(parentNodeId.replace('app-', '')) : undefined),
        isPinned: false,
        onRename: handleNodeRename,
        onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
        onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
        onExpand: handleNodeExpand,
      },
    }

    console.log(`💾 Creating disk node with data:`, {
      newNodeId,
      nodeType: 'disk',
      nodePosition,
      nodeData: newNode.data,
      diskId: diskData?.id,
      diskName: diskData?.name
    })
    
    setNodes((nds) => {
      const newNodes = nds.concat(newNode)
      console.log(`💾 Total nodes after adding disk: ${newNodes.length}`)
      return newNodes
    })

    // Auto-connect to parent application node
    if (parentNodeId) {
      const newEdge: Edge = {
        id: `${parentNodeId}-${newNodeId}`,
        source: parentNodeId,
        target: newNodeId,
        sourceHandle: 'disks',
        targetHandle: 'input',
        type: 'smoothstep',
        animated: true,
        style: { stroke: '#10b981', strokeWidth: 2 },
        label: t("workbench.mountDisk")
      }
      console.log(`🔗 Creating edge:`, newEdge)
      setEdges((eds) => {
        const newEdges = eds.concat(newEdge)
        console.log(`🔗 Total edges after adding: ${newEdges.length}`)
        return newEdges
      })
    } else {
      console.log(`⚠️ No parentNodeId provided for disk node ${newNodeId}`)
    }

    console.log(`✅ Successfully created disk node: ${newNode.data.name} (ID: ${diskData?.id})`)
  }, [handleNodeDelete, handleNodeExpand, handleNodeRename, handleNodeTogglePin, nodeIdCounter, setEdges, setNodes, t])

  // Handle node rename
  const handleNodeRename = useCallback((nodeId: string, newName: string) => {
    setNodes((nds) =>
      nds.map((node) =>
        node.id === nodeId
          ? { ...node, data: { ...node.data, name: newName } }
          : node
      )
    )
    
    // 如果是应用节点，同步更新SPACES中的对应画布名称
    const node = nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    if (node && node.type === 'application') {
      const applicationId = (node.data as any).applicationId
      if (applicationId) {
        // 找到对应的stickyNote并更新名称
        const correspondingNote = stickyNotes.find(note => 
          note.metadata?.applicationId === applicationId
        )
        if (correspondingNote) {
          console.log('🔄 Syncing application rename to SPACES:', {
            applicationId,
            newName,
            noteId: correspondingNote.id
          })
          renameNote(correspondingNote.id, newName)
        }
      }
    }
    
    console.log('🔄 Renamed flow node:', { nodeId, newName })
    
    toast({
      title: t("workbench.nodeRenamedTitle"),
      description: t("workbench.nodeRenamedDesc", { name: newName }),
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [nodes, renameNote, stickyNotes, t, toast])

  // Handle node delete
  const handleNodeDelete = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    console.log('🔄 Deleting flow node:', { nodeId })
    
    // 如果是应用节点，同步删除SPACES中的对应画布
    const node = nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    if (node && node.type === 'application') {
      const applicationId = (node.data as any).applicationId
      if (applicationId) {
        // 找到对应的stickyNote并删除
        const correspondingNote = stickyNotes.find(note => 
          note.metadata?.applicationId === applicationId
        )
        if (correspondingNote) {
          console.log('🔄 Syncing application delete to SPACES:', {
            applicationId,
            noteId: correspondingNote.id
          })
          deleteNote(correspondingNote.id)
        }
      }
    }
    
    setNodes((nds) => nds.filter((node) => node.id !== nodeId))
    setEdges((eds) => eds.filter((edge) => edge.source !== nodeId && edge.target !== nodeId))
    toast({
      title: t("workbench.nodeDeletedTitle"),
      description: t("workbench.nodeDeletedDesc"),
      status: "info",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [deleteNote, nodes, stickyNotes, t, toast])

  // Handle node pin toggle
  const handleNodeTogglePin = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    setNodes((nds) =>
      nds.map((node) =>
        node.id === nodeId
          ? { 
              ...node, 
              data: { ...node.data, isPinned: !(node.data as any).isPinned },
              draggable: (node.data as any).isPinned // Toggle draggable based on pin state
            }
          : node
      )
    )
  }, [])

  // Handle node expand - open disk properties panel
  const handleNodeExpand = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    console.log('🔍 Expanding node:', nodeId)
    console.log('🔍 Available nodes (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current.map(n => ({ id: n.id, type: n.type })))
    console.log('🔍 Nodes length (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current.length)
    console.log('🔍 Nodes details (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current)
    console.log('🔍 Looking for nodeId:', nodeId)
    
    // Find the node to check if it's a disk node using nodesRef.current
    const node = nodesRef.current.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    console.log('🔍 Found node:', node)
    console.log('🔍 Node type:', node?.type)
    console.log('🔍 Node data:', node?.data)
    
    if (node && node.type === 'disk') {
      const diskData = node.data as any
      console.log('💾 Opening disk properties panel for:', diskData)
      console.log('💾 Setting panel state:', {
        selectedDiskId: diskData.diskId,
        selectedDiskName: diskData.name,
        isDiskPanelOpen: true
      })
      
      setSelectedDiskId(diskData.diskId)
      setSelectedDiskName(diskData.name)
      setIsDiskPanelOpen(true)
      
      toast({
        title: t("workbench.diskPanelOpenedTitle"),
        description: t("workbench.diskPanelOpenedDesc", { name: diskData.name }),
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    } else {
      console.warn('⚠️ Node not found or not a disk node:', { nodeId, node, nodeType: node?.type })
    }
  }, [t, toast])

  // Clear all nodes and edges
  const clearCanvas = useCallback(() => {
    if (window.confirm(t("workbench.confirmClearWorkflow"))) {
      setNodes([])
      setEdges([])
      toast({
        title: t("workbench.workflowClearedTitle"),
        description: t("workbench.workflowClearedDesc"),
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    }
  }, [setEdges, setNodes, t, toast])

  // Handle application drop from sidebar
  const handleApplicationDropInternal = useCallback(async (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    console.log('📱 Application dropped on flow workspace:', application, position)
    
    try {
      // 获取完整的application信息，包括children (disks)
      const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)
      console.log("🔍 Complete application data structure:", {
        applicationData: completeApp,
        hasChildren: !!completeApp?.children,
        childrenCount: completeApp?.children?.length || 0,
        children: completeApp?.children,
        childrenTypes: completeApp?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
          id: child.id,
          name: child.name,
          node_type: child.node_type,
          hasChildren: !!child.children,
          childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0
        })) || [],
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      
      // 检查是否有children
      if (!completeApp?.children || completeApp.children.length === 0) {
        console.log("⚠️ No children found for application:", completeApp.name)
        toast({
          title: "No Disks Found",
          description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no associated disks`,
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }
      
      // 过滤出disk类型的children
      const disks = completeApp.children.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === "disk")
      console.log("💾 Filtered disks:", {
        totalDisks: disks.length,
        disks: disks.map((disk: any) => ({
          id: disk.id,
          name: disk.name,
          node_type: disk.node_type
        }))
      })
      
      if (disks.length === 0) {
        console.log("⚠️ No disk children found for application:", completeApp.name)
        toast({
          title: "No Disks Found",
          description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no disk children`,
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }
      
      // Create application node with proper position
      addApplicationNode(completeApp, position)
      
      // Notify parent component
      onApplicationDrop?.(completeApp, position)
      
      toast({
        title: t("workbench.workflowAppAddedTitle"),
        description: t("workbench.workflowAppAddedDesc", { name: completeApp.name }),
        status: "success",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("❌ Failed to handle application drop:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to add application to flow",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [addApplicationNode, onApplicationDrop, t, toast])

  // 使用传入的handleApplicationDrop函数
  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (handleApplicationDrop) {
      console.log("🔗 FlowWorkspace received handleApplicationDrop function")
    }
  }, [handleApplicationDrop])

  // 暴露handleApplicationDropInternal函数给父组件
  React.useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
    handleApplicationDrop: handleApplicationDropInternal
  }), [handleApplicationDropInternal])

  // Memoize the flow component for performance
  const flowComponent = useMemo(() => (
    <div
      style={{
        width: '100%',
        height: '100%',
        transition: 'all 0.2s ease'
      }}
    >
      <ReactFlow
        nodes={nodes}
        edges={edges}
        onNodesChange={onNodesChange}
        onEdgesChange={onEdgesChange}
        onConnect={onConnect}
        nodeTypes={nodeTypes}
        connectionMode={ConnectionMode.Loose}
        fitView
        fitViewOptions={{ padding: 0.2 }}
        defaultViewport={{ x: 0, y: 0, zoom: 0.8 }}
        minZoom={0.2}
        maxZoom={2}
        snapToGrid={true}
        snapGrid={[15, 15]}
        onPaneClick={() => {
          // 点击空白区域时关闭磁盘属性面板
          if (isDiskPanelOpen) {
            setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
            setSelectedDiskId(null)
            setSelectedDiskName('')
          }
        }}
      >
      <Background variant={BackgroundVariant.Dots} gap={20} size={1} />
      <Controls />
      
      {/* Control Panel */}
      <Panel position="top-left">
        <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
          <HStack spacing={2}>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
              colorScheme="blue"
              onClick={() => addApplicationNode()}
            >
              {t("workbench.addApplication")}
            </Button>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
              colorScheme="green"
              onClick={() => addDiskNode({})}
            >
              {t("workbench.addDisk")}
            </Button>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiTrash2 />}
              variant="outline"
              colorScheme="red"
              onClick={clearCanvas}
            >
              {t("workbench.clearWorkflow")}
            </Button>
          </HStack>
        </Box>
      </Panel>

      {/* Info Panel */}
      <Panel position="top-right">
        <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
          <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">
            {t("workbench.nodeStats", { nodes: nodes.length, connections: edges.length })}
          </Text>
        </Box>
      </Panel>
    </ReactFlow>
    </div>
  ), [nodes, edges, onNodesChange, onEdgesChange, onConnect, addApplicationNode, addDiskNode, clearCanvas])

  return (
    <Box w="full" h="full" position="relative">
      {flowComponent}
      
      {/* Disk Properties Panel */}
      <DiskPropertiesPanel
        diskId={selectedDiskId || 0}
        diskName={selectedDiskName}
        isOpen={isDiskPanelOpen}
        onClose={() => {
          setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
          setSelectedDiskId(null)
          setSelectedDiskName('')
        }}
      />
    </Box>
  )
})

FlowWorkspace.displayName = 'FlowWorkspace'

export default FlowWorkspace

```

```markdown
# Full Stack FastAPI Template


**Version:** v1.0.0 (Foundation Base Version)  
**Commit:** `cd9c3ac03a9e64f80b94814bb4760dfdc9047c0e`  
**Status:** ✅ Foundation base version successfully built and tested

<a href="https://github.com/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template/actions?query=workflow%3ATest" target="_blank"><img src="https://github.com/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template/workflows/Test/badge.svg" alt="Test"></a>
<a href="https://coverage-badge.samuelcolvin.workers.dev/redirect/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template" target="_blank"><img src="https://coverage-badge.samuelcolvin.workers.dev/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template.svg" alt="Coverage"></a>

## Technology Stack and Features

- ⚡ [**FastAPI**](https://fastapi.tiangolo.com) for the Python backend API.
    - 🧰 [SQLModel](https://sqlmodel.tiangolo.com) for the Python SQL database interactions (ORM).
    - 🔍 [Pydantic](https://docs.pydantic.dev), used by FastAPI, for the data validation and settings management.
    - 💾 [PostgreSQL](https://www.postgresql.org) as the SQL database.
- 🚀 [React](https://react.dev) for the frontend.
    - 💃 Using TypeScript, hooks, Vite, and other parts of a modern frontend stack.
    - 🎨 [Chakra UI](https://chakra-ui.com) for the frontend components.
    - 🤖 An automatically generated frontend client.
    - 🧪 [Playwright](https://playwright.dev) for End-to-End testing.
    - 🦇 Dark mode support.
- 🐋 [Docker](https://www.docker.com) and [Docker Compose](https://www.docker.com) for development and production.
    - Docker version 27.4.1, build b9d17ea
    - Docker Compose version v2.29.7
- 🔒 Secure password hashing by default.
- 🔑 JWT (JSON Web Token) authentication.
- 📫 Email based password recovery.
- ✅ Tests with [Pytest](https://pytest.org).
- 🚢 Deployment instructions using Docker Compose.
- 🏭 CI (continuous integration) and CD (continuous deployment) based on GitHub Actions.

### Dashboard Login

[![API docs](img/login.png)](https://github.com/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template)

### Dashboard - Admin

[![API docs](img/dashboard.png)](https://github.com/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template)

### Dashboard - Create User

[![API docs](img/dashboard-create.png)](https://github.com/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template)

### Dashboard - Items

[![API docs](img/dashboard-items.png)](https://github.com/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template)

### Dashboard - User Settings

[![API docs](img/dashboard-user-settings.png)](https://github.com/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template)

### Dashboard - Dark Mode

[![API docs](img/dashboard-dark.png)](https://github.com/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template)

### Interactive API Documentation

[![API docs](img/docs.png)](https://github.com/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template)

## AI Workbench UI Updates

- The AI Workbench canvas (`frontend/src/routes/_layout/workbench.tsx`) now uses English-only labels. The Flow workspace control panel (`frontend/src/components/Workbench/FlowWorkspace.tsx`) shows `Add Application`, `Add Disk`, and `Clear Workflow`.
- The right sidebar cards (Online Users, Canvas Info, Quick Actions) were removed. A floating `+` button opens a Drawer-styled Quick Actions panel with Standard Canvas / Flow Diagram toggles plus `Add Node`, `Clear Nodes`, and `Export Workflow`.
- Export/clear actions reuse the existing handlers, but their button titles reflect the new workflow terminology. Drawer content maintains consistent typography regardless of locale.
- README stays in sync with these structural changes so new contributors know where to adjust the Workbench UX.

## How To Use It

You can **just fork or clone** this repository and use it as is.

✨ It just works. ✨

### How to Use a Private Repository

If you want to have a private repository, GitHub won't allow you to simply fork it as it doesn't allow changing the visibility of forks.

But you can do the following:

- Create a new GitHub repo, for example `my-full-stack`.
- Clone this repository manually, set the name with the name of the project you want to use, for example `my-full-stack`:

```bash
git clone git@github.com:fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template.git my-full-stack
```

- Enter into the new directory:

```bash
cd my-full-stack
```

- Set the new origin to your new repository, copy it from the GitHub interface, for example:

```bash
git remote set-url origin git@github.com:octocat/my-full-stack.git
```

- Add this repo as another "remote" to allow you to get updates later:

```bash
git remote add upstream git@github.com:fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template.git
```

- Push the code to your new repository:

```bash
git push -u origin master
```

### Update From the Original Template

After cloning the repository, and after doing changes, you might want to get the latest changes from this original template.

- Make sure you added the original repository as a remote, you can check it with:

```bash
git remote -v

origin    git@github.com:octocat/my-full-stack.git (fetch)
origin    git@github.com:octocat/my-full-stack.git (push)
upstream    git@github.com:fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template.git (fetch)
upstream    git@github.com:fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template.git (push)
```

- Pull the latest changes without merging:

```bash
git pull --no-commit upstream master
```

This will download the latest changes from this template without committing them, that way you can check everything is right before committing.

- If there are conflicts, solve them in your editor.

- Once you are done, commit the changes:

```bash
git merge --continue
```

### Configure

This project supports multiple environments with separate configuration files:

- **开发环境**: `.env` (开发调试)
- **测试环境**: `env.staging` (服务器测试)
- **生产环境**: `env.prod` (正式部署)

#### 快速设置多环境配置

```bash
# 基于现有 .env 文件生成测试和生产环境配置
./bin/setup-env.sh

# 检查所有环境配置
./bin/check-env.sh all
```

#### 环境配置说明

每个环境文件都需要配置以下关键变量：

- `SECRET_KEY` - 用于签名令牌的密钥
- `FIRST_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD` - 第一个超级用户的密码
- `POSTGRES_PASSWORD` - 数据库密码
- `DOMAIN` - 域名（测试和生产环境必需）

详细配置说明请参考 [ENVIRONMENT.md](./ENVIRONMENT.md)。

#### 启动不同环境

```bash
# 开发环境
./bin/start-dev.sh

# 测试环境
./bin/start-staging.sh

# 生产环境
./bin/start-prod.sh
```

Read the [deployment.md](./deployment.md) docs for more details.

### Generate Secret Keys

Some environment variables in the `.env` file have a default value of `changethis`.

You have to change them with a secret key, to generate secret keys you can run the following command:

```bash
python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(32))"
```

Copy the content and use that as password / secret key. And run that again to generate another secure key.

## How To Use It - Alternative With Copier

This repository also supports generating a new project using [Copier](https://copier.readthedocs.io).

It will copy all the files, ask you configuration questions, and update the `.env` files with your answers.

### Install Copier

You can install Copier with:

```bash
pip install copier
```

Or better, if you have [`pipx`](https://pipx.pypa.io/), you can run it with:

```bash
pipx install copier
```

**Note**: If you have `pipx`, installing copier is optional, you could run it directly.

### Generate a Project With Copier

Decide a name for your new project's directory, you will use it below. For example, `my-awesome-project`.

Go to the directory that will be the parent of your project, and run the command with your project's name:

```bash
copier copy https://github.com/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template my-awesome-project --trust
```

If you have `pipx` and you didn't install `copier`, you can run it directly:

```bash
pipx run copier copy https://github.com/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template my-awesome-project --trust
```

**Note** the `--trust` option is necessary to be able to execute a [post-creation script](https://github.com/fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template/blob/master/.copier/update_dotenv.py) that updates your `.env` files.

### Input Variables

Copier will ask you for some data, you might want to have at hand before generating the project.

But don't worry, you can just update any of that in the `.env` files afterwards.

The input variables, with their default values (some auto generated) are:

- `project_name`: (default: `"FastAPI Project"`) The name of the project, shown to API users (in .env).
- `stack_name`: (default: `"fastapi-project"`) The name of the stack used for Docker Compose labels and project name (no spaces, no periods) (in .env).
- `secret_key`: (default: `"changethis"`) The secret key for the project, used for security, stored in .env, you can generate one with the method above.
- `first_superuser`: (default: `"admin@example.com"`) The email of the first superuser (in .env).
- `first_superuser_password`: (default: `"changethis"`) The password of the first superuser (in .env).
- `smtp_host`: (default: "") The SMTP server host to send emails, you can set it later in .env.
- `smtp_user`: (default: "") The SMTP server user to send emails, you can set it later in .env.
- `smtp_password`: (default: "") The SMTP server password to send emails, you can set it later in .env.
- `emails_from_email`: (default: `"info@example.com"`) The email account to send emails from, you can set it later in .env.
- `postgres_password`: (default: `"changethis"`) The password for the PostgreSQL database, stored in .env, you can generate one with the method above.
- `sentry_dsn`: (default: "") The DSN for Sentry, if you are using it, you can set it later in .env.

## Backend Development

Backend docs: [backend/README.md](./backend/README.md).

## Frontend Development

Frontend docs: [frontend/README.md](./frontend/README.md).

### AI Grid Enhancements (2025-11)

- Rich-text toolbar available inside `menu.aigrid` edit mode with formatting, font, color, list, and alignment controls.
- Inline Markdown edits persist immediately back to the grid space using existing autosave flows.
- “运行” action on each disk opens the Standard Mode upload modal, allowing analysts to re-run analyses without leaving the grid.
- `grid_space` persistence now依赖 `node_list`（应用节点）、`canvas_metadata.layouts`（响应式布局）、`viewport_state`、`connection_list`、`group_structure` 及 `layout_version`。磁盘富文本结果与状态同节点保存，确保重新载入后还原样式。
- Share management center：`GridSpaceShareModal` 进入“分享管理”视图，支持成员列表、单条/批量权限切换（Read ↔ Edit）、收回、指派纠错，并在前端实时刷新 `shared-with-me` 与分享状态徽标，详见 `cursordocs/grid-space-share.md`。
- Detailed operator instructions: [cursordocs/grid-text-editor-and-run-modal.md](./cursordocs/grid-text-editor-and-run-modal.md)

## Deployment

Deployment docs: [deployment.md](./deployment.md).

## Development

General development docs: [development.md](./development.md).

This includes using Docker Compose, custom local domains, `.env` configurations, etc.

## Release Notes

- 2025-11-07: Adjusted AI grid item vertical scrollbar styling, ensured grid items display visible vertical scrollbars, hid outer canvas scrollbar during edit mode, refined gutter spacing to eliminate visible gaps, added overlay close for disk sidebar, and kept top-right action buttons 8px left.
- 2025-11-10: Added AI Grid rich-text editing workflow, Standard Mode run modal integration, autosave persistence for Markdown updates, and accompanying test coverage.

Check the file [release-notes.md](./release-notes.md).

## License

The Full Stack FastAPI Template is licensed under the terms of the MIT license.

- The right sidebar cards (Online Users, Canvas Info, Quick Actions) were removed...

## 测试  
- `npm run lint`（失败）：Biome 扫描 `frontend/dist` 生成文件超出大小限制，并对既有生成的 `src/client` 代码提出大量历史告警；本次改动未触及相关文件，需要后续单独处理这些遗留问题。

## 后续建议  
- 目前 Drawer 默认宽度为 `xs`，建议产品验收时确认在 1280px 以下窗口的开启位置；如需响应式位置，可在 Chakra Drawer 上追加 `size` breakpoints。  
- 若将来继续保留 `frontend/dist` 目录，建议在 Biome 配置中排除或调高 `files.maxSize` 以避免 lint 无法完成；也可将生成的 SDK/client 代码加入忽略列表，单独追踪其优化计划。

---

**Cursor**

收到，小黄  
根据报错堆栈，`FlowWorkspace` 在执行 `addApplicationNode`（第 252 行附近）时引用了 `handleNodeDelete`，但该常量通过 `const handleNodeDelete = useCallback(...)` 定义在后面。React 组件在渲染时会自上而下执行，这意味着 `handleNodeDelete` 尚处于 TDZ（Temporal Dead Zone），因此触发 “Cannot access 'handleNodeDelete' before initialization”。

我打算在 `FlowWorkspace.tsx` 中将 `handleNodeRename`、`handleNodeDelete`、`handleNodeTogglePin` 等依赖函数上移到 `addApplicationNode` 和 `addDiskNode` 之前，保持逻辑不变，仅调整声明顺序，从而消除此初始化顺序错误。请确认是否采纳这一修复方案，若有其他偏好（例如改为函数声明等），也请告知。

---

**User**

采纳这一修复方案，请开始

---

   // Handle node rename
   const handleNodeRename = useCallback((nodeId: string, newName: string) => {
@@
     toast({
       title: t("workbench.nodeDeletedTitle"),

+  // Add a new application node with enhanced data handling
+  const addApplicationNode = useCallback((applicationData?: any, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
+    const newNodeId = `app-${nodeIdCounter}`
+    setNodeIdCounter(prev => prev + 1)
+
+    // Use provided position or generate random position
+    const nodePosition = position || { x: Math.random() * 300 + 100, y: Math.random() * 200 + 100 }
+    const diskChildren = applicationData?.children?.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === 'disk') || []
+
+    const newNode: Node = {
+      id: newNodeId,
+      type: 'application',
+      position: nodePosition,
+      data: {
+        id: newNodeId,
+        applicationId: applicationData?.id, // 添加applicationId字段，用于关联SPACES中的stickyNote
+        name: applicationData?.name || `Application ${nodeIdCounter}`,
+        description: applicationData?.description || 'New application node',
+        area: applicationData?.area,
+        category: applicationData?.category,
+        owner: applicationData?.owner,
+        disks: diskChildren,
+        isPinned: false,
+        onRename: handleNodeRename,
+        onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
+        onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
+      },
+    }
+
+    setNodes((nds) => nds.concat(newNode))
+
+    // Note: 不再在FlowWorkspace中创建stickyNote
+    // SPACES区域应该只显示传统画布模式的画布，流程图模式的节点不需要在SPACES中显示
+    console.log('🎯 Created flow application node:', {
+      nodeId: newNodeId,
+      applicationName: applicationData?.name,
+      position: nodePosition
+    })
+
+    // Debug: Log the complete application data structure
+    console.log('🔍 Complete application data structure:', {
+      applicationData,
+      hasChildren: !!applicationData?.children,
+      childrenCount: applicationData?.children?.length || 0,
+      children: applicationData?.children,
+      childrenTypes: applicationData?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
+        id: child.id,
+        name: child.name,
+        node_type: child.node_type,
+        hasChildren: !!child.children,
+        childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0
+      })) || [],
+      timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
+    })
+
+    // Auto-create disk nodes if application has disks
+    if (applicationData?.children && applicationData.children.length > 0) {
+      const disks = diskChildren
+      console.log(`🔍 Found ${disks.length} disks for application ${applicationData.name}:`, disks)
+
+      if (disks.length > 0) {
+        disks.forEach((disk: any, index: number) => {
+          console.log(`💾 Creating disk node ${index + 1}/${disks.length}:`, {
+            diskId: disk.id,
+            diskName: disk.name,
+            diskType: disk.node_type,
+            diskData: disk,
+            applicationNodeId: newNodeId,
+            index
+          })
+
+          // Position disk nodes to the right and below the application node
+          const diskPosition = {
+            x: nodePosition.x + 400 + (index % 2) * 200, // Stagger horizontally
+            y: nodePosition.y + 150 + Math.floor(index / 2) * 200 // Stack vertically every 2 disks
+          }
+          console.log(`📍 Disk position calculated:`, diskPosition)
+          addDiskNode(disk, newNodeId, index, diskPosition)
+        })
+      } else {
+        console.log('⚠️ No disk nodes found in children array')
+        console.log('🔍 All children types:', applicationData.children.map((child: any) => ({
+          id: child.id,
+          name: child.name,
+          node_type: child.node_type
+        })))
+      }
+    } else {
+      console.log('⚠️ No children found in application data or children array is empty')
+      console.log('🔍 Application data keys:', Object.keys(applicationData || {}))
+    }
+
+    toast({
+      title: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreated"),
+      description: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreatedDesc", {
+        name: applicationData?.name || newNode.data.name,
+        count: diskChildren.length
+      }),
+      status: "success",
+      duration: 3000,
+    })
+
+    return newNodeId
+  }, [addDiskNode, handleNodeDelete, handleNodeRename, handleNodeTogglePin, nodeIdCounter, t, toast])
+
+  // Add a new disk node with enhanced data handling
+  const addDiskNode = useCallback((diskData: any, parentNodeId?: string, index: number = 0, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
+    const newNodeId = `disk-${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`
+
+    console.log(`💾 addDiskNode called with:`, {
+      diskData,
+      parentNodeId,
+      index,
+      position,
+      newNodeId,
+      nodeIdCounter
+    })
+
+    // Use provided position or generate default position
+    const nodePosition = position || {
+      x: Math.random() * 300 + 400,
+      y: Math.random() * 200 + 200 + (index * 150)
+    }
+
+    const newNode: Node = {
+      id: newNodeId,
+      type: 'disk',
+      position: nodePosition,
+      data: {
+        id: newNodeId,
+        diskId: diskData?.id || Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000),
+        name: diskData?.name || `Disk ${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`,
+        description: diskData?.description || 'New disk node',
+        applicationId: diskData?.applicationId || (parentNodeId ? parseInt(parentNodeId.replace('app-', '')) : undefined),
+        isPinned: false,
+        onRename: handleNodeRename,
+        onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
+        onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
+        onExpand: handleNodeExpand,
+      },
+    }
+
+    console.log(`💾 Creating disk node with data:`, {
+      newNodeId,
+      nodeType: 'disk',
+      nodePosition,
+      nodeData: newNode.data,
+      diskId: diskData?.id,
+      diskName: diskData?.name
+    })
+
+    setNodes((nds) => {
+      const newNodes = nds.concat(newNode)
+      console.log(`💾 Total nodes after adding disk: ${newNodes.length}`)
+      return newNodes
+    })
+
+    // Auto-connect to parent application node
+    if (parentNodeId) {
+      const newEdge: Edge = {
+        id: `${parentNodeId}-${newNodeId}`,
+        source: parentNodeId,
+        target: newNodeId,
+        sourceHandle: 'disks',
+        targetHandle: 'input',
+        type: 'smoothstep',
+        animated: true,
+        style: { stroke: '#10b981', strokeWidth: 2 },
+        label: t("workbench.mountDisk")
+      }
+      console.log(`🔗 Creating edge:`, newEdge)
+      setEdges((eds) => {
+        const newEdges = eds.concat(newEdge)
+        console.log(`🔗 Total edges after adding: ${newEdges.length}`)
+        return newEdges
+      })
+    } else {
+      console.log(`⚠️ No parentNodeId provided for disk node ${newNodeId}`)
+    }
+
+    console.log(`✅ Successfully created disk node: ${newNode.data.name} (ID: ${diskData?.id})`)
+  }, [handleNodeDelete, handleNodeExpand, handleNodeRename, handleNodeTogglePin, nodeIdCounter, setEdges, setNodes, t])
+
*** End Patch
```

```typescriptreact
import {
  Background,
  BackgroundVariant,
  type Connection,
  ConnectionMode,
  Controls,
  type Edge,
  type Node,
  type NodeTypes,
  Panel,
  ReactFlow,
  addEdge,
  useEdgesState,
  useNodesState,
} from "@xyflow/react"
import React, { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from "react"
import "@xyflow/react/dist/style.css"
import AppNodeService from "@/services/appNodeService"
import { useWorkbenchStore } from "@/stores/workbenchStore"
import { Box, Button, HStack, Text, useToast } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"
import { FiPlus, FiTrash2 } from "react-icons/fi"
import DiskPropertiesPanel from "./DiskPropertiesPanel"
// import { useDrop } from 'react-dnd' // 已移动到WorkbenchContent，避免重复DnD配置
import ApplicationNode from "./FlowNodes/ApplicationNode"
import DiskNode from "./FlowNodes/DiskNode"

interface FlowWorkspaceProps {
  onApplicationDrop?: (
    application: any,
    position: { x: number; y: number },
  ) => void
  handleApplicationDrop?: (
    application: any,
    position: { x: number; y: number },
  ) => void
}

// Define node types
const nodeTypes: NodeTypes = {
  application: ApplicationNode,
  disk: DiskNode,
}

// Initial nodes and edges
const initialNodes: Node[] = []
const initialEdges: Edge[] = []

export const FlowWorkspace = React.forwardRef<any, FlowWorkspaceProps>(
  ({ onApplicationDrop, handleApplicationDrop }, ref) => {
    const [nodes, setNodes, onNodesChange] = useNodesState(initialNodes)
    const [edges, setEdges, onEdgesChange] = useEdgesState(initialEdges)
    const [nodeIdCounter, setNodeIdCounter] = useState(1)
    const toast = useToast()
    const { t } = useTranslation()

    // 创建nodesRef来存储最新的nodes状态
    const nodesRef = React.useRef(nodes)

    // Disk properties panel state
    const [selectedDiskId, setSelectedDiskId] = useState<number | null>(null)
    const [selectedDiskName, setSelectedDiskName] = useState<string>("")
    const [isDiskPanelOpen, setIsDiskPanelOpen] = useState(false)

    // 添加调试日志来跟踪nodes状态
    console.log("🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodes count:", nodes.length)
    console.log(
      "🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodes:",
      nodes.map((n) => ({ id: n.id, type: n.type })),
    )
    console.log("🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodeIdCounter:", nodeIdCounter)
    console.log("🔄 FlowWorkspace render - selectedDiskId:", selectedDiskId)
    console.log("🔄 FlowWorkspace render - isDiskPanelOpen:", isDiskPanelOpen)

    // 获取workbench store的函数
    const { renameNote, deleteNote, stickyNotes } = useWorkbenchStore()

    // 更新nodesRef以保持最新的nodes状态
    React.useEffect(() => {
      nodesRef.current = nodes
      console.log("🔄 nodesRef updated:", nodes.length, "nodes")
    }, [nodes])

    // 监听clearFlowWorkspace事件
    React.useEffect(() => {
      const handleClearFlowWorkspace = () => {
        console.log("📡 FlowWorkspace received clear event")
        setNodes([])
        setEdges([])
        setNodeIdCounter(1)
        console.log("✅ FlowWorkspace cleared via event")
      }

      window.addEventListener("clearFlowWorkspace", handleClearFlowWorkspace)

      return () => {
        window.removeEventListener(
          "clearFlowWorkspace",
          handleClearFlowWorkspace,
        )
      }
    }, [setNodes, setEdges])

    // Note: useDrop moved to WorkbenchContent to avoid duplicate DnD configuration

    // Handle new connections between nodes
    const onConnect = useCallback(
      (params: Connection) => {
        console.log("🔗 Creating connection:", params)
        setEdges((eds) =>
          addEdge(
            {
              ...params,
              type: "smoothstep",
              animated: true,
              style: { stroke: "#3182ce", strokeWidth: 2 },
            },
            eds,
          ),
        )
      },
      [setEdges],
    )

    // Handle node rename
    const handleNodeRename = useCallback(
      (nodeId: string, newName: string) => {
        setNodes((nds) =>
          nds.map((node) =>
            node.id === nodeId
              ? { ...node, data: { ...node.data, name: newName } }
              : node,
          ),
        )

        // 如果是应用节点，同步更新SPACES中的对应画布名称
        const node = nodes.find((n) => n.id === nodeId)
        if (node && node.type === "application") {
          const applicationId = (node.data as any).applicationId
          if (applicationId) {
            // 找到对应的stickyNote并更新名称
            const correspondingNote = stickyNotes.find(
              (note) => note.metadata?.applicationId === applicationId,
            )
            if (correspondingNote) {
              console.log("🔄 Syncing application rename to SPACES:", {
                applicationId,
                newName,
                noteId: correspondingNote.id,
              })
              renameNote(correspondingNote.id, newName)
            }
          }
        }

        console.log("🔄 Renamed flow node:", { nodeId, newName })

        toast({
          title: t("workbench.nodeRenamedTitle"),
          description: t("workbench.nodeRenamedDesc", { name: newName }),
          status: "success",
          duration: 2000,
        })
      },
      [nodes, renameNote, stickyNotes, t, toast],
    )

    // Handle node delete
    const handleNodeDelete = useCallback(
      (nodeId: string) => {
        console.log("🔄 Deleting flow node:", { nodeId })

        // 如果是应用节点，同步删除SPACES中的对应画布
        const node = nodes.find((n) => n.id === nodeId)
        if (node && node.type === "application") {
          const applicationId = (node.data as any).applicationId
          if (applicationId) {
            // 找到对应的stickyNote并删除
            const correspondingNote = stickyNotes.find(
              (note) => note.metadata?.applicationId === applicationId,
            )
            if (correspondingNote) {
              console.log("🔄 Syncing application delete to SPACES:", {
                applicationId,
                noteId: correspondingNote.id,
              })
              deleteNote(correspondingNote.id)
            }
          }
        }

        setNodes((nds) => nds.filter((node) => node.id !== nodeId))
        setEdges((eds) =>
          eds.filter(
            (edge) => edge.source !== nodeId && edge.target !== nodeId,
          ),
        )
        toast({
          title: t("workbench.nodeDeletedTitle"),
          description: t("workbench.nodeDeletedDesc"),
          status: "info",
          duration: 2000,
        })
      },
      [deleteNote, nodes, stickyNotes, t, toast],
    )

    // Handle node pin toggle
    const handleNodeTogglePin = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
      setNodes((nds) =>
        nds.map((node) =>
          node.id === nodeId
            ? {
                ...node,
                data: { ...node.data, isPinned: !(node.data as any).isPinned },
                draggable: (node.data as any).isPinned, // Toggle draggable based on pin state
              }
            : node,
        ),
      )
    }, [])

    // Handle node expand - open disk properties panel
    const handleNodeExpand = useCallback(
      (nodeId: string) => {
        console.log("🔍 Expanding node:", nodeId)
        console.log(
          "🔍 Available nodes (from nodesRef):",
          nodesRef.current.map((n) => ({ id: n.id, type: n.type })),
        )
        console.log("🔍 Nodes length (from nodesRef):", nodesRef.current.length)
        console.log("🔍 Nodes details (from nodesRef):", nodesRef.current)
        console.log("🔍 Looking for nodeId:", nodeId)

        // Find the node to check if it's a disk node using nodesRef.current
        const node = nodesRef.current.find((n) => n.id === nodeId)
        console.log("🔍 Found node:", node)
        console.log("🔍 Node type:", node?.type)
        console.log("🔍 Node data:", node?.data)

        if (node && node.type === "disk") {
          const diskData = node.data as any
          console.log("💾 Opening disk properties panel for:", diskData)
          console.log("💾 Setting panel state:", {
            selectedDiskId: diskData.diskId,
            selectedDiskName: diskData.name,
            isDiskPanelOpen: true,
          })

          setSelectedDiskId(diskData.diskId)
          setSelectedDiskName(diskData.name)
          setIsDiskPanelOpen(true)

          toast({
            title: t("workbench.diskPanelOpenedTitle"),
            description: t("workbench.diskPanelOpenedDesc", {
              name: diskData.name,
            }),
            status: "info",
            duration: 2000,
          })
        } else {
          console.warn("⚠️ Node not found or not a disk node:", {
            nodeId,
            node,
            nodeType: node?.type,
          })
        }
      },
      [t, toast],
    )

    // Clear all nodes and edges
    const clearCanvas = useCallback(() => {
      if (window.confirm(t("workbench.confirmClearWorkflow"))) {
        setNodes([])
        setEdges([])
        toast({
          title: t("workbench.workflowClearedTitle"),
          description: t("workbench.workflowClearedDesc"),
          status: "info",
          duration: 2000,
        })
      }
    }, [setEdges, setNodes, t, toast])

    // Handle application drop from sidebar
    const handleApplicationDropInternal = useCallback(
      async (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => {
        console.log(
          "📱 Application dropped on flow workspace:",
          application,
          position,
        )

        try {
          // 获取完整的application信息，包括children (disks)
          const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)
          console.log("🔍 Complete application data structure:", {
            applicationData: completeApp,
            hasChildren: !!completeApp?.children,
            childrenCount: completeApp?.children?.length || 0,
            children: completeApp?.children,
            childrenTypes:
              completeApp?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
                id: child.id,
                name: child.name,
                node_type: child.node_type,
                hasChildren: !!child.children,
                childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0,
              })) || [],
            timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
          })

          // 检查是否有children
          if (!completeApp?.children || completeApp.children.length === 0) {
            console.log(
              "⚠️ No children found for application:",
              completeApp.name,
            )
            toast({
              title: "No Disks Found",
              description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no associated disks`,
              status: "warning",
              duration: 3000,
            })
            return
          }

          // 过滤出disk类型的children
          const disks = completeApp.children.filter(
            (child: any) => child.node_type === "disk",
          )
          console.log("💾 Filtered disks:", {
            totalDisks: disks.length,
            disks: disks.map((disk: any) => ({
              id: disk.id,
              name: disk.name,
              node_type: disk.node_type,
            })),
          })

          if (disks.length === 0) {
            console.log(
              "⚠️ No disk children found for application:",
              completeApp.name,
            )
            toast({
              title: "No Disks Found",
              description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no disk children`,
              status: "warning",
              duration: 3000,
            })
            return
          }

          // Create application node with proper position
          addApplicationNode(completeApp, position)

          // Notify parent component
          onApplicationDrop?.(completeApp, position)

          toast({
            title: t("workbench.workflowAppAddedTitle"),
            description: t("workbench.workflowAppAddedDesc", {
              name: completeApp.name,
            }),
            status: "success",
            duration: 3000,
          })
        } catch (error) {
          console.error("❌ Failed to handle application drop:", error)
          toast({
            title: "Error",
            description: "Failed to add application to flow",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
        }
      },
      [addApplicationNode, onApplicationDrop, t, toast],
    )

    // 使用传入的handleApplicationDrop函数
    React.useEffect(() => {
      if (handleApplicationDrop) {
        console.log("🔗 FlowWorkspace received handleApplicationDrop function")
      }
    }, [handleApplicationDrop])

    // 暴露handleApplicationDropInternal函数给父组件
    React.useImperativeHandle(
      ref,
      () => ({
        handleApplicationDrop: handleApplicationDropInternal,
      }),
      [handleApplicationDropInternal],
    )

    // Memoize the flow component for performance
    const flowComponent = useMemo(
      () => (
        <div
          style={{
            width: "100%",
            height: "100%",
            transition: "all 0.2s ease",
          }}
        >
          <ReactFlow
            nodes={nodes}
            edges={edges}
            onNodesChange={onNodesChange}
            onEdgesChange={onEdgesChange}
            onConnect={onConnect}
            nodeTypes={nodeTypes}
            connectionMode={ConnectionMode.Loose}
            fitView
            fitViewOptions={{ padding: 0.2 }}
            defaultViewport={{ x: 0, y: 0, zoom: 0.8 }}
            minZoom={0.2}
            maxZoom={2}
            snapToGrid={true}
            snapGrid={[15, 15]}
            onPaneClick={() => {
              // 点击空白区域时关闭磁盘属性面板
              if (isDiskPanelOpen) {
                setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
                setSelectedDiskId(null)
                setSelectedDiskName("")
              }
            }}
          >
            <Background variant={BackgroundVariant.Dots} gap={20} size={1} />
            <Controls />

            {/* Control Panel */}
            <Panel position="top-left">
              <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
                <HStack spacing={2}>
                  <Button
                    size="sm"
                    leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
                    colorScheme="blue"
                    onClick={() => addApplicationNode()}
                  >
                    {t("workbench.addApplication")}
                  </Button>
                  <Button
                    size="sm"
                    leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
                    colorScheme="green"
                    onClick={() => addDiskNode({})}
                  >
                    {t("workbench.addDisk")}
                  </Button>
                  <Button
                    size="sm"
                    leftIcon={<FiTrash2 />}
                    variant="outline"
                    colorScheme="red"
                    onClick={clearCanvas}
                  >
                    {t("workbench.clearWorkflow")}
                  </Button>
                </HStack>
              </Box>
            </Panel>

            {/* Info Panel */}
            <Panel position="top-right">
              <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">
                  {t("workbench.nodeStats", {
                    nodes: nodes.length,
                    connections: edges.length,
                  })}
                </Text>
              </Box>
            </Panel>
          </ReactFlow>
        </div>
      ),
      [
        nodes,
        edges,
        onNodesChange,
        onEdgesChange,
        onConnect,
        addApplicationNode,
        addDiskNode,
        clearCanvas,
      ],
    )

    return (
      <Box w="full" h="full" position="relative">
        {flowComponent}

        {/* Disk Properties Panel */}
        <DiskPropertiesPanel
          diskId={selectedDiskId || 0}
          diskName={selectedDiskName}
          isOpen={isDiskPanelOpen}
          onClose={() => {
            setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
            setSelectedDiskId(null)
            setSelectedDiskName("")
          }}
        />
      </Box>
    )
  },
)

FlowWorkspace.displayName = "FlowWorkspace"

export default FlowWorkspace

```

+    // Add a new application node with enhanced data handling
+    const addApplicationNode = useCallback(
+      (applicationData?: any, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
+        const newNodeId = `app-${nodeIdCounter}`
+        setNodeIdCounter((prev) => prev + 1)
+
+        // Use provided position or generate random position
+        const nodePosition = position || {
+          x: Math.random() * 300 + 100,
+          y: Math.random() * 200 + 100,
+        }
+        const diskChildren =
+          applicationData?.children?.filter(
+            (child: any) => child.node_type === "disk",
+          ) || []
+
+        const newNode: Node = {
+          id: newNodeId,
+          type: "application",
+          position: nodePosition,
+          data: {
+            id: newNodeId,
+            applicationId: applicationData?.id, // 添加applicationId字段，用于关联SPACES中的stickyNote
+            name: applicationData?.name || `Application ${nodeIdCounter}`,
+            description: applicationData?.description || "New application node",
+            area: applicationData?.area,
+            category: applicationData?.category,
+            owner: applicationData?.owner,
+            disks: diskChildren,
+            isPinned: false,
+            onRename: handleNodeRename,
+            onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
+            onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
+          },
+        }
+
+        setNodes((nds) => nds.concat(newNode))
+
+        // Note: 不再在FlowWorkspace中创建stickyNote
+        // SPACES区域应该只显示传统画布模式的画布，流程图模式的节点不需要在SPACES中显示
+        console.log("🎯 Created flow application node:", {
+          nodeId: newNodeId,
+          applicationName: applicationData?.name,
+          position: nodePosition,
+        })
+
+        // Debug: Log the complete application data structure
+        console.log("🔍 Complete application data structure:", {
+          applicationData,
+          hasChildren: !!applicationData?.children,
+          childrenCount: applicationData?.children?.length || 0,
+          children: applicationData?.children,
+          childrenTypes:
+            applicationData?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
+              id: child.id,
+              name: child.name,
+              node_type: child.node_type,
+              hasChildren: !!child.children,
+              childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0,
+            })) || [],
+          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
+        })
+
+        // Auto-create disk nodes if application has disks
+        if (applicationData?.children && applicationData.children.length > 0) {
+          const disks = diskChildren
+          console.log(
+            `🔍 Found ${disks.length} disks for application ${applicationData.name}:`,
+            disks,
+          )
+
+          if (disks.length > 0) {
+            disks.forEach((disk: any, index: number) => {
+              console.log(
+                `💾 Creating disk node ${index + 1}/${disks.length}:`,
+                {
+                  diskId: disk.id,
+                  diskName: disk.name,
+                  diskType: disk.node_type,
+                  diskData: disk,
+                  applicationNodeId: newNodeId,
+                  index,
+                },
+              )
+
+              // Position disk nodes to the right and below the application node
+              const diskPosition = {
+                x: nodePosition.x + 400 + (index % 2) * 200, // Stagger horizontally
+                y: nodePosition.y + 150 + Math.floor(index / 2) * 200, // Stack vertically every 2 disks
+              }
+              console.log("📍 Disk position calculated:", diskPosition)
+              addDiskNode(disk, newNodeId, index, diskPosition)
+            })
+          } else {
+            console.log("⚠️ No disk nodes found in children array")
+            console.log(

+          )

+

+
