            status: "info",
            duration: 2000,
          })
        } else {
          console.warn("⚠️ Node not found or not a disk node:", {
            nodeId,
            node,
            nodeType: node?.type,
          })
        }
      },
      [t, toast],
    )

    // Add a new disk node with enhanced data handling
    const addDiskNode = useCallback(
      (
        diskData: any,
        parentNodeId?: string,
        index = 0,
        position?: { x: number; y: number },
      ) => {
        const newNodeId = `disk-${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`

        const nodePosition = position || {
          x: Math.random() * 300 + 400,
          y: Math.random() * 200 + 200 + index * 150,
        }

        const newNode: Node = {
          id: newNodeId,
          type: "disk",
          position: nodePosition,
          data: {
            id: newNodeId,
            diskId: diskData?.id || Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000),
            name: diskData?.name || `Disk ${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`,
            description: diskData?.description || "New disk node",
            applicationId:
              diskData?.applicationId ||
              (parentNodeId
                ? Number.parseInt(parentNodeId.replace("app-", ""))
                : undefined),
            isPinned: false,
            onRename: handleNodeRename,
            onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
            onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
            onExpand: handleNodeExpand,
          },
        }

        setNodes((nds) => nds.concat(newNode))

        if (parentNodeId) {
          const newEdge: Edge = {
            id: `${parentNodeId}-${newNodeId}`,
            source: parentNodeId,
            target: newNodeId,
            sourceHandle: "disks",
            targetHandle: "input",
            type: "smoothstep",
            animated: true,
            style: { stroke: "#10b981", strokeWidth: 2 },
            label: t("workbench.mountDisk"),
          }
          setEdges((eds) => eds.concat(newEdge))
        }
      },
      [
        handleNodeDelete,
        handleNodeExpand,
        handleNodeRename,
        handleNodeTogglePin,
        nodeIdCounter,
        setEdges,
        setNodes,
        t,
      ],
    )

    // Add a new application node with enhanced data handling
    const addApplicationNode = useCallback(
      (applicationData?: any, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
        const newNodeId = `app-${nodeIdCounter}`
        setNodeIdCounter((prev) => prev + 1)

        const nodePosition = position || {
          x: Math.random() * 300 + 100,
          y: Math.random() * 200 + 100,
        }
        const diskChildren =
          applicationData?.children?.filter(
            (child: any) => child.node_type === "disk",
          ) || []

        const newNode: Node = {
          id: newNodeId,
          type: "application",
          position: nodePosition,
          data: {
            id: newNodeId,
            applicationId: applicationData?.id,
            name: applicationData?.name || `Application ${nodeIdCounter}`,
            description: applicationData?.description || "New application node",
            area: applicationData?.area,
            category: applicationData?.category,
            owner: applicationData?.owner,
            disks: diskChildren,
            isPinned: false,
            onRename: handleNodeRename,
            onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
            onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
          },
        }

        setNodes((nds) => nds.concat(newNode))

        if (applicationData?.children && applicationData.children.length > 0) {
          const disks = diskChildren
          disks.forEach((disk: any, index: number) => {
            const diskPosition = {
              x: nodePosition.x + 400 + (index % 2) * 200,
              y: nodePosition.y + 150 + Math.floor(index / 2) * 200,
            }
            addDiskNode(disk, newNodeId, index, diskPosition)
          })
        }

        toast({
          title: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreated"),
          description: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreatedDesc", {
            name: applicationData?.name || newNode.data.name,
            count: diskChildren.length,
          }),
          status: "success",
          duration: 3000,
        })

        return newNodeId
      },
      [
        addDiskNode,
        handleNodeDelete,
        handleNodeRename,
        handleNodeTogglePin,
        nodeIdCounter,
        t,
        toast,
      ],
    )

    // Clear all nodes and edges
    const clearCanvas = useCallback(() => {
      if (window.confirm(t("workbench.confirmClearWorkflow"))) {
        setNodes([])
        setEdges([])
        toast({
          title: t("workbench.workflowClearedTitle"),
          description: t("workbench.workflowClearedDesc"),
          status: "info",
          duration: 2000,
        })
      }
    }, [setEdges, setNodes, t, toast])

    // Handle application drop from sidebar
    const handleApplicationDropInternal = useCallback(
      async (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => {
        console.log(
          "📱 Application dropped on flow workspace:",
          application,
          position,
        )

        try {
          // 获取完整的application信息，包括children (disks)
          const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)
          console.log("🔍 Complete application data structure:", {
            applicationData: completeApp,
            hasChildren: !!completeApp?.children,
            childrenCount: completeApp?.children?.length || 0,
            children: completeApp?.children,
            childrenTypes:
              completeApp?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
                id: child.id,
                name: child.name,
                node_type: child.node_type,
                hasChildren: !!child.children,
                childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0,
              })) || [],
            timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
          })

          // 检查是否有children
          if (!completeApp?.children || completeApp.children.length === 0) {
            console.log(
              "⚠️ No children found for application:",
              completeApp.name,
            )
            toast({
              title: "No Disks Found",
              description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no associated disks`,
              status: "warning",
              duration: 3000,
            })
            return
          }

          // 过滤出disk类型的children
          const disks = completeApp.children.filter(
            (child: any) => child.node_type === "disk",
          )
          console.log("💾 Filtered disks:", {
            totalDisks: disks.length,
            disks: disks.map((disk: any) => ({
              id: disk.id,
              name: disk.name,
              node_type: disk.node_type,
            })),
          })

          if (disks.length === 0) {
            console.log(
              "⚠️ No disk children found for application:",
              completeApp.name,
            )
            toast({
              title: "No Disks Found",
              description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no disk children`,
              status: "warning",
              duration: 3000,
            })
            return
          }

          // Create application node with proper position
          addApplicationNode(completeApp, position)

          // Notify parent component
          onApplicationDrop?.(completeApp, position)

          toast({
            title: t("workbench.workflowAppAddedTitle"),
            description: t("workbench.workflowAppAddedDesc", {
              name: completeApp.name,
            }),
            status: "success",
            duration: 3000,
          })
        } catch (error) {
          console.error("❌ Failed to handle application drop:", error)
          toast({
            title: "Error",
            description: "Failed to add application to flow",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
        }
      },
      [addApplicationNode, onApplicationDrop, t, toast],
    )

    // 使用传入的handleApplicationDrop函数
    React.useEffect(() => {
      if (handleApplicationDrop) {
        console.log("🔗 FlowWorkspace received handleApplicationDrop function")
      }
    }, [handleApplicationDrop])

    // 暴露handleApplicationDropInternal函数给父组件
    React.useImperativeHandle(
      ref,
      () => ({
        handleApplicationDrop: handleApplicationDropInternal,
      }),
      [handleApplicationDropInternal],
    )

    // Memoize the flow component for performance
    const flowComponent = useMemo(
      () => (
        <div
          style={{
            width: "100%",
            height: "100%",
            transition: "all 0.2s ease",
          }}
        >
          <ReactFlow
            nodes={nodes}
            edges={edges}
            onNodesChange={onNodesChange}
            onEdgesChange={onEdgesChange}
            onConnect={onConnect}
            nodeTypes={nodeTypes}
            connectionMode={ConnectionMode.Loose}
            fitView
            fitViewOptions={{ padding: 0.2 }}
            defaultViewport={{ x: 0, y: 0, zoom: 0.8 }}
            minZoom={0.2}
            maxZoom={2}
            snapToGrid={true}
            snapGrid={[15, 15]}
            onPaneClick={() => {
              // 点击空白区域时关闭磁盘属性面板
              if (isDiskPanelOpen) {
                setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
                setSelectedDiskId(null)
                setSelectedDiskName("")
              }
            }}
          >
            <Background variant={BackgroundVariant.Dots} gap={20} size={1} />
            <Controls />

            {/* Control Panel */}
            <Panel position="top-left">
              <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
                <HStack spacing={1.5}>
                  <Button
                    size="xs"
                    fontSize="xs"
                    px={3}
                    leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
                    colorScheme="blue"
                    onClick={() => addApplicationNode()}
                  >
                    {t("workbench.addApplication")}
                  </Button>
                  <Button
                    size="xs"
                    fontSize="xs"
                    px={3}
                    leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
                    colorScheme="green"
                    onClick={() => addDiskNode({})}
                  >
                    {t("workbench.addDisk")}
                  </Button>
                  <Button
                    size="xs"
                    fontSize="xs"
                    px={3}
                    leftIcon={<FiTrash2 />}
                    variant="outline"
                    colorScheme="red"
                    onClick={clearCanvas}
                  >
                    {t("workbench.clearWorkflow")}
                  </Button>
                </HStack>
              </Box>
            </Panel>

            {/* Info Panel */}
            <Panel position="top-right">
              <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">
                  {t("workbench.nodeStats", {
                    nodes: nodes.length,
                    connections: edges.length,
                  })}
                </Text>
              </Box>
            </Panel>
          </ReactFlow>
        </div>
      ),
      [
        nodes,
        edges,
        onNodesChange,
        onEdgesChange,
        onConnect,
        addApplicationNode,
        addDiskNode,
        clearCanvas,
      ],
    )

    return (
      <Box w="full" h="full" position="relative">
        {flowComponent}

        {/* Disk Properties Panel */}
        <DiskPropertiesPanel
          diskId={selectedDiskId || 0}
          diskName={selectedDiskName}
          isOpen={isDiskPanelOpen}
          onClose={() => {
            setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
            setSelectedDiskId(null)
            setSelectedDiskName("")
          }}
        />
      </Box>
    )
  },
)

FlowWorkspace.displayName = "FlowWorkspace"

export default FlowWorkspace

```

```typescriptreact
import KonvaErrorBoundary from "@/components/ErrorBoundary/KonvaErrorBoundary"
import WorkbenchKBarProvider from "@/components/Workbench/KBarProvider"
import WorkbenchSidebar from "@/components/Workbench/WorkbenchSidebar"
import useAuth from "@/hooks/useAuth"
import AppNodeService from "@/services/appNodeService"
import { createUser, useWorkbenchStore } from "@/stores/workbenchStore"
import {
  Box,
  Button,
  Drawer,
  DrawerBody,
  DrawerCloseButton,
  DrawerContent,
  DrawerHeader,
  DrawerOverlay,
  HStack,
  IconButton,
  Text,
  Tooltip,
  VStack,
  useDisclosure,
  useToast,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { createFileRoute } from "@tanstack/react-router"
import type Konva from "konva"
import { useEffect, useRef } from "react"
import React from "react"
import { DndProvider } from "react-dnd"
import { useDrop } from "react-dnd"
import { HTML5Backend } from "react-dnd-html5-backend"
import { flushSync } from "react-dom"
import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"
import {
  FiDownload,
  FiMove,
  FiPlus,
  FiSettings,
  FiZoomIn,
  FiZoomOut,
} from "react-icons/fi"
import { Text as KonvaText, Layer, Rect, Stage } from "react-konva"

import DiskResultModal from "@/components/Workbench/DiskResultModal"
import FlowWorkspace from "@/components/Workbench/FlowWorkspace"
import { StickyNoteComponent } from "@/components/Workbench/StickyNoteComponent"
import { DiskService } from "@/services/diskService"
import { calculateTextHeight, markdownToText } from "@/utils/markdownToText"

// Sticky Note Component (interface kept for future use)

function Workbench() {
  const { t } = useTranslation()
  const toast = useToast()
  const { user } = useAuth()
  const stageRef = useRef<Konva.Stage>(null)
  const forceRedrawTriggerRef = useRef(0) // 用于强制触发重绘

  // Zustand store - 优化：使用选择器订阅，避免不必要的重新渲染
  const stickyNotes = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.stickyNotes)
  const selectedTool = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.selectedTool)
  const selectedNoteId = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.selectedNoteId)
  const zoom = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.zoom)
  const stagePos = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.stagePos)
  const onlineUsers = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.onlineUsers)
  const currentUser = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.currentUser)
  const setSelectedTool = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.setSelectedTool)
  const setSelectedNoteId = useWorkbenchStore(
    (state) => state.setSelectedNoteId,
  )
  const setZoom = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.setZoom)
  const setStagePos = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.setStagePos)
  const addNote = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.addNote)
  const moveNote = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.moveNote)
  const togglePin = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.togglePin)
  const renameNote = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.renameNote)
  const deleteNote = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.deleteNote)
  const resetView = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.resetView)
  const initializeCollaboration = useWorkbenchStore(
    (state) => state.initializeCollaboration,
  )
  const currentCanvas = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.currentCanvas)
  const savedCanvases = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.savedCanvases)

  // Dynamic dimensions calculation
  const [windowSize, setWindowSize] = React.useState({
    width: window.innerWidth,
    height: window.innerHeight,
  })

  // Disk Result Modal state
  const [diskModalOpen, setDiskModalOpen] = React.useState(false)
  const [selectedDisk, setSelectedDisk] = React.useState<any>(null)
  const [selectedApplicationId, setSelectedApplicationId] =
    React.useState<number>(0)

  // Workspace mode state
  const [workspaceMode, setWorkspaceMode] = React.useState<"konva" | "flow">(
    "flow",
  )

  // 工作区模式切换处理
  const handleWorkspaceModeChange = React.useCallback(
    (newMode: "konva" | "flow") => {
      console.log(
        "🔄 Workspace mode changing from",
        workspaceMode,
        "to",
        newMode,
      )
      setWorkspaceMode(newMode)

      // 在模式切换时清理相关状态
      if (newMode === "flow") {
        // 切换到Flow模式时，清理Konva相关状态
        console.log("🔄 Switching to Flow mode - clearing Konva states")
      } else {
        // 切换到Konva模式时，清理Flow相关状态
        console.log("🔄 Switching to Konva mode - clearing Flow states")
      }
    },
    [workspaceMode],
  )

  // 方案C: 移除forceRender状态，减少不必要的组件重建
  // const [forceRender, setForceRender] = React.useState(0) // 已移除

  // Calculate stage dimensions for new layout
  const calculateStageDimensions = React.useCallback(() => {
    const leftSidebarWidth = 480 // Increased left sidebar width for better display
    const rightPanelWidth = 180 // Updated right panel width
    const rightMargin = 16 // Right panel margin (mr={4} = 16px)
    const headerHeight = 80 // Header height
    const toolbarHeight = 60 // Toolbar height (moved to top)

    const stageWidth =
      windowSize.width - leftSidebarWidth - rightPanelWidth - rightMargin
    const stageHeight = windowSize.height - headerHeight - toolbarHeight

    return { stageWidth, stageHeight }
  }, [windowSize])

  const { stageWidth, stageHeight } = calculateStageDimensions()

  // Canvas dimensions
  const canvasWidth = 2000
  const canvasHeight = 1500

  // Handle window resize
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleResize = () => {
      setWindowSize({
        width: window.innerWidth,
        height: window.innerHeight,
      })
    }

    window.addEventListener("resize", handleResize)
    return () => window.removeEventListener("resize", handleResize)
  }, [])

  // Handle window size changes - force stage re-render
  useEffect(() => {
    const stage = stageRef.current
    if (stage) {
      // Small delay to ensure the layout has updated
      setTimeout(() => {
        // Force a re-render to update stage dimensions
        stage.batchDraw()
      }, 100)
    }
  }, [stageWidth, stageHeight])

  // Initialize collaboration on component mount
  useEffect(() => {
    if (user && !currentUser) {
      const workbenchUser = createUser(
        user.full_name || user.email || "Anonymous User",
      )
      const defaultRoomId = "default-room" // In production, this should be dynamic
      initializeCollaboration(defaultRoomId, workbenchUser)
    }
  }, [user, currentUser, initializeCollaboration])

  // Helper function to force stage redraw - 方案B+C: 使用多种重绘方式并添加安全检查
  const forceStageRedraw = React.useCallback((reason: string) => {
    const stage = stageRef.current

    // 方案C: 安全检查 - 确保stage存在且有效
    if (stage && typeof stage.batchDraw === "function") {
      console.log(`🎨 Force redraw triggered: ${reason}`)

      try {
        // 方法1: 标准批量重绘
        if (typeof stage.batchDraw === "function") {
          stage.batchDraw()
          console.log(`🎨 batchDraw() completed: ${reason}`)
        }

        // 方法2: 立即重绘
        if (typeof stage.draw === "function") {
          stage.draw()
          console.log(`🎨 draw() completed: ${reason}`)
        }

        // 方法3: 强制清理和重建所有Layer
        if (typeof stage.getLayers === "function") {
          const layers = stage.getLayers() as any
          console.log(`🎨 Processing ${layers.length} layers: ${reason}`)

          layers.forEach((layer: any, index: number) => {
            // 方案C: 安全检查每个layer
            if (!layer) {
              console.warn(`🎨 Layer ${index} is null, skipping`)
              return
            }

            try {
              console.log(
                `🎨 Layer ${index} - children count:`,
                layer.children?.length,
              )

              if (typeof layer.batchDraw === "function") {
                layer.batchDraw()
              }
              if (typeof layer.draw === "function") {
                layer.draw()
              }
              console.log(`🎨 Layer ${index} redraw completed`)
            } catch (layerError) {
              console.error(`🎨 Layer ${index} redraw failed:`, layerError)
            }
          })
        }

        // 方法4: 强制Stage尺寸重新计算
        try {
          if (
            typeof stage.width === "function" &&
            typeof stage.height === "function"
          ) {
            stage.width(stage.width())
            stage.height(stage.height())
          }
        } catch (sizeError) {
          console.error(
            `🎨 Stage size recalculation failed: ${reason}`,
            sizeError,
          )
        }

        // 方法5: 触发完整重新渲染
        forceRedrawTriggerRef.current++

        console.log(`🎨 Stage redraw completed successfully: ${reason}`)
      } catch (error) {
        console.error(`🎨 Stage redraw failed: ${reason}`, error)
      }
    } else {
      console.warn(`🎨 Stage ref is null or invalid, cannot redraw: ${reason}`)
    }
  }, [])

  // Force Konva Stage to redraw when stickyNotes change - 优化版本：只在Konva模式下执行
  // This ensures canvas updates immediately when notes are added/deleted/updated
  useEffect(() => {
    // 只在Konva模式下执行Stage重绘逻辑
    if (workspaceMode !== "konva") {
      console.log(
        "🎨 Skipping Stage redraw - not in Konva mode, current mode:",
        workspaceMode,
      )
      return
    }

    const performStageRedraw = () => {
      const stage = stageRef.current
      if (stage) {
        console.log("🎨 stickyNotes changed, triggering Stage redraw")
        console.log("📊 Detailed stickyNotes change analysis:", {
          count: stickyNotes.length,
          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
          stageExists: !!stage,
          stageLayersCount: stage.getLayers().length,
          windowSize: { width: windowSize.width, height: windowSize.height },
          stageSize: { width: stageWidth, height: stageHeight },
          zoom: zoom,
          stagePos: stagePos,
        })

        // 方案D: 详细的删除过程调试
        if (stickyNotes.length === 0) {
          console.log("🗑️ All canvases deleted - Stage should be empty")
          const layers = stage.getLayers()
          console.log("🗑️ Stage layers count:", layers.length)
          ;(layers as any).forEach((layer: any, index: number) => {
            console.log(
              `🗑️ Layer ${index} children count:`,
              layer.children?.length,
            )
            if (layer.children && layer.children.length > 0) {
              console.log(
                `🗑️ Layer ${index} children:`,
                layer.children.map((child: any) => ({
                  name: child.name?.() || "unnamed",
                  className: child.className,
                  id: child.id?.() || "no-id",
                })),
              )
            }
          })
        }

        // 调试：检查stickyNotes数组的详细状态
        console.log(
          "📋 Current stickyNotes detailed states:",
          stickyNotes.map((n) => ({
            id: n.id,
            name: (n as any).name || "Unknown",
            isPinned: n.isPinned,
            hasIsPinnedProperty: n.hasOwnProperty("isPinned"),
            x: n.x,
            y: n.y,
            width: n.width,
            height: n.height,
          })),
        )

        // 方案D: 增强的Stage重绘，包含详细日志
        console.log("🎨 Starting enhanced Stage batchDraw...")
        const startTime = performance.now()

        try {
          stage.batchDraw()
          const endTime = performance.now()
          console.log(
            `🎨 Stage batchDraw completed in ${(endTime - startTime).toFixed(2)}ms`,
          )

          // 验证重绘后的状态
          setTimeout(() => {
            console.log("🎨 Post-redraw verification:")
            const layers = stage.getLayers()
            console.log("🎨 Stage layers count:", layers.length)
            ;(layers as any).forEach((layer: any, index: number) => {
              console.log(
                `🎨 Layer ${index} children count after redraw:`,
                layer.children?.length,
              )
            })
          }, 50)
        } catch (error) {
          console.error("🎨 Stage batchDraw failed:", error)
        }
      } else {
        console.warn("🎨 Stage ref is null, scheduling retry...")
        // 延迟重试机制：如果Stage ref为null，等待一小段时间后重试
        setTimeout(() => {
          const retryStage = stageRef.current
          if (retryStage) {
            console.log("🎨 Stage ref recovered, performing delayed redraw")
            performStageRedraw()
          } else {
            console.warn("🎨 Stage ref still null after retry, skipping redraw")
          }
        }, 100) // 100ms延迟重试
      }
    }

    // 使用requestAnimationFrame确保在下一个渲染周期执行
    requestAnimationFrame(performStageRedraw)
  }, [
    stickyNotes,
    windowSize.width,
    windowSize.height,
    stageWidth,
    stageHeight,
    zoom,
    stagePos,
    workspaceMode,
  ])

  // Calculate viewport center considering zoom and pan
  const getViewportCenter = React.useCallback(() => {
    const viewportCenterX = stageWidth / 2
    const viewportCenterY = stageHeight / 2

    // Convert viewport center to canvas coordinates
    const canvasCenterX = (viewportCenterX - stagePos.x) / zoom
    const canvasCenterY = (viewportCenterY - stagePos.y) / zoom

    return { x: canvasCenterX, y: canvasCenterY }
  }, [stageWidth, stageHeight, stagePos.x, stagePos.y, zoom])

  // Check if position overlaps with existing notes
  const findNonOverlappingPosition = React.useCallback(
    (baseX: number, baseY: number, width: number, height: number) => {
      let x = baseX - width / 2 // Center the canvas on the point
      let y = baseY - height / 2

      // Check for overlaps and adjust position if needed
      let attempts = 0
      const maxAttempts = 10

      while (attempts < maxAttempts) {
        const hasOverlap = stickyNotes.some((note) => {
          const noteRight = note.x + note.width
          const noteBottom = note.y + note.height
          const newRight = x + width
          const newBottom = y + height

          return !(
            x >= noteRight ||
            newRight <= note.x ||
            y >= noteBottom ||
            newBottom <= note.y
          )
        })

        if (!hasOverlap) break

        // If overlap found, try a slightly offset position
        x += 20
        y += 20
        attempts++
      }

      // Ensure the canvas stays within bounds
      x = Math.max(0, Math.min(x, canvasWidth - width))
      y = Math.max(0, Math.min(y, canvasHeight - height))

      return { x, y }
    },
    [stickyNotes, canvasWidth, canvasHeight],
  )

  // Handle adding new sticky note
  const handleAddNote = () => {
    const viewportCenter = getViewportCenter()
    const position = findNonOverlappingPosition(
      viewportCenter.x,
      viewportCenter.y,
      200,
      150,
    )

    const newNote = {
      x: position.x,
      y: position.y,
      width: 200,
      height: 150,
      content: t("workbench.newCanvas"),
      color: "#fef08a", // yellow-200
      createdBy: currentUser?.id || "anonymous",
    }

    // Generate unique ID for the new note
    const newNoteId = `note-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`

    addNote(newNote)

    // Auto-select the new canvas immediately
    setSelectedNoteId(newNoteId)

    toast({
      title: t("workbench.canvasCreated"),
      description: t("workbench.canvasCreatedDesc"),
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }

  // Handle note drag
  const handleNoteDragEnd = (id: string, x: number, y: number) => {
    moveNote(id, x, y)
  }

  // Listen for KBar events
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleKBarAddCanvas = () => {
      handleAddNote()
    }

    window.addEventListener("kbar-add-canvas", handleKBarAddCanvas)
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("kbar-add-canvas", handleKBarAddCanvas)
    }
  }, [handleAddNote])

  // Handle note selection
  const handleNoteSelect = (id: string) => {
    setSelectedNoteId(id)
  }

  // Handle pin toggle - 方案H: 增强同步渲染
  const handleTogglePin = (id: string) => {
    console.log("📌 handleTogglePin called for id:", id)

    // 方案H：多重同步渲染确保状态一致性
    flushSync(() => {
      console.log("📌 Executing togglePin in flushSync")
      togglePin(id)
    })

    // 立即强制重绘
    setTimeout(() => {
      console.log("📌 Triggering forceStageRedraw after togglePin")
      forceStageRedraw("togglePin")
    }, 30) // 缩短延迟

    // 额外的同步检查
    setTimeout(() => {
      flushSync(() => {
        console.log("📌 Additional sync check after togglePin")
      })
    }, 60)
  }

  // Handle canvas rename
  const handleCanvasRename = async (id: string, newName: string) => {
    if (newName.trim()) {
      // 更新本地stickyNote
      renameNote(id, newName.trim())

      // 检查这个画布是否关联了application，如果是，同步更新后端数据
      const note = stickyNotes.find((n) => n.id === id)
      if (note?.metadata?.applicationId) {
        try {
          console.log("🔄 Syncing canvas rename to backend application:", {
            canvasId: id,
            newName: newName.trim(),
            applicationId: note.metadata.applicationId,
          })

          // 更新后端的application数据
          await AppNodeService.updateAppNode(note.metadata.applicationId, {
            name: newName.trim(),
          })

          console.log("✅ Successfully synced canvas rename to backend")
        } catch (error) {
          console.error("❌ Failed to sync canvas rename to backend:", error)
          toast({
            title: "Sync Warning",
            description:
              "Canvas renamed locally, but failed to sync with backend",
            status: "warning",
            duration: 3000,
          })
        }
      }

      toast({
        title: "Canvas Renamed",
        description: `Canvas renamed to "${newName.trim()}"`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    }
  }

  // 方案P: 删除防抖机制
  const deleteTimeoutRef = React.useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null)

  // 方案P: Clear Canvas - 批量删除所有画布
  const handleClearAllCanvases = React.useCallback(() => {
    if (stickyNotes.length === 0) {
      toast({
        title: "没有画布需要清除",
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
      })
      return
    }

    if (
      window.confirm(
        `确定要删除所有 ${stickyNotes.length} 个画布吗？此操作不可撤销。`,
      )
    ) {
      console.log("🗑️ Starting clear all canvases process:", {
        totalCanvases: stickyNotes.length,
        canvasIds: stickyNotes.map((note) => note.id),
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      })

      // 批量删除所有canvas
      stickyNotes.forEach((note) => {
        deleteNote(note.id)
      })

      // 清除选中状态
      setSelectedNoteId(null)

      // 强制重绘
      setTimeout(() => {
        forceStageRedraw("clearAllCanvases")
      }, 100)

      toast({
        title: `已清除 ${stickyNotes.length} 个画布`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 3000,
      })

      console.log("🗑️ Clear all canvases completed")
    }
  }, [stickyNotes, deleteNote, toast, forceStageRedraw])

  // Handle canvas delete - 方案P: 增强删除防抖 + 强制重绘机制
  const handleCanvasDelete = async (id: string) => {
    // 防抖：如果已有删除操作在进行，则忽略
    if (deleteTimeoutRef.current) {
      console.log(
        "🚫 Delete operation already in progress, ignoring duplicate call for:",
        id,
      )
      return
    }

    // 由调用方（StickyNoteComponent）负责确认弹窗，这里不再进行二次确认
    // 设置防抖标记
    deleteTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
      deleteTimeoutRef.current = null
    }, 2000)
    console.log("🗑️ Starting canvas delete process - Enhanced Debug:", {
      targetId: id,
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      deleteInitiator: "handleCanvasDelete",
    })

    // 执行删除 - 方案H: 使用flushSync确保同步删除
    console.log("🗑️ Calling deleteNote function with flushSync...")
    flushSync(() => {
      deleteNote(id)

      // 清除选中状态
      if (selectedNoteId === id) {
        setSelectedNoteId(null)
        console.log("🗑️ Cleared selected note id")
      }
    })

    // 简化：不再强制清空所有 Layer，也不手动 destroyChildren
    // 让 React-Konva 根据 stickyNotes 变化自行重绘，避免误清空其他节点
    setTimeout(() => {
      console.log(
        "🗑️ After delete (simple mode) - stickyNotes count:",
        useWorkbenchStore.getState().stickyNotes?.length,
      )
      if (
        stageRef.current &&
        typeof stageRef.current.batchDraw === "function"
      ) {
        stageRef.current.batchDraw()
      }
    }, 16)

    // 轻量重绘提示
    forceStageRedraw("canvasDeleted")

    // 延迟验证删除结果
    setTimeout(() => {
      console.log(
        "🗑️ Final verification (simple) - stickyNotes count:",
        useWorkbenchStore.getState().stickyNotes?.length,
      )
    }, 120)
  }

  // Handle disk click
  const handleDiskClick = (disk: any, applicationId: number) => {
    console.log("🔍 Disk clicked:", disk, "Application ID:", applicationId)

    // Open disk result modal
    setSelectedDisk(disk)
    setSelectedApplicationId(applicationId)
    setDiskModalOpen(true)

    toast({
      title: `Opening ${disk.name}`,
      description: "Loading execution results...",
      status: "info",
      duration: 2000,
      isClosable: true,
    })
  }

  // Handle canvas selection from sidebar
  const handleCanvasSelect = React.useCallback((canvasId: string) => {
    setSelectedNoteId(canvasId)
    // TODO: Optionally pan to the selected canvas
  }, [])

  // 防重复调用的状态
  const lastDropCallRef = React.useRef<{ key: string; time: number } | null>(
    null,
  )

  // Handle application drop from sidebar
  const handleApplicationDrop = React.useCallback(
    async (application: any, dropPosition: { x: number; y: number }) => {
      console.log("🔥 handleApplicationDrop called:", {
        applicationId: application.id,
        applicationName: application.name,
        dropPosition,
        workspaceMode,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      })

      console.log("🔍 handleApplicationDrop - Current workbench state:", {
        stickyNotesCount: stickyNotes.length,
        currentCanvas: currentCanvas
          ? { id: currentCanvas.id, name: currentCanvas.name }
          : null,
        savedCanvasesCount: savedCanvases.length,
      })

      // 防重复调用机制：使用应用ID和位置作为唯一标识
      const dropKey = `${application.id}-${Math.round(dropPosition.x)}-${Math.round(dropPosition.y)}`
      const now = Date.now()

      // 检查是否在短时间内重复调用
      if (
        lastDropCallRef.current &&
        lastDropCallRef.current.key === dropKey &&
        now - lastDropCallRef.current.time < 1000
      ) {
        console.log("🚫 Duplicate drop call prevented:", dropKey)
        return
      }

      // 记录本次调用
      lastDropCallRef.current = { key: dropKey, time: now }

      // 在流程图模式下，需要调用FlowWorkspace的处理逻辑
      if (workspaceMode === "flow") {
        console.log("🎯 Flow mode detected, calling FlowWorkspace handler")
        // 在流程图模式下，也需要在SPACES区域创建画布记录
        const stickyNoteData = {
          id: `note-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`,
          name: application.name, // 使用application的名字作为画布名字
          content: "",
          x: dropPosition.x,
          y: dropPosition.y,
          width: 200,
          height: 100,
          color: "#ffffff",
          isPinned: false,
          createdBy: currentUser?.id || "unknown",
          createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          metadata: {
            type: "application",
            applicationId: application.id, // 关联application ID
            disks: application.children || [],
          },
        }

        console.log("📝 Creating stickyNote for flow mode:", stickyNoteData)
        console.log("🚀 Calling addNote for flow mode...")
        await addNote(stickyNoteData)
        console.log("✅ addNote completed for flow mode")

        // 这里需要调用FlowWorkspace的处理函数
        // 暂时先记录日志，后续会通过ref调用
        return
      }

      // 传统画布模式：检查是否已存在该application（不支持拖多次）
      const existingNote = stickyNotes.find(
        (note) =>
          note.metadata?.type === "application" &&
          note.metadata?.applicationId === application.id,
      )

      if (existingNote) {
        toast({
          title: "Application Already Added",
          description: `${application.name} is already on the canvas`,
          status: "info",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      try {
        // Get complete application information including children (disks)
        const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)

        // Filter disk children
        const disks =
          completeApp.children?.filter((child) => child.node_type === "disk") ||
          []

        // Fetch latest execution result for each disk
        const disksWithResults: any[] = []
        for (const disk of disks) {
          try {
            const executionResults = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(
              disk.id,
            )
            // Sort by created_at DESC and take the first one (latest)
            const latestResult =
              executionResults && executionResults.length > 0
                ? executionResults.sort(
                    (a: any, b: any) =>
                      new Date(b.created_at).getTime() -
                      new Date(a.created_at).getTime(),
                  )[0]
                : null

            disksWithResults.push({
              ...disk,
              latestResult: latestResult
                ? {
                    id: latestResult.id,
                    conclusion_detail: latestResult.conclusion_detail,
                    created_at: latestResult.created_at,
                    is_processed: latestResult.is_processed,
                  }
                : null,
            })
          } catch (error) {
            console.error(
              `Failed to fetch execution results for disk ${disk.id}:`,
              error,
            )
            disksWithResults.push({
              ...disk,
              latestResult: null,
            })
          }
        }

        // Create concise industrial-style content
        // Format: Application name, Author, then Disks with results
        const appName = completeApp.name
        const appAuthor = completeApp.owner
          ? `Created by: ${completeApp.owner.full_name || completeApp.owner.email}`
          : ""

        // Build content string (used for fallback rendering)
        // Actual rendering will be done in StickyNoteComponent with precise positioning
        const contentParts: string[] = []
        contentParts.push(appName)
        if (appAuthor) contentParts.push(appAuthor)
        contentParts.push("") // Empty line separator

        // Calculate dynamic height based on actual content
        // Base height: app name + author + divider + padding
        const baseHeight = 80

        // Per disk height calculation (assuming all expanded by default)
        let totalDiskHeight = 0
        if (disksWithResults.length > 0) {
          disksWithResults.forEach((disk) => {
            const headerHeight = 40 // Disk header (icon + name + status + history button)
            const spacingBetweenDisks = 12

            // Calculate result text height if available
            let bodyHeight = 0
            if (disk.latestResult?.conclusion_detail) {
              const resultText = markdownToText(
                disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail,
                0,
                60000,
              )
              const textWidth = 400 - 112 // Canvas width - padding - history button area
              bodyHeight =
                calculateTextHeight(resultText, 10, textWidth, 1.4) + 8 // +8 for padding
            }

            totalDiskHeight += headerHeight + bodyHeight + spacingBetweenDisks
          })
        } else {
          totalDiskHeight = 30 // "No disks attached" text
        }

        const calculatedHeight = Math.max(200, baseHeight + totalDiskHeight)

        // Build content string (used for fallback, actual rendering is in StickyNoteComponent)
        if (disksWithResults.length > 0) {
          disksWithResults.forEach((disk) => {
            contentParts.push(`• ${disk.name}`)
            if (disk.latestResult) {
              const resultDate = new Date(
                disk.latestResult.created_at,
              ).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
                year: "numeric",
                month: "2-digit",
                day: "2-digit",
                hour: "2-digit",
                minute: "2-digit",
              })
              const resultStatus = disk.latestResult.is_processed
                ? "Processed"
                : "Pending"
              // Full text, no line limit, with 60k char limit
              const resultText = markdownToText(
                disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail || "",
                0,
                60000,
              )
              contentParts.push(`  ${resultStatus} | ${resultDate}`)
              if (resultText) {
                contentParts.push(`  ${resultText}`)
              }
            } else {
              contentParts.push("  No execution results")
            }
            contentParts.push("") // Empty line between disks
          })
        } else {
          contentParts.push("No disks attached")
        }

        const fullContent = contentParts.join("\n")

        const newCanvas = {
          x: dropPosition.x,
          y: dropPosition.y,
          width: 420,
          height: calculatedHeight,
          content: fullContent,
          color: "#e0f2fe", // Light blue for application canvases
          createdBy: currentUser?.id || "anonymous",
          name: completeApp.name,
          // Store application data for future interactions
          metadata: {
            type: "application",
            applicationId: completeApp.id,
            applicationName: appName,
            applicationAuthor: appAuthor,
            disks: disksWithResults, // Store disks with results for refresh functionality
            diskResults: disksWithResults.map((d) => ({
              diskId: d.id,
              latestResult: d.latestResult,
            })), // Store results separately for easy refresh
          },
        }

        console.log("📝 About to call addNote with canvas:", {
          position: { x: dropPosition.x, y: dropPosition.y },
          applicationName: completeApp.name,
          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        })

        addNote(newCanvas)

        console.log("✅ addNote called successfully")

        toast({
          title: "Application Added",
          description: `${completeApp.name} with ${disks.length} disk(s) added to canvas`,
          status: "success",
          duration: 3000,
        })
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to load application details:", error)
        toast({
          title: "Error",
          description: "Failed to load application details",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
      }
    },
    [addNote, currentUser?.id, toast, workspaceMode, stickyNotes],
  ) // 添加stickyNotes依赖

  // Handle refresh application disk execution results
  const handleRefreshApplicationResults = React.useCallback(
    async (noteId: string) => {
      const note = stickyNotes.find((n) => n.id === noteId)
      if (
        !note ||
        note.metadata?.type !== "application" ||
        !note.metadata?.disks
      ) {
        return
      }

      try {
        const disks = note.metadata.disks
        const disksWithResults: any[] = []

        for (const disk of disks) {
          try {
            const executionResults = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(
              disk.id,
            )
            // Sort by created_at DESC and take the first one (latest)
            const latestResult =
              executionResults && executionResults.length > 0
                ? executionResults.sort(
                    (a: any, b: any) =>
                      new Date(b.created_at).getTime() -
                      new Date(a.created_at).getTime(),
                  )[0]
                : null

            disksWithResults.push({
              ...disk,
              latestResult: latestResult
                ? {
                    id: latestResult.id,
                    conclusion_detail: latestResult.conclusion_detail,
                    created_at: latestResult.created_at,
                    is_processed: latestResult.is_processed,
                  }
                : null,
            })
          } catch (error) {
            console.error(
              `Failed to fetch execution results for disk ${disk.id}:`,
              error,
            )
            disksWithResults.push({
              ...disk,
              latestResult: null,
            })
          }
        }

        // Get complete application information
        if (!note.metadata.applicationId) {
          console.error("Application ID not found in note metadata")
          return
        }
        const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(
          note.metadata.applicationId,
        )

        // Create concise industrial-style content (same format as handleApplicationDrop)
        const appName = completeApp.name
        const appAuthor = completeApp.owner
          ? `Created by: ${completeApp.owner.full_name || completeApp.owner.email}`
          : ""

        // Calculate dynamic height based on actual content (assuming all disks expanded)
        const baseHeight = 80
        let totalDiskHeight = 0

        if (disksWithResults.length > 0) {
          disksWithResults.forEach((disk) => {
            const headerHeight = 40
            const spacingBetweenDisks = 12

            let bodyHeight = 0
            if (disk.latestResult?.conclusion_detail) {
              const resultText = markdownToText(
                disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail,
                0,
                60000,
              )
              const textWidth = 400 - 112
              bodyHeight =
                calculateTextHeight(resultText, 10, textWidth, 1.4) + 8
            }

            totalDiskHeight += headerHeight + bodyHeight + spacingBetweenDisks
          })
        } else {
          totalDiskHeight = 30
        }

        const calculatedHeight = Math.max(200, baseHeight + totalDiskHeight)

        // Build content string
        const contentParts: string[] = []
        contentParts.push(appName)
        if (appAuthor) contentParts.push(appAuthor)
        contentParts.push("") // Empty line separator

        if (disksWithResults.length > 0) {
          disksWithResults.forEach((disk) => {
            contentParts.push(`• ${disk.name}`)
            if (disk.latestResult) {
              const resultDate = new Date(
                disk.latestResult.created_at,
              ).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
                year: "numeric",
                month: "2-digit",
                day: "2-digit",
                hour: "2-digit",
                minute: "2-digit",
              })
              const resultStatus = disk.latestResult.is_processed
                ? "Processed"
                : "Pending"
              // Full text, no line limit, with 60k char limit
              const resultText = markdownToText(
                disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail || "",
                0,
                60000,
              )
              contentParts.push(`  ${resultStatus} | ${resultDate}`)
              if (resultText) {
                contentParts.push(`  ${resultText}`)
              }
            } else {
              contentParts.push("  No execution results")
            }
            contentParts.push("") // Empty line between disks
          })
        } else {
          contentParts.push("No disks attached")
        }

        const fullContent = contentParts.join("\n")

        // Update note content and metadata
        const updateNote = useWorkbenchStore.getState().updateNote
        if (updateNote) {
          updateNote(noteId, {
            content: fullContent,
            height: calculatedHeight,
            metadata: {
              ...note.metadata,
              applicationName: appName,
              applicationAuthor: appAuthor,
              disks: disksWithResults,
              diskResults: disksWithResults.map((d) => ({
                diskId: d.id,
                latestResult: d.latestResult,
              })),
            },
          })

          toast({
            title: "Results Refreshed",
            description: `Disk execution results updated for ${completeApp.name}`,
            status: "success",
            duration: 2000,
          })
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to refresh application results:", error)
        toast({
          title: "Error",
          description: "Failed to refresh disk execution results",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
      }
    },
    [stickyNotes, toast],
  )

  // Handle stage click (deselect and close menus)
  const handleStageClick = (e: any) => {
    // Check if clicked on empty area
    if (e.target === e.target.getStage()) {
      setSelectedNoteId(null)
      // Close all open menus by triggering a re-render
      // This is a simple way to close menus when clicking outside
    }
  }

  // Handle zoom
  const handleZoom = (direction: "in" | "out") => {
    const newZoom = direction === "in" ? zoom * 1.2 : zoom / 1.2
    setZoom(Math.max(0.1, Math.min(3, newZoom)))
  }

  // Handle canvas reset
  const handleResetView = () => {
    resetView()
  }

  // Handle wheel zoom
  const handleWheel = (e: any) => {
    e.evt.preventDefault()

    const scaleBy = 1.02
    const stage = e.target.getStage()
    const pointer = stage.getPointerPosition()
    const mousePointTo = {
      x: (pointer.x - stage.x()) / stage.scaleX(),
      y: (pointer.y - stage.y()) / stage.scaleY(),
    }

    const direction = e.evt.deltaY > 0 ? -1 : 1
    const newScale = direction > 0 ? zoom * scaleBy : zoom / scaleBy
    const finalScale = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(3, newScale))

    setZoom(finalScale)

    const newPos = {
      x: pointer.x - mousePointTo.x * finalScale,
      y: pointer.y - mousePointTo.y * finalScale,
    }
    setStagePos(newPos)
  }

  // 方案L: 将drop逻辑移到内部组件，确保在DndProvider上下文内
  return (
    <WorkbenchKBarProvider>
      <DndProvider backend={HTML5Backend}>
        <WorkbenchContent
          stageRef={stageRef}
          stagePos={stagePos}
          zoom={zoom}
          handleApplicationDrop={handleApplicationDrop}
          handleAddNote={handleAddNote}
          handleCanvasSelect={handleCanvasSelect}
          handleNoteSelect={handleNoteSelect}
          handleTogglePin={handleTogglePin}
          handleCanvasRename={handleCanvasRename}
          handleCanvasDelete={handleCanvasDelete}
          handleClearAllCanvases={handleClearAllCanvases}
          handleNoteDragEnd={handleNoteDragEnd}
          handleDiskClick={handleDiskClick}
          handleWheel={handleWheel}
          handleStageClick={handleStageClick}
          handleResetView={handleResetView}
          handleRefreshApplicationResults={handleRefreshApplicationResults}
          selectedTool={selectedTool}
          setSelectedTool={setSelectedTool}
          selectedNoteId={selectedNoteId}
          stickyNotes={stickyNotes}
          stageWidth={stageWidth}
          stageHeight={stageHeight}
          canvasWidth={canvasWidth}
          canvasHeight={canvasHeight}
          setStagePos={setStagePos}
          handleZoom={handleZoom}
          onlineUsers={onlineUsers}
          diskModalOpen={diskModalOpen}
          setDiskModalOpen={setDiskModalOpen}
          selectedDisk={selectedDisk}
          selectedApplicationId={selectedApplicationId}
          workspaceMode={workspaceMode}
          setWorkspaceMode={handleWorkspaceModeChange}
        />
      </DndProvider>
    </WorkbenchKBarProvider>
  )
}

// 方案L: WorkbenchContent组件 - 在DndProvider内部处理drop逻辑
interface WorkbenchContentProps {
  stageRef: React.RefObject<Konva.Stage>
  stagePos: { x: number; y: number }
  zoom: number
  handleApplicationDrop: (
    application: any,
    position: { x: number; y: number },
  ) => void
  handleAddNote: () => void
  handleCanvasSelect: (id: string) => void
  handleNoteSelect: (id: string) => void
  handleTogglePin: (id: string) => void
  handleCanvasRename: (id: string, newName: string) => void
  handleCanvasDelete: (id: string) => void
  handleClearAllCanvases: () => void
  handleNoteDragEnd: (id: string, x: number, y: number) => void
  handleDiskClick: (disk: any, applicationId: number) => void
  handleWheel: (e: any) => void
  handleStageClick: (e: any) => void
  handleResetView: () => void
  selectedTool: string
  setSelectedTool: (tool: "note" | "select" | "move") => void
  selectedNoteId: string | null
  stickyNotes: any[]
  stageWidth: number
  stageHeight: number
  canvasWidth: number
  canvasHeight: number
  setStagePos: (pos: { x: number; y: number }) => void
  handleZoom: (direction: "in" | "out") => void
  diskModalOpen: boolean
  setDiskModalOpen: (open: boolean) => void
  selectedDisk: any
  selectedApplicationId: number
  workspaceMode: "konva" | "flow"
  setWorkspaceMode: (mode: "konva" | "flow") => void
  handleRefreshApplicationResults: (noteId: string) => void
}

function WorkbenchContent({
  stageRef,
  stagePos,
  zoom,
  handleApplicationDrop,
  handleAddNote,
  handleCanvasSelect,
  handleNoteSelect,
  handleTogglePin,
  handleCanvasRename,
  handleCanvasDelete,
  handleClearAllCanvases,
  handleNoteDragEnd,
  handleDiskClick,
  handleWheel,
  handleStageClick,
  handleResetView,
  selectedTool,
  setSelectedTool,
  selectedNoteId,
  stickyNotes,
  stageWidth,
  stageHeight,
  canvasWidth,
  canvasHeight,
  setStagePos,
  handleZoom,
  diskModalOpen,
  setDiskModalOpen,
  selectedDisk,
  selectedApplicationId,
  workspaceMode,
  setWorkspaceMode,
  handleRefreshApplicationResults,
}: WorkbenchContentProps) {
  const { t } = useTranslation()
  const {
    isOpen: isQuickActionsOpen,
    onOpen: onQuickActionsOpen,
    onClose: onQuickActionsClose,
  } = useDisclosure()

  // FlowWorkspace的ref
  const flowWorkspaceRef = React.useRef<any>(null)

  // 处理流程图模式的拖拽
  const handleFlowApplicationDrop = React.useCallback(
    async (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => {
      console.log("🎯 handleFlowApplicationDrop called:", {
        applicationId: application.id,
        applicationName: application.name,
        position,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      })

      try {
        // 获取完整的application信息，包括children (disks)
        const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)
        console.log("🔍 Complete application data structure:", {
          applicationData: completeApp,
          hasChildren: !!completeApp?.children,
          childrenCount: completeApp?.children?.length || 0,
          children: completeApp?.children,
          childrenTypes:
            completeApp?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
              id: child.id,
              name: child.name,
              node_type: child.node_type,
              hasChildren: !!child.children,
              childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0,
            })) || [],
          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        })

        // 检查是否有children
        if (!completeApp?.children || completeApp.children.length === 0) {
          console.log("⚠️ No children found for application:", completeApp.name)
          return
        }

        // 过滤出disk类型的children
        const disks = completeApp.children.filter(
          (child: any) => child.node_type === "disk",
        )
        console.log("💾 Filtered disks:", {
          totalDisks: disks.length,
          disks: disks.map((disk: any) => ({
            id: disk.id,
            name: disk.name,
            node_type: disk.node_type,
          })),
        })

        if (disks.length === 0) {
          console.log(
            "⚠️ No disk children found for application:",
            completeApp.name,
          )
          return
        }

        // 调用FlowWorkspace的处理函数
        console.log("✅ Calling FlowWorkspace handleApplicationDrop:", {
          application: completeApp,
          position,
          disks,
        })

        // 通过ref调用FlowWorkspace的handleApplicationDrop函数
        if (flowWorkspaceRef.current?.handleApplicationDrop) {
          flowWorkspaceRef.current.handleApplicationDrop(completeApp, position)
        } else {
          console.warn("⚠️ FlowWorkspace ref not available")
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("❌ Failed to handle flow application drop:", error)
      }
    },
    [],
  )

  // 方案L: 在DndProvider内部调用useDrop，根据workspaceMode处理拖拽
  const [{ isOver }, drop] = useDrop(
    () => ({
      accept: "application",
      drop: (item: { application: any }, monitor) => {
        console.log("🎯 WorkbenchContent drop event triggered:", {
          applicationId: item.application.id,
          applicationName: item.application.name,
          workspaceMode,
          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        })

        const clientOffset = monitor.getClientOffset()
        if (clientOffset) {
          if (workspaceMode === "flow") {
            // 流程图模式：直接调用FlowWorkspace的处理逻辑
            const flowBounds = document
              .querySelector(".react-flow")
              ?.getBoundingClientRect()
            if (flowBounds) {
              const position = {
                x: (clientOffset.x - flowBounds.left - 100) / 1,
                y: (clientOffset.y - flowBounds.top - 100) / 1,
              }

              console.log("📍 Flow mode - calculated drop position:", position)
              // 直接调用FlowWorkspace的处理函数，不通过handleApplicationDrop
              handleFlowApplicationDrop(item.application, position)
            }
          } else {
            // Konva模式：使用原有的拖拽处理
            const canvasRect = stageRef.current
              ?.container()
              .getBoundingClientRect()
            if (canvasRect) {
              const x = (clientOffset.x - canvasRect.left - stagePos.x) / zoom
              const y = (clientOffset.y - canvasRect.top - stagePos.y) / zoom

              console.log("📍 Konva mode - calculated drop position:", { x, y })
              handleApplicationDrop(item.application, { x, y })
            }
          }
        }
      },
      collect: (monitor) => ({
        isOver: monitor.isOver(),
      }),
    }),
    [
      handleApplicationDrop,
      stageRef,
      stagePos.x,
      stagePos.y,
      zoom,
      workspaceMode,
    ],
  )

  return (
    <div
      style={{
        maxWidth: "100vw",
        margin: "0 auto",
        padding: 0,
        height: "100vh",
        overflow: "hidden",
        position: "relative",
      }}
    >
      <div
        style={{
          height: "100vh",
          display: "flex",
          gap: 0,
        }}
      >
        {/* New Left Sidebar */}
        <WorkbenchSidebar onCanvasSelect={handleCanvasSelect} />

        {/* Main Content Area */}
        <div
          style={{
            flex: 1,
            display: "flex",
            flexDirection: "column",
          }}
        >
          {/* Top Toolbar - moved from left side */}
          <div
            style={{
              height: "60px",
              backgroundColor: "white",
              borderBottom: "1px solid #e2e8f0",
              paddingLeft: "1rem",
              paddingRight: "1rem",
              display: "flex",
              alignItems: "center",
              justifyContent: "center",
              gap: "1rem",
            }}
          >
             <Tooltip label={t("workbench.addCanvas")} placement="bottom">
               <IconButton
                 aria-label={t("workbench.addCanvas")}
                 icon={<FiPlus />}
                 colorScheme={selectedTool === "note" ? "red" : "gray"}
                 variant={selectedTool === "note" ? "solid" : "ghost"}
                 onClick={() => {
                   setSelectedTool("note")
                   handleAddNote()
                 }}
               />
             </Tooltip>

             <Tooltip label={t("workbench.moveTool")} placement="bottom">
               <IconButton
                 aria-label={t("workbench.moveTool")}
                 icon={<FiMove />}
                 colorScheme={selectedTool === "move" ? "red" : "gray"}
                 variant={selectedTool === "move" ? "solid" : "ghost"}
                 onClick={() => setSelectedTool("move")}
               />
             </Tooltip>

            <Box w="1px" h="20px" bg="gray.200" />

            <Tooltip label={t("workbench.zoomIn")} placement="bottom">
              <IconButton
                aria-label={t("workbench.zoomIn")}
                icon={<FiZoomIn />}
                variant="ghost"
                onClick={() => handleZoom("in")}
              />
            </Tooltip>

            <Tooltip label={t("workbench.zoomOut")} placement="bottom">
              <IconButton
                aria-label={t("workbench.zoomOut")}
                icon={<FiZoomOut />}
                variant="ghost"
                onClick={() => handleZoom("out")}
              />
            </Tooltip>

            <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" minW="50px" textAlign="center">
              {Math.round(zoom * 100)}%
            </Text>

            <Box w="1px" h="20px" bg="gray.200" />

            <Tooltip label={t("workbench.settings")} placement="bottom">
              <IconButton
                aria-label={t("workbench.settings")}
                icon={<FiSettings />}
                variant="ghost"
              />
            </Tooltip>

            <Tooltip label={t("workbench.export")} placement="bottom">
              <IconButton
                aria-label={t("workbench.export")}
                icon={<FiDownload />}
                variant="ghost"
              />
            </Tooltip>
          </div>

          {/* Main Canvas Area - 方案J: 使用原生div避免Chakra UI冲突 */}
          <div
            ref={drop}
            style={{
              flex: 1,
              position: "relative",
              backgroundColor: "#f8f9fa",
              overflow: "hidden",
              cursor: selectedTool === "move" ? "grab" : "default",
              backgroundImage:
                workspaceMode === "konva"
                  ? "radial-gradient(circle, #e2e8f0 1px, transparent 1px)"
                  : "none",
              backgroundSize: "20px 20px",
              border: isOver ? "2px dashed #3182ce" : "none",
              opacity: isOver ? 0.8 : 1,
            }}
          >
            {/* Conditional Workspace Rendering */}
            {workspaceMode === "flow" ? (
              <FlowWorkspace
                ref={flowWorkspaceRef}
                onApplicationDrop={handleApplicationDrop}
                handleApplicationDrop={handleFlowApplicationDrop}
              />
            ) : (
              <>
                {/* Konva Stage - 方案M: 添加错误边界保护 */}
                <KonvaErrorBoundary>
                  <Stage
                    width={stageWidth}
                    height={stageHeight}
                    scaleX={zoom}
                    scaleY={zoom}
                    x={stagePos.x}
                    y={stagePos.y}
                    ref={stageRef}
                    onWheel={handleWheel}
                    onClick={handleStageClick}
                    onTap={handleStageClick}
                    draggable={selectedTool === "move"}
                    onDragEnd={(e: any) => {
                      setStagePos({
                        x: e.target.x(),
                        y: e.target.y(),
                      })
                    }}
                    style={{
                      transition: "width 0.3s ease, height 0.3s ease",
                    }}
                  >
                    <KonvaErrorBoundary
                      fallback={
                        <Layer key="fallback-layer">
                          <Rect
                            x={0}
                            y={0}
                            width={100}
                            height={50}
                            fill="red"
                          />
                        </Layer>
                      }
                    >
                      <Layer key="main-layer">
                        <React.Fragment>
                          <Rect
                            key="test-rect"
                            x={50}
                            y={50}
                            width={100}
                            height={100}
                            fill="#e2e8f0"
                          />
                        </React.Fragment>
                      </Layer>
                    </KonvaErrorBoundary>
                    <KonvaErrorBoundary
                      fallback={
                        <Layer key="fallback-debug">
                          <Rect
                            x={0}
                            y={0}
                            width={100}
                            height={50}
                            fill="orange"
                          />
                        </Layer>
                      }
                    >
                      <Layer key="debug-layer">
                        <React.Fragment>
                          <KonvaText
                            key="debug-text"
                            x={200}
                            y={200}
                            text="Debug Layer Working"
                            fontSize={16}
                            fontFamily="Arial"
                            fill="#374151"
                          />
                        </React.Fragment>
                      </Layer>
                    </KonvaErrorBoundary>
                    <KonvaErrorBoundary
                      fallback={
                        <Layer key="fallback-canvas">
                          <Rect
                            x={0}
                            y={0}
                            width={200}
                            height={100}
                            fill="red"
                          />
                        </Layer>
                      }
                    >
                      <Layer key="canvas-layer">
                        <React.Fragment>
                          {stickyNotes &&
                            Array.isArray(stickyNotes) &&
                            stickyNotes.length > 0 &&
                            stickyNotes
                              .filter(
                                (note) =>
                                  note?.id && typeof note.id === "string",
                              )
                              .map((note) => {
                                console.log(
                                  "🎨 Rendering canvas note with StickyNoteComponent:",
                                  note.id,
                                  note.name,
                                )
                                try {
                                  return (
                                    <StickyNoteComponent
                                      key={`canvas-${note.id}`}
                                      note={note}
                                      onDragEnd={handleNoteDragEnd}
                                      onSelect={handleNoteSelect}
                                      onTogglePin={handleTogglePin}
                                      onRename={handleCanvasRename}
                                      onDelete={handleCanvasDelete}
                                      onDiskClick={handleDiskClick}
                                      onRefresh={
                                        handleRefreshApplicationResults
                                      }
                                      isSelected={selectedNoteId === note.id}
                                    />
                                  )
                                } catch (error) {
                                  console.error(
                                    "🚨 Error rendering StickyNoteComponent:",
                                    error,
                                    note,
                                  )
                                  return (
                                    <Rect
                                      key={`error-${note.id}`}
                                      x={note.x || 100}
                                      y={note.y || 100}
                                      width={200}
                                      height={150}
                                      fill="red"
                                      stroke="darkred"
                                      strokeWidth={2}
                                    />
                                  )
                                }
                              })}
                        </React.Fragment>
                      </Layer>
                    </KonvaErrorBoundary>
                  </Stage>
                </KonvaErrorBoundary>
              </>
            )}

            {/* Canvas Controls */}
            <div
              style={{
                position: "absolute",
                bottom: "1rem",
                left: "1rem",
                backgroundColor: "white",
                padding: "0.5rem",
                borderRadius: "0.375rem",
                boxShadow: "0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
                display: "flex",
                alignItems: "center",
                gap: "0.5rem",
              }}
            >
              <Button size="sm" onClick={handleResetView}>
                {t("workbench.resetView")}
              </Button>
              <span
                style={{
                  fontSize: "0.875rem",
                  color: "#718096",
                }}
              >
                {Math.round(zoom * 100)}%
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Floating Quick Actions Button */}
      <div
        style={{
          position: "absolute",
          top: "120px",
          right: "24px",
          zIndex: 20,
        }}
      >
        <Tooltip label={t("workbench.quickActions")} placement="left">
          <IconButton
            aria-label={t("workbench.quickActions")}
            icon={<FiPlus />}
            colorScheme="purple"
            size="lg"
            borderRadius="full"
            boxShadow="lg"
            onClick={onQuickActionsOpen}
          />
        </Tooltip>
      </div>

      {/* Disk Result Modal */}
      <DiskResultModal
        isOpen={diskModalOpen}
        onClose={() => setDiskModalOpen(false)}
        disk={selectedDisk}
        applicationId={selectedApplicationId}
      />
      {/* Quick Actions Drawer */}
      <Drawer
        placement="right"
        isOpen={isQuickActionsOpen}
        onClose={onQuickActionsClose}
        size="xs"
      >
        <DrawerOverlay />
        <DrawerContent>
          <DrawerCloseButton />
          <DrawerHeader borderBottomWidth="1px">
            {t("workbench.quickActions")}
          </DrawerHeader>
          <DrawerBody>
            <VStack spacing={4} align="stretch" mt={4}>
              <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">
                {t("workbench.workflowTools")}
              </Text>

              <HStack spacing={2}>
                <Button
                  size="sm"
                  variant={workspaceMode === "konva" ? "solid" : "outline"}
                  colorScheme="purple"
                  onClick={() => setWorkspaceMode("konva")}
                  flex={1}
                >
                  {t("workbench.standardCanvas")}
                </Button>
                <Button
                  size="sm"
                  variant={workspaceMode === "flow" ? "solid" : "outline"}
                  colorScheme="purple"
                  onClick={() => setWorkspaceMode("flow")}
                  flex={1}
                >
                  {t("workbench.flowDiagram")}
                </Button>
              </HStack>

              <Button size="sm" leftIcon={<FiPlus />} onClick={handleAddNote}>
                {t("workbench.addNode")}
              </Button>
              <Button
                size="sm"
                variant="outline"
                onClick={handleClearAllCanvases}
              >
                {t("workbench.clearNodes")}
              </Button>
              <Button size="sm" variant="outline" leftIcon={<FiDownload />}>
                {t("workbench.exportWorkflow")}
              </Button>
            </VStack>
          </DrawerBody>
        </DrawerContent>
      </Drawer>
    </div>
  )
}

export const Route = createFileRoute("/_layout/workbench")({
  component: Workbench,
})

```

```typescriptreact
import KonvaErrorBoundary from "@/components/ErrorBoundary/KonvaErrorBoundary"
import WorkbenchKBarProvider from "@/components/Workbench/KBarProvider"
import WorkbenchSidebar from "@/components/Workbench/WorkbenchSidebar"
import useAuth from "@/hooks/useAuth"
import AppNodeService from "@/services/appNodeService"
import { createUser, useWorkbenchStore } from "@/stores/workbenchStore"
import {
  Box,
  Button,
  Drawer,
  DrawerBody,
  DrawerCloseButton,
  DrawerContent,
  DrawerHeader,
  DrawerOverlay,
  HStack,
  IconButton,
  Text,
  Tooltip,
  VStack,
  useDisclosure,
  useToast,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { createFileRoute } from "@tanstack/react-router"
import type Konva from "konva"
import { useEffect, useRef } from "react"
import React from "react"
import { DndProvider } from "react-dnd"
import { useDrop } from "react-dnd"
import { HTML5Backend } from "react-dnd-html5-backend"
import { flushSync } from "react-dom"
import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"
import {
  FiDownload,
  FiMove,
  FiPlus,
  FiSettings,
  FiZoomIn,
  FiZoomOut,
} from "react-icons/fi"
import { Text as KonvaText, Layer, Rect, Stage } from "react-konva"

import DiskResultModal from "@/components/Workbench/DiskResultModal"
import FlowWorkspace from "@/components/Workbench/FlowWorkspace"
import { StickyNoteComponent } from "@/components/Workbench/StickyNoteComponent"
import { DiskService } from "@/services/diskService"
import { calculateTextHeight, markdownToText } from "@/utils/markdownToText"

// Sticky Note Component (interface kept for future use)

function Workbench() {
  const { t } = useTranslation()
  const toast = useToast()
  const { user } = useAuth()
  const stageRef = useRef<Konva.Stage>(null)
  const forceRedrawTriggerRef = useRef(0) // 用于强制触发重绘

  // Zustand store - 优化：使用选择器订阅，避免不必要的重新渲染
  const stickyNotes = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.stickyNotes)
  const selectedTool = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.selectedTool)
  const selectedNoteId = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.selectedNoteId)
  const zoom = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.zoom)
  const stagePos = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.stagePos)
  const onlineUsers = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.onlineUsers)
  const currentUser = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.currentUser)
  const setSelectedTool = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.setSelectedTool)
  const setSelectedNoteId = useWorkbenchStore(
    (state) => state.setSelectedNoteId,
  )
  const setZoom = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.setZoom)
  const setStagePos = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.setStagePos)
  const addNote = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.addNote)
  const moveNote = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.moveNote)
  const togglePin = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.togglePin)
  const renameNote = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.renameNote)
  const deleteNote = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.deleteNote)
  const resetView = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.resetView)
  const initializeCollaboration = useWorkbenchStore(
    (state) => state.initializeCollaboration,
  )
  const currentCanvas = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.currentCanvas)
  const savedCanvases = useWorkbenchStore((state) => state.savedCanvases)

  // Dynamic dimensions calculation
  const [windowSize, setWindowSize] = React.useState({
    width: window.innerWidth,
    height: window.innerHeight,
  })

  // Disk Result Modal state
  const [diskModalOpen, setDiskModalOpen] = React.useState(false)
  const [selectedDisk, setSelectedDisk] = React.useState<any>(null)
  const [selectedApplicationId, setSelectedApplicationId] =
    React.useState<number>(0)

  // Workspace mode state
  const [workspaceMode, setWorkspaceMode] = React.useState<"konva" | "flow">(
    "flow",
  )

  // 工作区模式切换处理
  const handleWorkspaceModeChange = React.useCallback(
    (newMode: "konva" | "flow") => {
      console.log(
        "🔄 Workspace mode changing from",
        workspaceMode,
        "to",
        newMode,
      )
      setWorkspaceMode(newMode)

      // 在模式切换时清理相关状态
      if (newMode === "flow") {
        // 切换到Flow模式时，清理Konva相关状态
        console.log("🔄 Switching to Flow mode - clearing Konva states")
      } else {
        // 切换到Konva模式时，清理Flow相关状态
        console.log("🔄 Switching to Konva mode - clearing Flow states")
      }
    },
    [workspaceMode],
  )

  // 方案C: 移除forceRender状态，减少不必要的组件重建
  // const [forceRender, setForceRender] = React.useState(0) // 已移除

  // Calculate stage dimensions for new layout
  const calculateStageDimensions = React.useCallback(() => {
    const leftSidebarWidth = 480 // Increased left sidebar width for better display
    const rightPanelWidth = 180 // Updated right panel width
    const rightMargin = 16 // Right panel margin (mr={4} = 16px)
    const headerHeight = 80 // Header height
    const toolbarHeight = 60 // Toolbar height (moved to top)

    const stageWidth =
      windowSize.width - leftSidebarWidth - rightPanelWidth - rightMargin
    const stageHeight = windowSize.height - headerHeight - toolbarHeight

    return { stageWidth, stageHeight }
  }, [windowSize])

  const { stageWidth, stageHeight } = calculateStageDimensions()

  // Canvas dimensions
  const canvasWidth = 2000
  const canvasHeight = 1500

  // Handle window resize
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleResize = () => {
      setWindowSize({
        width: window.innerWidth,
        height: window.innerHeight,
      })
    }

    window.addEventListener("resize", handleResize)
    return () => window.removeEventListener("resize", handleResize)
  }, [])

  // Handle window size changes - force stage re-render
  useEffect(() => {
    const stage = stageRef.current
    if (stage) {
      // Small delay to ensure the layout has updated
      setTimeout(() => {
        // Force a re-render to update stage dimensions
        stage.batchDraw()
      }, 100)
    }
  }, [stageWidth, stageHeight])

  // Initialize collaboration on component mount
  useEffect(() => {
    if (user && !currentUser) {
      const workbenchUser = createUser(
        user.full_name || user.email || "Anonymous User",
      )
      const defaultRoomId = "default-room" // In production, this should be dynamic
      initializeCollaboration(defaultRoomId, workbenchUser)
    }
  }, [user, currentUser, initializeCollaboration])

  // Helper function to force stage redraw - 方案B+C: 使用多种重绘方式并添加安全检查
  const forceStageRedraw = React.useCallback((reason: string) => {
    const stage = stageRef.current

    // 方案C: 安全检查 - 确保stage存在且有效
    if (stage && typeof stage.batchDraw === "function") {
      console.log(`🎨 Force redraw triggered: ${reason}`)

      try {
        // 方法1: 标准批量重绘
        if (typeof stage.batchDraw === "function") {
