          console.log(`💾 Creating disk node ${index + 1}/${disks.length}:`, {
            diskId: disk.id,
            diskName: disk.name,
            diskType: disk.node_type,
            diskData: disk,
            applicationNodeId: newNodeId,
            index
          })
          
          // Position disk nodes to the right and below the application node
          const diskPosition = {
            x: nodePosition.x + 400 + (index % 2) * 200, // Stagger horizontally
            y: nodePosition.y + 150 + Math.floor(index / 2) * 200 // Stack vertically every 2 disks
          }
          console.log(`📍 Disk position calculated:`, diskPosition)
          addDiskNode(disk, newNodeId, index, diskPosition)
        })
      } else {
        console.log('⚠️ No disk nodes found in children array')
        console.log('🔍 All children types:', applicationData.children.map((child: any) => ({
          id: child.id,
          name: child.name,
          node_type: child.node_type
        })))
      }
    } else {
      console.log('⚠️ No children found in application data or children array is empty')
      console.log('🔍 Application data keys:', Object.keys(applicationData || {}))
    }

    const diskCount = applicationData?.children?.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === 'disk')?.length || 0
    toast({
      title: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreated"),
      description: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreatedDesc", {
        name: applicationData?.name || newNode.data.name,
        count: diskCount
      }),
      status: "success",
      duration: 3000,
    })

    return newNodeId
  }, [nodeIdCounter, toast, t])

  // Add a new disk node with enhanced data handling
  const addDiskNode = useCallback((diskData: any, parentNodeId?: string, index: number = 0, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    const newNodeId = `disk-${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`
    
    console.log(`💾 addDiskNode called with:`, {
      diskData,
      parentNodeId,
      index,
      position,
      newNodeId,
      nodeIdCounter
    })
    
    // Use provided position or generate default position
    const nodePosition = position || { 
      x: Math.random() * 300 + 400, 
      y: Math.random() * 200 + 200 + (index * 150)
    }
    
    const newNode: Node = {
      id: newNodeId,
      type: 'disk',
      position: nodePosition,
      data: {
        id: newNodeId,
        diskId: diskData?.id || Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000),
        name: diskData?.name || `Disk ${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`,
        description: diskData?.description || 'New disk node',
        applicationId: diskData?.applicationId || (parentNodeId ? parseInt(parentNodeId.replace('app-', '')) : undefined),
        isPinned: false,
        onRename: handleNodeRename,
        onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
        onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
        onExpand: handleNodeExpand,
      },
    }

    console.log(`💾 Creating disk node with data:`, {
      newNodeId,
      nodeType: 'disk',
      nodePosition,
      nodeData: newNode.data,
      diskId: diskData?.id,
      diskName: diskData?.name
    })
    
    setNodes((nds) => {
      const newNodes = nds.concat(newNode)
      console.log(`💾 Total nodes after adding disk: ${newNodes.length}`)
      return newNodes
    })

    // Auto-connect to parent application node
    if (parentNodeId) {
      const newEdge: Edge = {
        id: `${parentNodeId}-${newNodeId}`,
        source: parentNodeId,
        target: newNodeId,
        sourceHandle: 'disks',
        targetHandle: 'input',
        type: 'smoothstep',
        animated: true,
        style: { stroke: '#10b981', strokeWidth: 2 },
        label: '挂载磁盘'
      }
      console.log(`🔗 Creating edge:`, newEdge)
      setEdges((eds) => {
        const newEdges = eds.concat(newEdge)
        console.log(`🔗 Total edges after adding: ${newEdges.length}`)
        return newEdges
      })
    } else {
      console.log(`⚠️ No parentNodeId provided for disk node ${newNodeId}`)
    }

    console.log(`✅ Successfully created disk node: ${newNode.data.name} (ID: ${diskData?.id})`)
  }, [nodeIdCounter])

  // Handle node rename
  const handleNodeRename = useCallback((nodeId: string, newName: string) => {
    setNodes((nds) =>
      nds.map((node) =>
        node.id === nodeId
          ? { ...node, data: { ...node.data, name: newName } }
          : node
      )
    )
    
    // 如果是应用节点，同步更新SPACES中的对应画布名称
    const node = nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    if (node && node.type === 'application') {
      const applicationId = (node.data as any).applicationId
      if (applicationId) {
        // 找到对应的stickyNote并更新名称
        const correspondingNote = stickyNotes.find(note => 
          note.metadata?.applicationId === applicationId
        )
        if (correspondingNote) {
          console.log('🔄 Syncing application rename to SPACES:', {
            applicationId,
            newName,
            noteId: correspondingNote.id
          })
          renameNote(correspondingNote.id, newName)
        }
      }
    }
    
    console.log('🔄 Renamed flow node:', { nodeId, newName })
    
    toast({
      title: "节点已重命名",
      description: `节点已重命名为 "${newName}"`,
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [toast, nodes, stickyNotes, renameNote])

  // Handle node delete
  const handleNodeDelete = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    console.log('🔄 Deleting flow node:', { nodeId })
    
    // 如果是应用节点，同步删除SPACES中的对应画布
    const node = nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    if (node && node.type === 'application') {
      const applicationId = (node.data as any).applicationId
      if (applicationId) {
        // 找到对应的stickyNote并删除
        const correspondingNote = stickyNotes.find(note => 
          note.metadata?.applicationId === applicationId
        )
        if (correspondingNote) {
          console.log('🔄 Syncing application delete to SPACES:', {
            applicationId,
            noteId: correspondingNote.id
          })
          deleteNote(correspondingNote.id)
        }
      }
    }
    
    setNodes((nds) => nds.filter((node) => node.id !== nodeId))
    setEdges((eds) => eds.filter((edge) => edge.source !== nodeId && edge.target !== nodeId))
    toast({
      title: "节点已删除",
      description: "节点及其连接已从画布中移除",
      status: "info",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [toast, nodes, stickyNotes])

  // Handle node pin toggle
  const handleNodeTogglePin = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    setNodes((nds) =>
      nds.map((node) =>
        node.id === nodeId
          ? { 
              ...node, 
              data: { ...node.data, isPinned: !(node.data as any).isPinned },
              draggable: (node.data as any).isPinned // Toggle draggable based on pin state
            }
          : node
      )
    )
  }, [])

  // Handle node expand - open disk properties panel
  const handleNodeExpand = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    console.log('🔍 Expanding node:', nodeId)
    console.log('🔍 Available nodes (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current.map(n => ({ id: n.id, type: n.type })))
    console.log('🔍 Nodes length (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current.length)
    console.log('🔍 Nodes details (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current)
    console.log('🔍 Looking for nodeId:', nodeId)
    
    // Find the node to check if it's a disk node using nodesRef.current
    const node = nodesRef.current.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    console.log('🔍 Found node:', node)
    console.log('🔍 Node type:', node?.type)
    console.log('🔍 Node data:', node?.data)
    
    if (node && node.type === 'disk') {
      const diskData = node.data as any
      console.log('💾 Opening disk properties panel for:', diskData)
      console.log('💾 Setting panel state:', {
        selectedDiskId: diskData.diskId,
        selectedDiskName: diskData.name,
        isDiskPanelOpen: true
      })
      
      setSelectedDiskId(diskData.diskId)
      setSelectedDiskName(diskData.name)
      setIsDiskPanelOpen(true)
      
      toast({
        title: "磁盘属性面板已打开",
        description: `正在显示 "${diskData.name}" 的详细信息`,
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    } else {
      console.warn('⚠️ Node not found or not a disk node:', { nodeId, node, nodeType: node?.type })
    }
  }, [toast])

  // Clear all nodes and edges
  const clearCanvas = useCallback(() => {
    if (window.confirm('确定要清空整个画布吗？此操作不可撤销。')) {
      setNodes([])
      setEdges([])
      toast({
        title: "画布已清空",
        description: "所有节点和连接已被移除",
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    }
  }, [toast])

  // Handle application drop from sidebar
  const handleApplicationDropInternal = useCallback(async (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    console.log('📱 Application dropped on flow workspace:', application, position)
    
    try {
      // 获取完整的application信息，包括children (disks)
      const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)
      console.log("🔍 Complete application data structure:", {
        applicationData: completeApp,
        hasChildren: !!completeApp?.children,
        childrenCount: completeApp?.children?.length || 0,
        children: completeApp?.children,
        childrenTypes: completeApp?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
          id: child.id,
          name: child.name,
          node_type: child.node_type,
          hasChildren: !!child.children,
          childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0
        })) || [],
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      
      // 检查是否有children
      if (!completeApp?.children || completeApp.children.length === 0) {
        console.log("⚠️ No children found for application:", completeApp.name)
        toast({
          title: "No Disks Found",
          description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no associated disks`,
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }
      
      // 过滤出disk类型的children
      const disks = completeApp.children.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === "disk")
      console.log("💾 Filtered disks:", {
        totalDisks: disks.length,
        disks: disks.map((disk: any) => ({
          id: disk.id,
          name: disk.name,
          node_type: disk.node_type
        }))
      })
      
      if (disks.length === 0) {
        console.log("⚠️ No disk children found for application:", completeApp.name)
        toast({
          title: "No Disks Found",
          description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no disk children`,
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }
      
      // Create application node with proper position
      addApplicationNode(completeApp, position)
      
      // Notify parent component
      onApplicationDrop?.(completeApp, position)
      
      toast({
        title: "应用已添加到流程图",
        description: `${completeApp.name} 及其关联磁盘已成功添加到画布`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("❌ Failed to handle application drop:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to add application to flow",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [addApplicationNode, onApplicationDrop, toast])

  // 使用传入的handleApplicationDrop函数
  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (handleApplicationDrop) {
      console.log("🔗 FlowWorkspace received handleApplicationDrop function")
    }
  }, [handleApplicationDrop])

  // 暴露handleApplicationDropInternal函数给父组件
  React.useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
    handleApplicationDrop: handleApplicationDropInternal
  }), [handleApplicationDropInternal])

  // Memoize the flow component for performance
  const flowComponent = useMemo(() => (
    <div
      style={{
        width: '100%',
        height: '100%',
        transition: 'all 0.2s ease'
      }}
    >
      <ReactFlow
        nodes={nodes}
        edges={edges}
        onNodesChange={onNodesChange}
        onEdgesChange={onEdgesChange}
        onConnect={onConnect}
        nodeTypes={nodeTypes}
        connectionMode={ConnectionMode.Loose}
        fitView
        fitViewOptions={{ padding: 0.2 }}
        defaultViewport={{ x: 0, y: 0, zoom: 0.8 }}
        minZoom={0.2}
        maxZoom={2}
        snapToGrid={true}
        snapGrid={[15, 15]}
        onPaneClick={() => {
          // 点击空白区域时关闭磁盘属性面板
          if (isDiskPanelOpen) {
            setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
            setSelectedDiskId(null)
            setSelectedDiskName('')
          }
        }}
      >
      <Background variant={BackgroundVariant.Dots} gap={20} size={1} />
      <Controls />
      
      {/* Control Panel */}
      <Panel position="top-left">
        <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
          <HStack spacing={2}>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
              colorScheme="blue"
              onClick={() => addApplicationNode()}
            >
              {t("workbench.addApplication")}
            </Button>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
              colorScheme="green"
              onClick={() => addDiskNode({})}
            >
              {t("workbench.addDisk")}
            </Button>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiTrash2 />}
              variant="outline"
              colorScheme="red"
              onClick={clearCanvas}
            >
              {t("workbench.clearWorkflow")}
            </Button>
          </HStack>
        </Box>
      </Panel>

      {/* Info Panel */}
      <Panel position="top-right">
        <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
          <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">
            {t("workbench.nodeStats", { nodes: nodes.length, connections: edges.length })}
          </Text>
        </Box>
      </Panel>
    </ReactFlow>
    </div>
  ), [nodes, edges, onNodesChange, onEdgesChange, onConnect, addApplicationNode, addDiskNode, clearCanvas])

  return (
    <Box w="full" h="full" position="relative">
      {flowComponent}
      
      {/* Disk Properties Panel */}
      <DiskPropertiesPanel
        diskId={selectedDiskId || 0}
        diskName={selectedDiskName}
        isOpen={isDiskPanelOpen}
        onClose={() => {
          setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
          setSelectedDiskId(null)
          setSelectedDiskName('')
        }}
      />
    </Box>
  )
})

FlowWorkspace.displayName = 'FlowWorkspace'

export default FlowWorkspace

```

```typescriptreact
import React, { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
import {
  ReactFlow,
  Node,
  Edge,
  addEdge,
  Connection,
  useNodesState,
  useEdgesState,
  Controls,
  Background,
  BackgroundVariant,
  NodeTypes,
  ConnectionMode,
  Panel,
} from '@xyflow/react'
import '@xyflow/react/dist/style.css'
import { Box, Button, HStack, Text, useToast } from '@chakra-ui/react'
import { FiPlus, FiTrash2 } from 'react-icons/fi'
import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
// import { useDrop } from 'react-dnd' // 已移动到WorkbenchContent，避免重复DnD配置
import ApplicationNode from './FlowNodes/ApplicationNode'
import DiskNode from './FlowNodes/DiskNode'
import DiskPropertiesPanel from './DiskPropertiesPanel'
import AppNodeService from '@/services/appNodeService'
import { useWorkbenchStore } from '@/stores/workbenchStore'

interface FlowWorkspaceProps {
  onApplicationDrop?: (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => void
  handleApplicationDrop?: (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => void
}

// Define node types
const nodeTypes: NodeTypes = {
  application: ApplicationNode,
  disk: DiskNode,
}

// Initial nodes and edges
const initialNodes: Node[] = []
const initialEdges: Edge[] = []

export const FlowWorkspace = React.forwardRef<any, FlowWorkspaceProps>(({
  onApplicationDrop,
  handleApplicationDrop
}, ref) => {
  const { t } = useTranslation()
  const [nodes, setNodes, onNodesChange] = useNodesState(initialNodes)
  const [edges, setEdges, onEdgesChange] = useEdgesState(initialEdges)
  const [nodeIdCounter, setNodeIdCounter] = useState(1)
  const toast = useToast()
  
  // 创建nodesRef来存储最新的nodes状态
  const nodesRef = React.useRef(nodes)
  
  // Disk properties panel state
  const [selectedDiskId, setSelectedDiskId] = useState<number | null>(null)
  const [selectedDiskName, setSelectedDiskName] = useState<string>('')
  const [isDiskPanelOpen, setIsDiskPanelOpen] = useState(false)
  
  // 添加调试日志来跟踪nodes状态
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodes count:', nodes.length)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodes:', nodes.map(n => ({ id: n.id, type: n.type })))
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodeIdCounter:', nodeIdCounter)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - selectedDiskId:', selectedDiskId)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - isDiskPanelOpen:', isDiskPanelOpen)
  
  // 获取workbench store的函数
  const { renameNote, deleteNote, stickyNotes } = useWorkbenchStore()

  // 更新nodesRef以保持最新的nodes状态
  React.useEffect(() => {
    nodesRef.current = nodes
    console.log('🔄 nodesRef updated:', nodes.length, 'nodes')
  }, [nodes])

  // 监听clearFlowWorkspace事件
  React.useEffect(() => {
    const handleClearFlowWorkspace = () => {
      console.log('📡 FlowWorkspace received clear event')
      setNodes([])
      setEdges([])
      setNodeIdCounter(1)
      console.log('✅ FlowWorkspace cleared via event')
    }

    window.addEventListener('clearFlowWorkspace', handleClearFlowWorkspace)
    
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('clearFlowWorkspace', handleClearFlowWorkspace)
    }
  }, [setNodes, setEdges])

  // Note: useDrop moved to WorkbenchContent to avoid duplicate DnD configuration

  // Handle new connections between nodes
  const onConnect = useCallback(
    (params: Connection) => {
      console.log('🔗 Creating connection:', params)
      setEdges((eds) => addEdge({
        ...params,
        type: 'smoothstep',
        animated: true,
        style: { stroke: '#3182ce', strokeWidth: 2 }
      }, eds))
    },
    [setEdges]
  )

  // Add a new application node with enhanced data handling
  const addApplicationNode = useCallback((applicationData?: any, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    const newNodeId = `app-${nodeIdCounter}`
    setNodeIdCounter(prev => prev + 1)

    // Use provided position or generate random position
    const nodePosition = position || { x: Math.random() * 300 + 100, y: Math.random() * 200 + 100 }

    const newNode: Node = {
      id: newNodeId,
      type: 'application',
      position: nodePosition,
      data: {
        id: newNodeId,
        applicationId: applicationData?.id, // 添加applicationId字段，用于关联SPACES中的stickyNote
        name: applicationData?.name || `Application ${nodeIdCounter}`,
        description: applicationData?.description || 'New application node',
        area: applicationData?.area,
        category: applicationData?.category,
        owner: applicationData?.owner,
        disks: applicationData?.children?.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === 'disk') || [],
        isPinned: false,
        onRename: handleNodeRename,
        onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
        onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
      },
    }

    setNodes((nds) => nds.concat(newNode))

    // Note: 不再在FlowWorkspace中创建stickyNote
    // SPACES区域应该只显示传统画布模式的画布，流程图模式的节点不需要在SPACES中显示
    console.log('🎯 Created flow application node:', {
      nodeId: newNodeId,
      applicationName: applicationData?.name,
      position: nodePosition
    })

    // Debug: Log the complete application data structure
    console.log('🔍 Complete application data structure:', {
      applicationData,
      hasChildren: !!applicationData?.children,
      childrenCount: applicationData?.children?.length || 0,
      children: applicationData?.children,
      childrenTypes: applicationData?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
        id: child.id,
        name: child.name,
        node_type: child.node_type,
        hasChildren: !!child.children,
        childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0
      })) || [],
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    })

    // Auto-create disk nodes if application has disks
    if (applicationData?.children && applicationData.children.length > 0) {
      const disks = applicationData.children.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === 'disk')
      console.log(`🔍 Found ${disks.length} disks for application ${applicationData.name}:`, disks)
      
      if (disks.length > 0) {
        disks.forEach((disk: any, index: number) => {
          console.log(`💾 Creating disk node ${index + 1}/${disks.length}:`, {
            diskId: disk.id,
            diskName: disk.name,
            diskType: disk.node_type,
            diskData: disk,
            applicationNodeId: newNodeId,
            index
          })
          
          // Position disk nodes to the right and below the application node
          const diskPosition = {
            x: nodePosition.x + 400 + (index % 2) * 200, // Stagger horizontally
            y: nodePosition.y + 150 + Math.floor(index / 2) * 200 // Stack vertically every 2 disks
          }
          console.log(`📍 Disk position calculated:`, diskPosition)
          addDiskNode(disk, newNodeId, index, diskPosition)
        })
      } else {
        console.log('⚠️ No disk nodes found in children array')
        console.log('🔍 All children types:', applicationData.children.map((child: any) => ({
          id: child.id,
          name: child.name,
          node_type: child.node_type
        })))
      }
    } else {
      console.log('⚠️ No children found in application data or children array is empty')
      console.log('🔍 Application data keys:', Object.keys(applicationData || {}))
    }

    const diskCount = applicationData?.children?.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === 'disk')?.length || 0
    toast({
      title: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreated"),
      description: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreatedDesc", {
        name: applicationData?.name || newNode.data.name,
        count: diskCount
      }),
      status: "success",
      duration: 3000,
    })

    return newNodeId
  }, [nodeIdCounter, toast, t])

  // Add a new disk node with enhanced data handling
  const addDiskNode = useCallback((diskData: any, parentNodeId?: string, index: number = 0, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    const newNodeId = `disk-${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`
    
    console.log(`💾 addDiskNode called with:`, {
      diskData,
      parentNodeId,
      index,
      position,
      newNodeId,
      nodeIdCounter
    })
    
    // Use provided position or generate default position
    const nodePosition = position || { 
      x: Math.random() * 300 + 400, 
      y: Math.random() * 200 + 200 + (index * 150)
    }
    
    const newNode: Node = {
      id: newNodeId,
      type: 'disk',
      position: nodePosition,
      data: {
        id: newNodeId,
        diskId: diskData?.id || Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000),
        name: diskData?.name || `Disk ${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`,
        description: diskData?.description || 'New disk node',
        applicationId: diskData?.applicationId || (parentNodeId ? parseInt(parentNodeId.replace('app-', '')) : undefined),
        isPinned: false,
        onRename: handleNodeRename,
        onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
        onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
        onExpand: handleNodeExpand,
      },
    }

    console.log(`💾 Creating disk node with data:`, {
      newNodeId,
      nodeType: 'disk',
      nodePosition,
      nodeData: newNode.data,
      diskId: diskData?.id,
      diskName: diskData?.name
    })
    
    setNodes((nds) => {
      const newNodes = nds.concat(newNode)
      console.log(`💾 Total nodes after adding disk: ${newNodes.length}`)
      return newNodes
    })

    // Auto-connect to parent application node
    if (parentNodeId) {
      const newEdge: Edge = {
        id: `${parentNodeId}-${newNodeId}`,
        source: parentNodeId,
        target: newNodeId,
        sourceHandle: 'disks',
        targetHandle: 'input',
        type: 'smoothstep',
        animated: true,
        style: { stroke: '#10b981', strokeWidth: 2 },
        label: '挂载磁盘'
      }
      console.log(`🔗 Creating edge:`, newEdge)
      setEdges((eds) => {
        const newEdges = eds.concat(newEdge)
        console.log(`🔗 Total edges after adding: ${newEdges.length}`)
        return newEdges
      })
    } else {
      console.log(`⚠️ No parentNodeId provided for disk node ${newNodeId}`)
    }

    console.log(`✅ Successfully created disk node: ${newNode.data.name} (ID: ${diskData?.id})`)
  }, [nodeIdCounter])

  // Handle node rename
  const handleNodeRename = useCallback((nodeId: string, newName: string) => {
    setNodes((nds) =>
      nds.map((node) =>
        node.id === nodeId
          ? { ...node, data: { ...node.data, name: newName } }
          : node
      )
    )
    
    // 如果是应用节点，同步更新SPACES中的对应画布名称
    const node = nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    if (node && node.type === 'application') {
      const applicationId = (node.data as any).applicationId
      if (applicationId) {
        // 找到对应的stickyNote并更新名称
        const correspondingNote = stickyNotes.find(note => 
          note.metadata?.applicationId === applicationId
        )
        if (correspondingNote) {
          console.log('🔄 Syncing application rename to SPACES:', {
            applicationId,
            newName,
            noteId: correspondingNote.id
          })
          renameNote(correspondingNote.id, newName)
        }
      }
    }
    
    console.log('🔄 Renamed flow node:', { nodeId, newName })
    
    toast({
      title: t("workbench.nodeRenamedTitle"),
      description: t("workbench.nodeRenamedDesc", { name: newName }),
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [toast, nodes, stickyNotes, renameNote, t])

  // Handle node delete
  const handleNodeDelete = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    console.log('🔄 Deleting flow node:', { nodeId })
    
    // 如果是应用节点，同步删除SPACES中的对应画布
    const node = nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    if (node && node.type === 'application') {
      const applicationId = (node.data as any).applicationId
      if (applicationId) {
        // 找到对应的stickyNote并删除
        const correspondingNote = stickyNotes.find(note => 
          note.metadata?.applicationId === applicationId
        )
        if (correspondingNote) {
          console.log('🔄 Syncing application delete to SPACES:', {
            applicationId,
            noteId: correspondingNote.id
          })
          deleteNote(correspondingNote.id)
        }
      }
    }
    
    setNodes((nds) => nds.filter((node) => node.id !== nodeId))
    setEdges((eds) => eds.filter((edge) => edge.source !== nodeId && edge.target !== nodeId))
    toast({
      title: "节点已删除",
      description: "节点及其连接已从画布中移除",
      status: "info",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [toast, nodes, stickyNotes])

  // Handle node pin toggle
  const handleNodeTogglePin = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    setNodes((nds) =>
      nds.map((node) =>
        node.id === nodeId
          ? { 
              ...node, 
              data: { ...node.data, isPinned: !(node.data as any).isPinned },
              draggable: (node.data as any).isPinned // Toggle draggable based on pin state
            }
          : node
      )
    )
  }, [])

  // Handle node expand - open disk properties panel
  const handleNodeExpand = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    console.log('🔍 Expanding node:', nodeId)
    console.log('🔍 Available nodes (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current.map(n => ({ id: n.id, type: n.type })))
    console.log('🔍 Nodes length (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current.length)
    console.log('🔍 Nodes details (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current)
    console.log('🔍 Looking for nodeId:', nodeId)
    
    // Find the node to check if it's a disk node using nodesRef.current
    const node = nodesRef.current.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    console.log('🔍 Found node:', node)
    console.log('🔍 Node type:', node?.type)
    console.log('🔍 Node data:', node?.data)
    
    if (node && node.type === 'disk') {
      const diskData = node.data as any
      console.log('💾 Opening disk properties panel for:', diskData)
      console.log('💾 Setting panel state:', {
        selectedDiskId: diskData.diskId,
        selectedDiskName: diskData.name,
        isDiskPanelOpen: true
      })
      
      setSelectedDiskId(diskData.diskId)
      setSelectedDiskName(diskData.name)
      setIsDiskPanelOpen(true)
      
      toast({
        title: "磁盘属性面板已打开",
        description: `正在显示 "${diskData.name}" 的详细信息`,
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    } else {
      console.warn('⚠️ Node not found or not a disk node:', { nodeId, node, nodeType: node?.type })
    }
  }, [toast])

  // Clear all nodes and edges
  const clearCanvas = useCallback(() => {
    if (window.confirm('确定要清空整个画布吗？此操作不可撤销。')) {
      setNodes([])
      setEdges([])
      toast({
        title: "画布已清空",
        description: "所有节点和连接已被移除",
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    }
  }, [toast])

  // Handle application drop from sidebar
  const handleApplicationDropInternal = useCallback(async (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    console.log('📱 Application dropped on flow workspace:', application, position)
    
    try {
      // 获取完整的application信息，包括children (disks)
      const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)
      console.log("🔍 Complete application data structure:", {
        applicationData: completeApp,
        hasChildren: !!completeApp?.children,
        childrenCount: completeApp?.children?.length || 0,
        children: completeApp?.children,
        childrenTypes: completeApp?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
          id: child.id,
          name: child.name,
          node_type: child.node_type,
          hasChildren: !!child.children,
          childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0
        })) || [],
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      
      // 检查是否有children
      if (!completeApp?.children || completeApp.children.length === 0) {
        console.log("⚠️ No children found for application:", completeApp.name)
        toast({
          title: "No Disks Found",
          description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no associated disks`,
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }
      
      // 过滤出disk类型的children
      const disks = completeApp.children.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === "disk")
      console.log("💾 Filtered disks:", {
        totalDisks: disks.length,
        disks: disks.map((disk: any) => ({
          id: disk.id,
          name: disk.name,
          node_type: disk.node_type
        }))
      })
      
      if (disks.length === 0) {
        console.log("⚠️ No disk children found for application:", completeApp.name)
        toast({
          title: "No Disks Found",
          description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no disk children`,
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }
      
      // Create application node with proper position
      addApplicationNode(completeApp, position)
      
      // Notify parent component
      onApplicationDrop?.(completeApp, position)
      
      toast({
        title: "应用已添加到流程图",
        description: `${completeApp.name} 及其关联磁盘已成功添加到画布`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("❌ Failed to handle application drop:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to add application to flow",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [addApplicationNode, onApplicationDrop, toast])

  // 使用传入的handleApplicationDrop函数
  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (handleApplicationDrop) {
      console.log("🔗 FlowWorkspace received handleApplicationDrop function")
    }
  }, [handleApplicationDrop])

  // 暴露handleApplicationDropInternal函数给父组件
  React.useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
    handleApplicationDrop: handleApplicationDropInternal
  }), [handleApplicationDropInternal])

  // Memoize the flow component for performance
  const flowComponent = useMemo(() => (
    <div
      style={{
        width: '100%',
        height: '100%',
        transition: 'all 0.2s ease'
      }}
    >
      <ReactFlow
        nodes={nodes}
        edges={edges}
        onNodesChange={onNodesChange}
        onEdgesChange={onEdgesChange}
        onConnect={onConnect}
        nodeTypes={nodeTypes}
        connectionMode={ConnectionMode.Loose}
        fitView
        fitViewOptions={{ padding: 0.2 }}
        defaultViewport={{ x: 0, y: 0, zoom: 0.8 }}
        minZoom={0.2}
        maxZoom={2}
        snapToGrid={true}
        snapGrid={[15, 15]}
        onPaneClick={() => {
          // 点击空白区域时关闭磁盘属性面板
          if (isDiskPanelOpen) {
            setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
            setSelectedDiskId(null)
            setSelectedDiskName('')
          }
        }}
      >
      <Background variant={BackgroundVariant.Dots} gap={20} size={1} />
      <Controls />
      
      {/* Control Panel */}
      <Panel position="top-left">
        <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
          <HStack spacing={2}>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
              colorScheme="blue"
              onClick={() => addApplicationNode()}
            >
              {t("workbench.addApplication")}
            </Button>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
              colorScheme="green"
              onClick={() => addDiskNode({})}
            >
              {t("workbench.addDisk")}
            </Button>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiTrash2 />}
              variant="outline"
              colorScheme="red"
              onClick={clearCanvas}
            >
              {t("workbench.clearWorkflow")}
            </Button>
          </HStack>
        </Box>
      </Panel>

      {/* Info Panel */}
      <Panel position="top-right">
        <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
          <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">
            {t("workbench.nodeStats", { nodes: nodes.length, connections: edges.length })}
          </Text>
        </Box>
      </Panel>
    </ReactFlow>
    </div>
  ), [nodes, edges, onNodesChange, onEdgesChange, onConnect, addApplicationNode, addDiskNode, clearCanvas])

  return (
    <Box w="full" h="full" position="relative">
      {flowComponent}
      
      {/* Disk Properties Panel */}
      <DiskPropertiesPanel
        diskId={selectedDiskId || 0}
        diskName={selectedDiskName}
        isOpen={isDiskPanelOpen}
        onClose={() => {
          setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
          setSelectedDiskId(null)
          setSelectedDiskName('')
        }}
      />
    </Box>
  )
})

FlowWorkspace.displayName = 'FlowWorkspace'

export default FlowWorkspace

```

```typescriptreact
import React, { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
import {
  ReactFlow,
  Node,
  Edge,
  addEdge,
  Connection,
  useNodesState,
  useEdgesState,
  Controls,
  Background,
  BackgroundVariant,
  NodeTypes,
  ConnectionMode,
  Panel,
} from '@xyflow/react'
import '@xyflow/react/dist/style.css'
import { Box, Button, HStack, Text, useToast } from '@chakra-ui/react'
import { FiPlus, FiTrash2 } from 'react-icons/fi'
import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
// import { useDrop } from 'react-dnd' // 已移动到WorkbenchContent，避免重复DnD配置
import ApplicationNode from './FlowNodes/ApplicationNode'
import DiskNode from './FlowNodes/DiskNode'
import DiskPropertiesPanel from './DiskPropertiesPanel'
import AppNodeService from '@/services/appNodeService'
import { useWorkbenchStore } from '@/stores/workbenchStore'

interface FlowWorkspaceProps {
  onApplicationDrop?: (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => void
  handleApplicationDrop?: (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => void
}

// Define node types
const nodeTypes: NodeTypes = {
  application: ApplicationNode,
  disk: DiskNode,
}

// Initial nodes and edges
const initialNodes: Node[] = []
const initialEdges: Edge[] = []

export const FlowWorkspace = React.forwardRef<any, FlowWorkspaceProps>(({
  onApplicationDrop,
  handleApplicationDrop
}, ref) => {
  const { t } = useTranslation()
  const [nodes, setNodes, onNodesChange] = useNodesState(initialNodes)
  const [edges, setEdges, onEdgesChange] = useEdgesState(initialEdges)
  const [nodeIdCounter, setNodeIdCounter] = useState(1)
  const toast = useToast()
  
  // 创建nodesRef来存储最新的nodes状态
  const nodesRef = React.useRef(nodes)
  
  // Disk properties panel state
  const [selectedDiskId, setSelectedDiskId] = useState<number | null>(null)
  const [selectedDiskName, setSelectedDiskName] = useState<string>('')
  const [isDiskPanelOpen, setIsDiskPanelOpen] = useState(false)
  
  // 添加调试日志来跟踪nodes状态
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodes count:', nodes.length)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodes:', nodes.map(n => ({ id: n.id, type: n.type })))
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodeIdCounter:', nodeIdCounter)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - selectedDiskId:', selectedDiskId)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - isDiskPanelOpen:', isDiskPanelOpen)
  
  // 获取workbench store的函数
  const { renameNote, deleteNote, stickyNotes } = useWorkbenchStore()

  // 更新nodesRef以保持最新的nodes状态
  React.useEffect(() => {
    nodesRef.current = nodes
    console.log('🔄 nodesRef updated:', nodes.length, 'nodes')
  }, [nodes])

  // 监听clearFlowWorkspace事件
  React.useEffect(() => {
    const handleClearFlowWorkspace = () => {
      console.log('📡 FlowWorkspace received clear event')
      setNodes([])
      setEdges([])
      setNodeIdCounter(1)
      console.log('✅ FlowWorkspace cleared via event')
    }

    window.addEventListener('clearFlowWorkspace', handleClearFlowWorkspace)
    
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('clearFlowWorkspace', handleClearFlowWorkspace)
    }
  }, [setNodes, setEdges])

  // Note: useDrop moved to WorkbenchContent to avoid duplicate DnD configuration

  // Handle new connections between nodes
  const onConnect = useCallback(
    (params: Connection) => {
      console.log('🔗 Creating connection:', params)
      setEdges((eds) => addEdge({
        ...params,
        type: 'smoothstep',
        animated: true,
        style: { stroke: '#3182ce', strokeWidth: 2 }
      }, eds))
    },
    [setEdges]
  )

  // Add a new application node with enhanced data handling
  const addApplicationNode = useCallback((applicationData?: any, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    const newNodeId = `app-${nodeIdCounter}`
    setNodeIdCounter(prev => prev + 1)

    // Use provided position or generate random position
    const nodePosition = position || { x: Math.random() * 300 + 100, y: Math.random() * 200 + 100 }

    const newNode: Node = {
      id: newNodeId,
      type: 'application',
      position: nodePosition,
      data: {
        id: newNodeId,
        applicationId: applicationData?.id, // 添加applicationId字段，用于关联SPACES中的stickyNote
        name: applicationData?.name || `Application ${nodeIdCounter}`,
        description: applicationData?.description || 'New application node',
        area: applicationData?.area,
        category: applicationData?.category,
        owner: applicationData?.owner,
        disks: applicationData?.children?.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === 'disk') || [],
        isPinned: false,
        onRename: handleNodeRename,
        onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
        onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
      },
    }

    setNodes((nds) => nds.concat(newNode))

    // Note: 不再在FlowWorkspace中创建stickyNote
    // SPACES区域应该只显示传统画布模式的画布，流程图模式的节点不需要在SPACES中显示
    console.log('🎯 Created flow application node:', {
      nodeId: newNodeId,
      applicationName: applicationData?.name,
      position: nodePosition
    })

    // Debug: Log the complete application data structure
    console.log('🔍 Complete application data structure:', {
      applicationData,
      hasChildren: !!applicationData?.children,
      childrenCount: applicationData?.children?.length || 0,
      children: applicationData?.children,
      childrenTypes: applicationData?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
        id: child.id,
        name: child.name,
        node_type: child.node_type,
        hasChildren: !!child.children,
        childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0
      })) || [],
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    })

    // Auto-create disk nodes if application has disks
    if (applicationData?.children && applicationData.children.length > 0) {
      const disks = applicationData.children.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === 'disk')
      console.log(`🔍 Found ${disks.length} disks for application ${applicationData.name}:`, disks)
      
      if (disks.length > 0) {
        disks.forEach((disk: any, index: number) => {
          console.log(`💾 Creating disk node ${index + 1}/${disks.length}:`, {
            diskId: disk.id,
            diskName: disk.name,
            diskType: disk.node_type,
            diskData: disk,
            applicationNodeId: newNodeId,
            index
          })
          
          // Position disk nodes to the right and below the application node
          const diskPosition = {
            x: nodePosition.x + 400 + (index % 2) * 200, // Stagger horizontally
            y: nodePosition.y + 150 + Math.floor(index / 2) * 200 // Stack vertically every 2 disks
          }
          console.log(`📍 Disk position calculated:`, diskPosition)
          addDiskNode(disk, newNodeId, index, diskPosition)
        })
      } else {
        console.log('⚠️ No disk nodes found in children array')
        console.log('🔍 All children types:', applicationData.children.map((child: any) => ({
          id: child.id,
          name: child.name,
          node_type: child.node_type
        })))
      }
    } else {
      console.log('⚠️ No children found in application data or children array is empty')
      console.log('🔍 Application data keys:', Object.keys(applicationData || {}))
    }

    const diskCount = applicationData?.children?.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === 'disk')?.length || 0
    toast({
      title: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreated"),
      description: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreatedDesc", {
        name: applicationData?.name || newNode.data.name,
        count: diskCount
      }),
      status: "success",
      duration: 3000,
    })

    return newNodeId
  }, [nodeIdCounter, toast, t])

  // Add a new disk node with enhanced data handling
  const addDiskNode = useCallback((diskData: any, parentNodeId?: string, index: number = 0, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    const newNodeId = `disk-${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`
    
    console.log(`💾 addDiskNode called with:`, {
      diskData,
      parentNodeId,
      index,
      position,
      newNodeId,
      nodeIdCounter
    })
    
    // Use provided position or generate default position
    const nodePosition = position || { 
      x: Math.random() * 300 + 400, 
      y: Math.random() * 200 + 200 + (index * 150)
    }
    
    const newNode: Node = {
      id: newNodeId,
      type: 'disk',
      position: nodePosition,
      data: {
        id: newNodeId,
        diskId: diskData?.id || Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000),
        name: diskData?.name || `Disk ${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`,
        description: diskData?.description || 'New disk node',
        applicationId: diskData?.applicationId || (parentNodeId ? parseInt(parentNodeId.replace('app-', '')) : undefined),
        isPinned: false,
        onRename: handleNodeRename,
        onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
        onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
        onExpand: handleNodeExpand,
      },
    }

    console.log(`💾 Creating disk node with data:`, {
      newNodeId,
      nodeType: 'disk',
      nodePosition,
      nodeData: newNode.data,
      diskId: diskData?.id,
      diskName: diskData?.name
    })
    
    setNodes((nds) => {
      const newNodes = nds.concat(newNode)
      console.log(`💾 Total nodes after adding disk: ${newNodes.length}`)
      return newNodes
    })

    // Auto-connect to parent application node
    if (parentNodeId) {
      const newEdge: Edge = {
        id: `${parentNodeId}-${newNodeId}`,
        source: parentNodeId,
        target: newNodeId,
        sourceHandle: 'disks',
        targetHandle: 'input',
        type: 'smoothstep',
        animated: true,
        style: { stroke: '#10b981', strokeWidth: 2 },
        label: '挂载磁盘'
      }
      console.log(`🔗 Creating edge:`, newEdge)
      setEdges((eds) => {
        const newEdges = eds.concat(newEdge)
        console.log(`🔗 Total edges after adding: ${newEdges.length}`)
        return newEdges
      })
    } else {
      console.log(`⚠️ No parentNodeId provided for disk node ${newNodeId}`)
    }

    console.log(`✅ Successfully created disk node: ${newNode.data.name} (ID: ${diskData?.id})`)
  }, [nodeIdCounter])

  // Handle node rename
  const handleNodeRename = useCallback((nodeId: string, newName: string) => {
    setNodes((nds) =>
      nds.map((node) =>
        node.id === nodeId
          ? { ...node, data: { ...node.data, name: newName } }
          : node
      )
    )
    
    // 如果是应用节点，同步更新SPACES中的对应画布名称
    const node = nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    if (node && node.type === 'application') {
      const applicationId = (node.data as any).applicationId
      if (applicationId) {
        // 找到对应的stickyNote并更新名称
        const correspondingNote = stickyNotes.find(note => 
          note.metadata?.applicationId === applicationId
        )
        if (correspondingNote) {
          console.log('🔄 Syncing application rename to SPACES:', {
            applicationId,
            newName,
            noteId: correspondingNote.id
          })
          renameNote(correspondingNote.id, newName)
        }
      }
    }
    
    console.log('🔄 Renamed flow node:', { nodeId, newName })
    
    toast({
      title: t("workbench.nodeRenamedTitle"),
      description: t("workbench.nodeRenamedDesc", { name: newName }),
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [toast, nodes, stickyNotes, renameNote, t])

  // Handle node delete
  const handleNodeDelete = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    console.log('🔄 Deleting flow node:', { nodeId })
    
    // 如果是应用节点，同步删除SPACES中的对应画布
    const node = nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    if (node && node.type === 'application') {
      const applicationId = (node.data as any).applicationId
      if (applicationId) {
        // 找到对应的stickyNote并删除
        const correspondingNote = stickyNotes.find(note => 
          note.metadata?.applicationId === applicationId
        )
        if (correspondingNote) {
          console.log('🔄 Syncing application delete to SPACES:', {
            applicationId,
            noteId: correspondingNote.id
          })
          deleteNote(correspondingNote.id)
        }
      }
    }
    
    setNodes((nds) => nds.filter((node) => node.id !== nodeId))
    setEdges((eds) => eds.filter((edge) => edge.source !== nodeId && edge.target !== nodeId))
    toast({
      title: t("workbench.nodeDeletedTitle"),
      description: t("workbench.nodeDeletedDesc"),
      status: "info",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [toast, nodes, stickyNotes, t])

  // Handle node pin toggle
  const handleNodeTogglePin = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    setNodes((nds) =>
      nds.map((node) =>
        node.id === nodeId
          ? { 
              ...node, 
              data: { ...node.data, isPinned: !(node.data as any).isPinned },
              draggable: (node.data as any).isPinned // Toggle draggable based on pin state
            }
          : node
      )
    )
  }, [])

  // Handle node expand - open disk properties panel
  const handleNodeExpand = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    console.log('🔍 Expanding node:', nodeId)
    console.log('🔍 Available nodes (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current.map(n => ({ id: n.id, type: n.type })))
    console.log('🔍 Nodes length (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current.length)
    console.log('🔍 Nodes details (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current)
    console.log('🔍 Looking for nodeId:', nodeId)
    
    // Find the node to check if it's a disk node using nodesRef.current
    const node = nodesRef.current.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    console.log('🔍 Found node:', node)
    console.log('🔍 Node type:', node?.type)
    console.log('🔍 Node data:', node?.data)
    
    if (node && node.type === 'disk') {
      const diskData = node.data as any
      console.log('💾 Opening disk properties panel for:', diskData)
      console.log('💾 Setting panel state:', {
        selectedDiskId: diskData.diskId,
        selectedDiskName: diskData.name,
        isDiskPanelOpen: true
      })
      
      setSelectedDiskId(diskData.diskId)
      setSelectedDiskName(diskData.name)
      setIsDiskPanelOpen(true)
      
      toast({
        title: "磁盘属性面板已打开",
        description: `正在显示 "${diskData.name}" 的详细信息`,
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    } else {
      console.warn('⚠️ Node not found or not a disk node:', { nodeId, node, nodeType: node?.type })
    }
  }, [toast])

  // Clear all nodes and edges
  const clearCanvas = useCallback(() => {
    if (window.confirm('确定要清空整个画布吗？此操作不可撤销。')) {
      setNodes([])
      setEdges([])
      toast({
        title: "画布已清空",
        description: "所有节点和连接已被移除",
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    }
  }, [toast])

  // Handle application drop from sidebar
  const handleApplicationDropInternal = useCallback(async (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    console.log('📱 Application dropped on flow workspace:', application, position)
    
    try {
      // 获取完整的application信息，包括children (disks)
      const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)
      console.log("🔍 Complete application data structure:", {
        applicationData: completeApp,
        hasChildren: !!completeApp?.children,
        childrenCount: completeApp?.children?.length || 0,
        children: completeApp?.children,
        childrenTypes: completeApp?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
          id: child.id,
          name: child.name,
          node_type: child.node_type,
          hasChildren: !!child.children,
          childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0
        })) || [],
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      
      // 检查是否有children
      if (!completeApp?.children || completeApp.children.length === 0) {
        console.log("⚠️ No children found for application:", completeApp.name)
        toast({
          title: "No Disks Found",
          description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no associated disks`,
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }
      
      // 过滤出disk类型的children
      const disks = completeApp.children.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === "disk")
      console.log("💾 Filtered disks:", {
        totalDisks: disks.length,
        disks: disks.map((disk: any) => ({
          id: disk.id,
          name: disk.name,
          node_type: disk.node_type
        }))
      })
      
      if (disks.length === 0) {
        console.log("⚠️ No disk children found for application:", completeApp.name)
        toast({
          title: "No Disks Found",
          description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no disk children`,
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }
      
      // Create application node with proper position
      addApplicationNode(completeApp, position)
      
      // Notify parent component
      onApplicationDrop?.(completeApp, position)
      
      toast({
        title: "应用已添加到流程图",
        description: `${completeApp.name} 及其关联磁盘已成功添加到画布`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("❌ Failed to handle application drop:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to add application to flow",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [addApplicationNode, onApplicationDrop, toast])

  // 使用传入的handleApplicationDrop函数
  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (handleApplicationDrop) {
      console.log("🔗 FlowWorkspace received handleApplicationDrop function")
    }
  }, [handleApplicationDrop])

  // 暴露handleApplicationDropInternal函数给父组件
  React.useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
    handleApplicationDrop: handleApplicationDropInternal
  }), [handleApplicationDropInternal])

  // Memoize the flow component for performance
  const flowComponent = useMemo(() => (
    <div
      style={{
        width: '100%',
        height: '100%',
        transition: 'all 0.2s ease'
      }}
    >
      <ReactFlow
        nodes={nodes}
        edges={edges}
        onNodesChange={onNodesChange}
        onEdgesChange={onEdgesChange}
        onConnect={onConnect}
        nodeTypes={nodeTypes}
        connectionMode={ConnectionMode.Loose}
        fitView
        fitViewOptions={{ padding: 0.2 }}
        defaultViewport={{ x: 0, y: 0, zoom: 0.8 }}
        minZoom={0.2}
        maxZoom={2}
        snapToGrid={true}
        snapGrid={[15, 15]}
        onPaneClick={() => {
          // 点击空白区域时关闭磁盘属性面板
          if (isDiskPanelOpen) {
            setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
            setSelectedDiskId(null)
            setSelectedDiskName('')
          }
        }}
      >
      <Background variant={BackgroundVariant.Dots} gap={20} size={1} />
      <Controls />
      
      {/* Control Panel */}
      <Panel position="top-left">
        <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
          <HStack spacing={2}>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
              colorScheme="blue"
              onClick={() => addApplicationNode()}
            >
              {t("workbench.addApplication")}
            </Button>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
              colorScheme="green"
              onClick={() => addDiskNode({})}
            >
              {t("workbench.addDisk")}
            </Button>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiTrash2 />}
              variant="outline"
              colorScheme="red"
              onClick={clearCanvas}
            >
              {t("workbench.clearWorkflow")}
            </Button>
          </HStack>
        </Box>
      </Panel>

      {/* Info Panel */}
      <Panel position="top-right">
        <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
          <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">
            {t("workbench.nodeStats", { nodes: nodes.length, connections: edges.length })}
          </Text>
        </Box>
      </Panel>
    </ReactFlow>
    </div>
  ), [nodes, edges, onNodesChange, onEdgesChange, onConnect, addApplicationNode, addDiskNode, clearCanvas])

  return (
    <Box w="full" h="full" position="relative">
      {flowComponent}
      
      {/* Disk Properties Panel */}
      <DiskPropertiesPanel
        diskId={selectedDiskId || 0}
        diskName={selectedDiskName}
        isOpen={isDiskPanelOpen}
        onClose={() => {
          setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
          setSelectedDiskId(null)
          setSelectedDiskName('')
        }}
      />
    </Box>
  )
})

FlowWorkspace.displayName = 'FlowWorkspace'

export default FlowWorkspace

```

```typescriptreact
import React, { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
import {
  ReactFlow,
  Node,
  Edge,
  addEdge,
  Connection,
  useNodesState,
  useEdgesState,
  Controls,
  Background,
  BackgroundVariant,
  NodeTypes,
  ConnectionMode,
  Panel,
} from '@xyflow/react'
import '@xyflow/react/dist/style.css'
import { Box, Button, HStack, Text, useToast } from '@chakra-ui/react'
import { FiPlus, FiTrash2 } from 'react-icons/fi'
import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
// import { useDrop } from 'react-dnd' // 已移动到WorkbenchContent，避免重复DnD配置
import ApplicationNode from './FlowNodes/ApplicationNode'
import DiskNode from './FlowNodes/DiskNode'
import DiskPropertiesPanel from './DiskPropertiesPanel'
import AppNodeService from '@/services/appNodeService'
import { useWorkbenchStore } from '@/stores/workbenchStore'

interface FlowWorkspaceProps {
  onApplicationDrop?: (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => void
  handleApplicationDrop?: (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => void
}

// Define node types
const nodeTypes: NodeTypes = {
  application: ApplicationNode,
  disk: DiskNode,
}

// Initial nodes and edges
const initialNodes: Node[] = []
const initialEdges: Edge[] = []

export const FlowWorkspace = React.forwardRef<any, FlowWorkspaceProps>(({
  onApplicationDrop,
  handleApplicationDrop
}, ref) => {
  const { t } = useTranslation()
  const [nodes, setNodes, onNodesChange] = useNodesState(initialNodes)
  const [edges, setEdges, onEdgesChange] = useEdgesState(initialEdges)
  const [nodeIdCounter, setNodeIdCounter] = useState(1)
  const toast = useToast()
  
  // 创建nodesRef来存储最新的nodes状态
  const nodesRef = React.useRef(nodes)
  
  // Disk properties panel state
  const [selectedDiskId, setSelectedDiskId] = useState<number | null>(null)
  const [selectedDiskName, setSelectedDiskName] = useState<string>('')
  const [isDiskPanelOpen, setIsDiskPanelOpen] = useState(false)
  
  // 添加调试日志来跟踪nodes状态
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodes count:', nodes.length)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodes:', nodes.map(n => ({ id: n.id, type: n.type })))
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodeIdCounter:', nodeIdCounter)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - selectedDiskId:', selectedDiskId)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - isDiskPanelOpen:', isDiskPanelOpen)
  
  // 获取workbench store的函数
  const { renameNote, deleteNote, stickyNotes } = useWorkbenchStore()

  // 更新nodesRef以保持最新的nodes状态
  React.useEffect(() => {
    nodesRef.current = nodes
    console.log('🔄 nodesRef updated:', nodes.length, 'nodes')
  }, [nodes])

  // 监听clearFlowWorkspace事件
  React.useEffect(() => {
    const handleClearFlowWorkspace = () => {
      console.log('📡 FlowWorkspace received clear event')
      setNodes([])
      setEdges([])
      setNodeIdCounter(1)
      console.log('✅ FlowWorkspace cleared via event')
    }

    window.addEventListener('clearFlowWorkspace', handleClearFlowWorkspace)
    
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('clearFlowWorkspace', handleClearFlowWorkspace)
    }
  }, [setNodes, setEdges])

  // Note: useDrop moved to WorkbenchContent to avoid duplicate DnD configuration

  // Handle new connections between nodes
  const onConnect = useCallback(
    (params: Connection) => {
      console.log('🔗 Creating connection:', params)
      setEdges((eds) => addEdge({
        ...params,
        type: 'smoothstep',
        animated: true,
        style: { stroke: '#3182ce', strokeWidth: 2 }
      }, eds))
    },
    [setEdges]
  )

  // Add a new application node with enhanced data handling
  const addApplicationNode = useCallback((applicationData?: any, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    const newNodeId = `app-${nodeIdCounter}`
    setNodeIdCounter(prev => prev + 1)

    // Use provided position or generate random position
    const nodePosition = position || { x: Math.random() * 300 + 100, y: Math.random() * 200 + 100 }

    const newNode: Node = {
      id: newNodeId,
      type: 'application',
      position: nodePosition,
      data: {
        id: newNodeId,
        applicationId: applicationData?.id, // 添加applicationId字段，用于关联SPACES中的stickyNote
        name: applicationData?.name || `Application ${nodeIdCounter}`,
        description: applicationData?.description || 'New application node',
        area: applicationData?.area,
        category: applicationData?.category,
        owner: applicationData?.owner,
        disks: applicationData?.children?.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === 'disk') || [],
        isPinned: false,
        onRename: handleNodeRename,
        onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
        onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
      },
    }

    setNodes((nds) => nds.concat(newNode))

    // Note: 不再在FlowWorkspace中创建stickyNote
    // SPACES区域应该只显示传统画布模式的画布，流程图模式的节点不需要在SPACES中显示
    console.log('🎯 Created flow application node:', {
      nodeId: newNodeId,
      applicationName: applicationData?.name,
      position: nodePosition
    })

    // Debug: Log the complete application data structure
    console.log('🔍 Complete application data structure:', {
      applicationData,
      hasChildren: !!applicationData?.children,
      childrenCount: applicationData?.children?.length || 0,
      children: applicationData?.children,
      childrenTypes: applicationData?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
        id: child.id,
        name: child.name,
        node_type: child.node_type,
        hasChildren: !!child.children,
        childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0
      })) || [],
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    })

    // Auto-create disk nodes if application has disks
    if (applicationData?.children && applicationData.children.length > 0) {
      const disks = applicationData.children.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === 'disk')
      console.log(`🔍 Found ${disks.length} disks for application ${applicationData.name}:`, disks)
      
      if (disks.length > 0) {
        disks.forEach((disk: any, index: number) => {
          console.log(`💾 Creating disk node ${index + 1}/${disks.length}:`, {
            diskId: disk.id,
            diskName: disk.name,
            diskType: disk.node_type,
            diskData: disk,
            applicationNodeId: newNodeId,
            index
          })
          
          // Position disk nodes to the right and below the application node
          const diskPosition = {
            x: nodePosition.x + 400 + (index % 2) * 200, // Stagger horizontally
            y: nodePosition.y + 150 + Math.floor(index / 2) * 200 // Stack vertically every 2 disks
          }
          console.log(`📍 Disk position calculated:`, diskPosition)
          addDiskNode(disk, newNodeId, index, diskPosition)
        })
      } else {
        console.log('⚠️ No disk nodes found in children array')
        console.log('🔍 All children types:', applicationData.children.map((child: any) => ({
          id: child.id,
          name: child.name,
          node_type: child.node_type
        })))
      }
    } else {
      console.log('⚠️ No children found in application data or children array is empty')
      console.log('🔍 Application data keys:', Object.keys(applicationData || {}))
    }

    const diskCount = applicationData?.children?.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === 'disk')?.length || 0
    toast({
      title: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreated"),
      description: t("workbench.applicationNodeCreatedDesc", {
        name: applicationData?.name || newNode.data.name,
        count: diskCount
      }),
      status: "success",
      duration: 3000,
    })

    return newNodeId
  }, [nodeIdCounter, toast, t])

  // Add a new disk node with enhanced data handling
  const addDiskNode = useCallback((diskData: any, parentNodeId?: string, index: number = 0, position?: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    const newNodeId = `disk-${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`
    
    console.log(`💾 addDiskNode called with:`, {
      diskData,
      parentNodeId,
      index,
      position,
      newNodeId,
      nodeIdCounter
    })
    
    // Use provided position or generate default position
    const nodePosition = position || { 
      x: Math.random() * 300 + 400, 
      y: Math.random() * 200 + 200 + (index * 150)
    }
    
    const newNode: Node = {
      id: newNodeId,
      type: 'disk',
      position: nodePosition,
      data: {
        id: newNodeId,
        diskId: diskData?.id || Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000),
        name: diskData?.name || `Disk ${nodeIdCounter + index + 1}`,
        description: diskData?.description || 'New disk node',
        applicationId: diskData?.applicationId || (parentNodeId ? parseInt(parentNodeId.replace('app-', '')) : undefined),
        isPinned: false,
        onRename: handleNodeRename,
        onDelete: handleNodeDelete,
        onTogglePin: handleNodeTogglePin,
        onExpand: handleNodeExpand,
      },
    }

    console.log(`💾 Creating disk node with data:`, {
      newNodeId,
      nodeType: 'disk',
      nodePosition,
      nodeData: newNode.data,
      diskId: diskData?.id,
      diskName: diskData?.name
    })
    
    setNodes((nds) => {
      const newNodes = nds.concat(newNode)
      console.log(`💾 Total nodes after adding disk: ${newNodes.length}`)
      return newNodes
    })

    // Auto-connect to parent application node
    if (parentNodeId) {
      const newEdge: Edge = {
        id: `${parentNodeId}-${newNodeId}`,
        source: parentNodeId,
        target: newNodeId,
        sourceHandle: 'disks',
        targetHandle: 'input',
        type: 'smoothstep',
        animated: true,
        style: { stroke: '#10b981', strokeWidth: 2 },
        label: '挂载磁盘'
      }
      console.log(`🔗 Creating edge:`, newEdge)
      setEdges((eds) => {
        const newEdges = eds.concat(newEdge)
        console.log(`🔗 Total edges after adding: ${newEdges.length}`)
        return newEdges
      })
    } else {
      console.log(`⚠️ No parentNodeId provided for disk node ${newNodeId}`)
    }

    console.log(`✅ Successfully created disk node: ${newNode.data.name} (ID: ${diskData?.id})`)
  }, [nodeIdCounter])

  // Handle node rename
  const handleNodeRename = useCallback((nodeId: string, newName: string) => {
    setNodes((nds) =>
      nds.map((node) =>
        node.id === nodeId
          ? { ...node, data: { ...node.data, name: newName } }
          : node
      )
    )
    
    // 如果是应用节点，同步更新SPACES中的对应画布名称
    const node = nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    if (node && node.type === 'application') {
      const applicationId = (node.data as any).applicationId
      if (applicationId) {
        // 找到对应的stickyNote并更新名称
        const correspondingNote = stickyNotes.find(note => 
          note.metadata?.applicationId === applicationId
        )
        if (correspondingNote) {
          console.log('🔄 Syncing application rename to SPACES:', {
            applicationId,
            newName,
            noteId: correspondingNote.id
          })
          renameNote(correspondingNote.id, newName)
        }
      }
    }
    
    console.log('🔄 Renamed flow node:', { nodeId, newName })
    
    toast({
      title: t("workbench.nodeRenamedTitle"),
      description: t("workbench.nodeRenamedDesc", { name: newName }),
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [toast, nodes, stickyNotes, renameNote, t])

  // Handle node delete
  const handleNodeDelete = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    console.log('🔄 Deleting flow node:', { nodeId })
    
    // 如果是应用节点，同步删除SPACES中的对应画布
    const node = nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    if (node && node.type === 'application') {
      const applicationId = (node.data as any).applicationId
      if (applicationId) {
        // 找到对应的stickyNote并删除
        const correspondingNote = stickyNotes.find(note => 
          note.metadata?.applicationId === applicationId
        )
        if (correspondingNote) {
          console.log('🔄 Syncing application delete to SPACES:', {
            applicationId,
            noteId: correspondingNote.id
          })
          deleteNote(correspondingNote.id)
        }
      }
    }
    
    setNodes((nds) => nds.filter((node) => node.id !== nodeId))
    setEdges((eds) => eds.filter((edge) => edge.source !== nodeId && edge.target !== nodeId))
    toast({
      title: t("workbench.nodeDeletedTitle"),
      description: t("workbench.nodeDeletedDesc"),
      status: "info",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [toast, nodes, stickyNotes, t])

  // Handle node pin toggle
  const handleNodeTogglePin = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    setNodes((nds) =>
      nds.map((node) =>
        node.id === nodeId
          ? { 
              ...node, 
              data: { ...node.data, isPinned: !(node.data as any).isPinned },
              draggable: (node.data as any).isPinned // Toggle draggable based on pin state
            }
          : node
      )
    )
  }, [])

  // Handle node expand - open disk properties panel
  const handleNodeExpand = useCallback((nodeId: string) => {
    console.log('🔍 Expanding node:', nodeId)
    console.log('🔍 Available nodes (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current.map(n => ({ id: n.id, type: n.type })))
    console.log('🔍 Nodes length (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current.length)
    console.log('🔍 Nodes details (from nodesRef):', nodesRef.current)
    console.log('🔍 Looking for nodeId:', nodeId)
    
    // Find the node to check if it's a disk node using nodesRef.current
    const node = nodesRef.current.find(n => n.id === nodeId)
    console.log('🔍 Found node:', node)
    console.log('🔍 Node type:', node?.type)
    console.log('🔍 Node data:', node?.data)
    
    if (node && node.type === 'disk') {
      const diskData = node.data as any
      console.log('💾 Opening disk properties panel for:', diskData)
      console.log('💾 Setting panel state:', {
        selectedDiskId: diskData.diskId,
        selectedDiskName: diskData.name,
        isDiskPanelOpen: true
      })
      
      setSelectedDiskId(diskData.diskId)
      setSelectedDiskName(diskData.name)
      setIsDiskPanelOpen(true)
      
      toast({
        title: t("workbench.diskPanelOpenedTitle"),
        description: t("workbench.diskPanelOpenedDesc", { name: diskData.name }),
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    } else {
      console.warn('⚠️ Node not found or not a disk node:', { nodeId, node, nodeType: node?.type })
    }
  }, [toast, t])

  // Clear all nodes and edges
  const clearCanvas = useCallback(() => {
    if (window.confirm('确定要清空整个画布吗？此操作不可撤销。')) {
      setNodes([])
      setEdges([])
      toast({
        title: "画布已清空",
        description: "所有节点和连接已被移除",
        status: "info",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    }
  }, [toast])

  // Handle application drop from sidebar
  const handleApplicationDropInternal = useCallback(async (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    console.log('📱 Application dropped on flow workspace:', application, position)
    
    try {
      // 获取完整的application信息，包括children (disks)
      const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)
      console.log("🔍 Complete application data structure:", {
        applicationData: completeApp,
        hasChildren: !!completeApp?.children,
        childrenCount: completeApp?.children?.length || 0,
        children: completeApp?.children,
        childrenTypes: completeApp?.children?.map((child: any) => ({
          id: child.id,
          name: child.name,
          node_type: child.node_type,
          hasChildren: !!child.children,
          childrenCount: child.children?.length || 0
        })) || [],
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      
      // 检查是否有children
      if (!completeApp?.children || completeApp.children.length === 0) {
        console.log("⚠️ No children found for application:", completeApp.name)
        toast({
          title: "No Disks Found",
          description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no associated disks`,
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }
      
      // 过滤出disk类型的children
      const disks = completeApp.children.filter((child: any) => child.node_type === "disk")
      console.log("💾 Filtered disks:", {
        totalDisks: disks.length,
        disks: disks.map((disk: any) => ({
          id: disk.id,
          name: disk.name,
          node_type: disk.node_type
        }))
      })
      
      if (disks.length === 0) {
        console.log("⚠️ No disk children found for application:", completeApp.name)
        toast({
          title: "No Disks Found",
          description: `Application "${completeApp.name}" has no disk children`,
          status: "warning",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }
      
      // Create application node with proper position
      addApplicationNode(completeApp, position)
      
      // Notify parent component
      onApplicationDrop?.(completeApp, position)
      
      toast({
        title: "应用已添加到流程图",
        description: `${completeApp.name} 及其关联磁盘已成功添加到画布`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("❌ Failed to handle application drop:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to add application to flow",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [addApplicationNode, onApplicationDrop, toast])

  // 使用传入的handleApplicationDrop函数
  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (handleApplicationDrop) {
      console.log("🔗 FlowWorkspace received handleApplicationDrop function")
    }
  }, [handleApplicationDrop])

  // 暴露handleApplicationDropInternal函数给父组件
  React.useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
    handleApplicationDrop: handleApplicationDropInternal
  }), [handleApplicationDropInternal])

  // Memoize the flow component for performance
  const flowComponent = useMemo(() => (
    <div
      style={{
        width: '100%',
        height: '100%',
        transition: 'all 0.2s ease'
      }}
    >
      <ReactFlow
        nodes={nodes}
        edges={edges}
        onNodesChange={onNodesChange}
        onEdgesChange={onEdgesChange}
        onConnect={onConnect}
        nodeTypes={nodeTypes}
        connectionMode={ConnectionMode.Loose}
        fitView
        fitViewOptions={{ padding: 0.2 }}
        defaultViewport={{ x: 0, y: 0, zoom: 0.8 }}
        minZoom={0.2}
        maxZoom={2}
        snapToGrid={true}
        snapGrid={[15, 15]}
        onPaneClick={() => {
          // 点击空白区域时关闭磁盘属性面板
          if (isDiskPanelOpen) {
            setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
            setSelectedDiskId(null)
            setSelectedDiskName('')
          }
        }}
      >
      <Background variant={BackgroundVariant.Dots} gap={20} size={1} />
      <Controls />
      
      {/* Control Panel */}
      <Panel position="top-left">
        <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
          <HStack spacing={2}>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
              colorScheme="blue"
              onClick={() => addApplicationNode()}
            >
              {t("workbench.addApplication")}
            </Button>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
              colorScheme="green"
              onClick={() => addDiskNode({})}
            >
              {t("workbench.addDisk")}
            </Button>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              leftIcon={<FiTrash2 />}
              variant="outline"
              colorScheme="red"
              onClick={clearCanvas}
            >
              {t("workbench.clearWorkflow")}
            </Button>
          </HStack>
        </Box>
      </Panel>

      {/* Info Panel */}
      <Panel position="top-right">
        <Box bg="white" p={2} borderRadius="md" shadow="md">
          <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">
            {t("workbench.nodeStats", { nodes: nodes.length, connections: edges.length })}
          </Text>
        </Box>
      </Panel>
    </ReactFlow>
    </div>
  ), [nodes, edges, onNodesChange, onEdgesChange, onConnect, addApplicationNode, addDiskNode, clearCanvas])

  return (
    <Box w="full" h="full" position="relative">
      {flowComponent}
      
      {/* Disk Properties Panel */}
      <DiskPropertiesPanel
        diskId={selectedDiskId || 0}
        diskName={selectedDiskName}
        isOpen={isDiskPanelOpen}
        onClose={() => {
          setIsDiskPanelOpen(false)
          setSelectedDiskId(null)
          setSelectedDiskName('')
        }}
      />
    </Box>
  )
})

FlowWorkspace.displayName = 'FlowWorkspace'

export default FlowWorkspace

```

```typescriptreact
import React, { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
import {
  ReactFlow,
  Node,
  Edge,
  addEdge,
  Connection,
  useNodesState,
  useEdgesState,
  Controls,
  Background,
  BackgroundVariant,
  NodeTypes,
  ConnectionMode,
  Panel,
} from '@xyflow/react'
import '@xyflow/react/dist/style.css'
import { Box, Button, HStack, Text, useToast } from '@chakra-ui/react'
import { FiPlus, FiTrash2 } from 'react-icons/fi'
import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
// import { useDrop } from 'react-dnd' // 已移动到WorkbenchContent，避免重复DnD配置
import ApplicationNode from './FlowNodes/ApplicationNode'
import DiskNode from './FlowNodes/DiskNode'
import DiskPropertiesPanel from './DiskPropertiesPanel'
import AppNodeService from '@/services/appNodeService'
import { useWorkbenchStore } from '@/stores/workbenchStore'

interface FlowWorkspaceProps {
  onApplicationDrop?: (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => void
  handleApplicationDrop?: (application: any, position: { x: number; y: number }) => void
}

// Define node types
const nodeTypes: NodeTypes = {
  application: ApplicationNode,
  disk: DiskNode,
}

// Initial nodes and edges
const initialNodes: Node[] = []
const initialEdges: Edge[] = []

export const FlowWorkspace = React.forwardRef<any, FlowWorkspaceProps>(({
  onApplicationDrop,
  handleApplicationDrop
}, ref) => {
  const { t } = useTranslation()
  const [nodes, setNodes, onNodesChange] = useNodesState(initialNodes)
  const [edges, setEdges, onEdgesChange] = useEdgesState(initialEdges)
  const [nodeIdCounter, setNodeIdCounter] = useState(1)
  const toast = useToast()
  
  // 创建nodesRef来存储最新的nodes状态
  const nodesRef = React.useRef(nodes)
  
  // Disk properties panel state
  const [selectedDiskId, setSelectedDiskId] = useState<number | null>(null)
  const [selectedDiskName, setSelectedDiskName] = useState<string>('')
  const [isDiskPanelOpen, setIsDiskPanelOpen] = useState(false)
  
  // 添加调试日志来跟踪nodes状态
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodes count:', nodes.length)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodes:', nodes.map(n => ({ id: n.id, type: n.type })))
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - nodeIdCounter:', nodeIdCounter)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - selectedDiskId:', selectedDiskId)
  console.log('🔄 FlowWorkspace render - isDiskPanelOpen:', isDiskPanelOpen)
  
  // 获取workbench store的函数
  const { renameNote, deleteNote, stickyNotes } = useWorkbenchStore()

  // 更新nodesRef以保持最新的nodes状态
  React.useEffect(() => {
    nodesRef.current = nodes
    console.log('🔄 nodesRef updated:', nodes.length, 'nodes')
  }, [nodes])

  // 监听clearFlowWorkspace事件
  React.useEffect(() => {
    const handleClearFlowWorkspace = () => {
      console.log('📡 FlowWorkspace received clear event')
      setNodes([])
      setEdges([])
      setNodeIdCounter(1)
      console.log('✅ FlowWorkspace cleared via event')
    }

    window.addEventListener('clearFlowWorkspace', handleClearFlowWorkspace)
    
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('clearFlowWorkspace', handleClearFlowWorkspace)
    }
  }, [setNodes, setEdges])
