```typescriptreact
      const rawContent = resolveRawContent(disk)
      const parsed = parseRichTextContent(rawContent)
      const doc =
        parsed.kind === "tiptap"
          ? parsed.payload.doc
          : markdownToTipTapDoc(parsed.markdown)
      setEditingSession({
        diskId: disk.id,
        initialDoc: doc,
        isSaving: false,
      })
    },
    [resolveRawContent]
  )

  const handleEditorCancel = useCallback(() => {
    closeEditorSession()
  }, [closeEditorSession])

  const handleEditorLiveChange = useCallback(
    (doc: JSONContent, isInitial: boolean) => {
      if (!editingSession.diskId || isInitial) {
        return
      }
      const serialized = serializeTipTapContent(doc)
      setCachedContentByDisk((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        const previous = next.get(editingSession.diskId!)
        if (previous === serialized) {
          return prev
        }
        next.set(editingSession.diskId!, serialized)
        return next
      })
      onTextEditChange?.({
        gridItemId: data.i,
        diskId: editingSession.diskId,
        markdown: serialized,
      })
    },
    [data.i, editingSession.diskId, onTextEditChange]
  )

  const handleEditorSave = useCallback(
    async (doc: JSONContent) => {
      if (!editingSession.diskId) {
        return
      }
      const serialized = serializeTipTapContent(doc)
      console.log("💾 [AIGridItem] handleEditorSave - START", {
        gridItemId: data.i,
        diskId: editingSession.diskId,
        source: data.source,
        persistToSpace: data.source === "space",
        serializedLength: serialized.length,
        serializedPreview: serialized.substring(0, 200),
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      })
      setEditingSession((prev) => ({ ...prev, isSaving: true }))
      setCachedContentByDisk((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        next.set(editingSession.diskId!, serialized)
        return next
      })
      onTextEditChange?.({
        gridItemId: data.i,
        diskId: editingSession.diskId,
        markdown: serialized,
      })
      try {
        await onTextEditCommit?.({
          gridItemId: data.i,
          diskId: editingSession.diskId,
          markdown: serialized,
          persistToSpace: data.source === "space",
        })
        console.log("💾 [AIGridItem] handleEditorSave - SUCCESS", {
          gridItemId: data.i,
          diskId: editingSession.diskId,
          persistToSpace: data.source === "space",
        })
        closeEditorSession()
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("💾 [AIGridItem] handleEditorSave - ERROR", {
          gridItemId: data.i,
          diskId: editingSession.diskId,
          error,
        })
        throw error
      } finally {
        setEditingSession((prev) => ({ ...prev, isSaving: false }))
      }
    },
    [closeEditorSession, data.i, data.source, editingSession.diskId, onTextEditChange, onTextEditCommit]
  )

  
  // Handle click to select (only in edit mode)
  const handleClick = (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    if (isEditMode && onSelect) {
      // Don't select if clicking on buttons or menu
      const target = e.target as HTMLElement
      if (!target.closest('button') && !target.closest('[role="menu"]')) {
        onSelect()
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Border style: selected state shows blue border, pinned state shows orange border
  const borderWidth = isSelected ? "2px" : (isPinned ? "3px" : "0px")
  const borderColorPinned = "orange.500"
  const borderColorSelected = "blue.500"
  const finalBorderColor = isSelected ? borderColorSelected : (isPinned ? borderColorPinned : "transparent")


  return (
    <Box
      ref={gridItemRef}
      w="100%"
      h="100%"
      bg={bgColor}
      borderWidth={borderWidth}
      borderStyle="solid"
      borderColor={finalBorderColor}
      borderRadius="0"
      pt={4}
      pl={4}
      pr={4}
      pb={2}
      overflowY="auto"
      overflowX="hidden"
      shadow={isSelected ? "lg" : "none"}
      sx={{
        paddingRight: scrollPaddingRight,
        marginRight: scrollMarginRight,
        scrollbarWidth: 'thin',
        scrollbarGutter: 'auto',
        scrollbarColor: `${gridScrollbarThumbLight} ${gridScrollbarTrackLight}`,
        '&::-webkit-scrollbar': {
          width: '8px',
        },
        '&::-webkit-scrollbar-track': {
          background: gridScrollbarTrackLight,
          borderRadius: '4px',
        },
        '&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb': {
          background: gridScrollbarThumbLight,
          borderRadius: '4px',
          transition: 'background 0.2s ease',
          '&:hover': {
            background: gridScrollbarThumbDark,
          },
        },
      }}
      position="relative"
      transition="border-width 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s"
      onClick={handleClick}
      cursor={isEditMode ? "pointer" : "default"}
      _hover={isEditMode ? { borderColor: isSelected ? "blue.500" : "gray.300", borderWidth: "1px" } : {}}
    >
      {editingSession.diskId !== null && isEditMode && editor && (
        <Box
          position="sticky"
          top={0}
          zIndex={1000}
          bg="white"
          mb={2}
          pb={2}
          borderBottom="1px solid"
          borderColor="gray.200"
        >
          <TipTapToolbar editor={editor} />
        </Box>
      )}
      {/* Selection corner indicators (blue squares) */}
      {isSelected && (
        <>
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            top="-4px"
            left="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            top="-4px"
            right="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            bottom="-4px"
            left="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            bottom="-4px"
            right="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
        </>
      )}

      {/* Draggable handle - only this area can be used to drag (disabled in edit mode) */}
      {!isEditMode && (
        <Box
          className="grid-drag-handle"
          position="absolute"
          top={0}
          left={0}
          right={0}
          bottom={0}
          cursor="grab"
          _active={{ cursor: "grabbing" }}
          zIndex={1}
        />
      )}
      {/* Top Right Buttons Container - Refresh button and Pin button in non-edit mode, three-dot menu in edit mode */}
      {/* Position adjusted to avoid overlap with scrollbar (scrollbar width ~8-17px); add extra 8px spacing */}
      <Box 
        position="absolute" 
        top={2} 
        right="28px"
        zIndex={1001}
        pointerEvents="auto"
      >
        {/* Three dots menu (only in edit mode) */}
        {isEditMode ? (
          (() => {
            console.log("🔵 AIGridItem rendering three-dot menu (edit mode):", {
              itemId: data.i,
              isEditMode,
              hasOnEdit: !!onEdit,
              hasOnDelete: !!onDelete,
            })
            return (
              <Menu
                onOpen={() => setIsMenuOpen(true)}
                onClose={() => setIsMenuOpen(false)}
              >
                <MenuButton
                  as={IconButton}
                  aria-label="More options"
                  icon={<FiMoreVertical />}
                  size="sm"
                  variant="ghost"
                  colorScheme="gray"
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    console.log("🔵 Three-dot menu button clicked")
                  }}
                  onMouseDown={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    if (e.nativeEvent) {
                      e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                    }
                  }}
                  _hover={{ bg: "gray.100" }}
                />
                <Portal containerRef={gridItemRef}>
                  <MenuList
                    onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                    overflow="visible"
                    maxH="unset"
                    onWheel={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                    onTouchMove={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                    sx={{ scrollbarWidth: 'none' }}
                    css={{
                      '&::-webkit-scrollbar': { display: 'none' },
                    }}
                  >
                    <MenuItem icon={editMenuIcon} onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      console.log("🔵 Edit menu item clicked")
                      onEdit?.()
                    }}>
                      {editMenuLabel}
                    </MenuItem>
                    <MenuItem icon={<FiType />} isDisabled={!canEditText} onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      handleEditText(primaryDisk)
                    }}>
                      编辑文本
                    </MenuItem>
                    <MenuItem icon={<FiPlay />} onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      onRun?.()
                    }}>
                      运行
                    </MenuItem>
                    <MenuItem icon={<FiTrash2 />} color="red.500" onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      onDelete?.()
                    }}>
                      Delete
                    </MenuItem>
                  </MenuList>
                </Portal>
              </Menu>
            )
          })()
        ) : (
          /* Refresh button and Pin/Unpin Button (only in non-edit mode) - arranged horizontally */
          <HStack spacing={1} align="center">
            {/* Refresh button for primary disk */}
            {primaryDisk && onRefreshDisk && (
              <Tooltip 
                label={primaryDisk.category === "dashboard" ? "刷新图表配置" : "刷新最新结果"} 
                placement="top"
              >
                <IconButton
                  aria-label={primaryDisk.category === "dashboard" ? "Refresh dashboard charts" : "Refresh disk result"}
                  icon={<FiRefreshCw />}
                  size="sm"
                  variant="ghost"
                  colorScheme="gray"
                  isLoading={refreshingDiskIds.has(primaryDisk.id)}
                  onClick={async (e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    if (!onRefreshDisk || refreshingDiskIds.has(primaryDisk.id)) return

                    setRefreshingDiskIds((prev) => new Set(prev).add(primaryDisk.id))
                    try {
                      await onRefreshDisk({ gridItemId: data.i, diskId: primaryDisk.id })
                    } catch (error) {
                      console.error("Failed to refresh disk:", error)
                    } finally {
                      setRefreshingDiskIds((prev) => {
                        const next = new Set(prev)
                        next.delete(primaryDisk.id)
                        return next
                      })
                    }
                  }}
                  onMouseDown={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    if (e.nativeEvent) {
                      e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                    }
                  }}
                  _hover={{ bg: "gray.100" }}
                  transition="all 0.2s"
                />
              </Tooltip>
            )}
            {/* Pin/Unpin Button */}
            {onTogglePin && (
              <Tooltip label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"} placement="top">
                <IconButton
                  aria-label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"}
                  icon={isPinned ? <FiLock /> : <FiUnlock />}
                  size="sm"
                  variant="ghost"
                  colorScheme={isPinned ? "orange" : "gray"}
                  onMouseDown={(e) => {
                    e.preventDefault()
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    if (e.nativeEvent) {
                      e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                    }
                    if (onTogglePin) {
                      onTogglePin(data.i)
                    }
                  }}
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.preventDefault()
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    if (e.nativeEvent) {
                      e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                    }
                    if (onTogglePin) {
                      onTogglePin(data.i)
                    }
                  }}
                  _hover={{
                    transform: "scale(1.05)",
                    bg: isPinned ? "orange.100" : "gray.100",
                  }}
                  transition="all 0.2s"
                  borderRadius="md"
                />
              </Tooltip>
            )}
          </HStack>
        )}
      </Box>
      <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} h="100%" position="relative" zIndex={2} minW="0" w="100%">
        {/* Disks Section */}
        <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} flex="1" overflow="visible">
          {data.disks.length > 0 ? (
            data.disks.map((disk) => {
              const rawContent = resolveRawContent(disk)
              const parsedContent = parseRichTextContent(rawContent)
              const isEditingThisDisk = editingSession.diskId === disk.id
              const tiptapHtml =
                !isEditingThisDisk && parsedContent.kind === "tiptap"
                  ? tiptapDocToSafeHtml(parsedContent.payload.doc)
                  : null
              const isRefreshing = refreshingDiskIds.has(disk.id)

              return (
                <Box key={disk.id} w="100%" minW="0" flexShrink={1}>
                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={2} w="100%" minW="0">
                  {/* Disk Header */}
                  <HStack spacing={2}>
                    <Badge colorScheme="blue" size="sm">
                      DISK
                    </Badge>
                    <Text {...titleTextStyle} fontWeight="semibold" color={textColor}>
                      {disk.name}
                    </Text>
                    {data.source === "space" && (
                      <Badge colorScheme="blue" variant="outline" fontSize="10px">
                        SPACE
                      </Badge>
                    )}
                  </HStack>

                  {/* Execution Result or Dashboard Charts */}
                  {disk.category === "dashboard" ? (
                    // Dashboard type disk: render charts from requirement
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="0"
                    >
                      {disk.dashboardError ? (
                        <Box
                          p={4}
                          bg="red.50"
                          borderRadius="md"
                          border="1px solid"
                          borderColor="red.200"
                        >
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.600" fontWeight="medium" mb={1}>
                            Dashboard Error
                          </Text>
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.500">
                            {disk.dashboardError}
                          </Text>
                        </Box>
                      ) : disk.dashboardMessage ? (
                        <Box
                          p={4}
                          bg="gray.50"
                          borderRadius="md"
                          border="1px solid"
                          borderColor="gray.200"
                        >
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.600">
                            {disk.dashboardMessage}
                          </Text>
                        </Box>
                      ) : disk.dashboardCharts && disk.dashboardCharts.length > 0 ? (
                        <Box
                          w="100%"
                          overflow="visible"
                        >
                          <HStack
                            spacing={4}
                            align="stretch"
                            flexWrap="wrap"
                          >
                            {disk.dashboardCharts.map((chart, index) => (
                              <Box
                                key={index}
                                flex="1 1 360px"
                                minW="260px"
                                maxW="100%"
                                p={3}
                                bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.900")}
                                borderRadius="0"
                              >
                                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4}>
                                  <Tooltip
                                    label={chart.question_title}
                                    placement="top"
                                    hasArrow
                                    bg="gray.700"
                                    color="white"
                                    fontSize="sm"
                                    maxW="400px"
                                    openDelay={300}
                                  >
                                    <Text
                                      {...titleTextStyle}
                                      fontWeight="semibold"
                                      color={textColor}
                                      mb={1}
                                      noOfLines={3}
                                      w="100%"
                                      whiteSpace="normal"
                                      wordBreak="break-word"
                                      lineHeight="1.5"
                                      cursor="help"
                                    >
                                      {chart.question_title}
                                    </Text>
                                  </Tooltip>
                                  <Box h="320px" w="100%">
                                    <SafeReactECharts
                                      option={adjustEChartsOptionForGrid(chart.echarts_option)}
                                      style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                      opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                      notMerge={true}
                                      lazyUpdate={true}
                                    />
                                  </Box>
                                </VStack>
                              </Box>
                            ))}
                          </HStack>
                        </Box>
                      ) : (
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No dashboard charts available
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : disk.latestResult ? (
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="0"
                    >
                      <HStack spacing={2} mb={2}>
                        <Badge
                          colorScheme={disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "green" : "yellow"}
                          size="sm"
                          fontSize="12px"
                          fontFamily="Arial, sans-serif"
                        >
                          {disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "Processed" : "Pending"}
                        </Badge>
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500">
                          {new Date(disk.latestResult.created_at).toLocaleString("en-US")}
                        </Text>
                      </HStack>

                      {/* Content Rendering */}
                      {isEditingThisDisk ? (
                        <TipTapEditor
                          key={`editor-${disk.id}`}
                          initialContent={editingSession.initialDoc}
                          onCancel={handleEditorCancel}
                          onSave={handleEditorSave}
                          isSaving={editingSession.isSaving}
                          editor={editor}
                        onContentChange={handleEditorLiveChange}
                        />
                      ) : parsedContent.kind === "tiptap" ? (
                        <Box
                          w="100%"
                          minW="0"
                          maxW="100%"
                          flexShrink={1}
                          position="relative"
                          overflowX="hidden"
                          overflowY="visible"
                          sx={{
                            "& table": {
                              width: "100%",
                              borderCollapse: "collapse",
                              border: "1px solid",
                              borderColor: tableBorderColor,
                              borderRadius: "md",
                              marginY: "1rem",
                              fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                            },
                            "& th, & td": {
                              border: "1px solid",
                              borderColor: tableBorderColor,
                              padding: "0.75rem",
                              textAlign: "left",
                              fontSize: "12px",
                              fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                            },
                            "& th": {
                              backgroundColor: tableHeaderBg,
                              color: tableHeaderTextColor,
                              fontWeight: "bold",
                              borderBottom: "2px solid",
                              borderBottomColor: tableHeaderBorderBottom,
                            },
                            "& tr:nth-of-type(even)": {
                              backgroundColor: tableRowEvenBg,
                            },
                          }}
                          dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: tiptapHtml ?? '' }}
                        />
                      ) : parsedContent.kind === "markdown" && parsedContent.markdown ? (
                        (() => {
                          const content = parsedContent.markdown
                          if (isEChartsConfig(content)) {
                            const echartsOption = extractEChartsOption(content)
                            if (echartsOption) {
                              return (
                                <Box w="100%" h="300px" minH="200px">
                                  <SafeReactECharts
                                    option={echartsOption}
                                    style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                    opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                    notMerge={true}
                                    lazyUpdate={true}
                                  />
                                </Box>
                              )
                            }
                          }
                          return (
                            <Box
                              w="100%"
                              minW="0"
                              maxW="100%"
                              flexShrink={1}
                              position="relative"
                              overflowX="hidden"
                              overflowY="visible"
                            >
                              <Box
                                w="100%"
                                minW="0"
                                maxW="100%"
                                overflowX="hidden"
                                overflowY="visible"
                                position="relative"
                                display="block"
                                sx={{
                                  "& h1, & h2, & h3, & h4, & h5, & h6": {
                                    fontWeight: "bold",
                                    marginTop: "1rem",
                                    marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                    fontSize: "14px",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& p": {
                                    marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                    lineHeight: "1.6",
                                    fontSize: "12px",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& ul, & ol": {
                                    marginLeft: "1.5rem",
                                    marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                    fontSize: "12px",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& li": {
                                    marginBottom: "0.25rem",
                                    fontSize: "12px",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& blockquote": {
                                    borderLeft: "4px solid",
                                    borderLeftColor: "gray.200",
                                    paddingLeft: "1rem",
                                    color: "gray.600",
                                    marginY: "1rem",
                                    fontStyle: "italic",
                                    fontSize: "12px",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& table": {
                                    width: "100%",
                                    marginY: "1rem",
                                    borderCollapse: "collapse",
                                    borderSpacing: 0,
                                    border: "1px solid",
                                    borderColor: tableBorderColor,
                                    borderRadius: "md",
                                    overflow: "hidden",
                                    tableLayout: "fixed",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& th, & td": {
                                    border: "1px solid",
                                    borderColor: tableBorderColor,
                                    padding: "0.75rem",
                                    textAlign: "left",
                                    whiteSpace: "normal",
                                    wordWrap: "break-word",
                                    overflowWrap: "break-word",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& th": {
                                    backgroundColor: tableHeaderBg,
                                    color: tableHeaderTextColor,
                                    fontWeight: "bold",
                                    borderBottom: "2px solid",
                                    borderBottomColor: tableHeaderBorderBottom,
                                    fontSize: "14px",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                    padding: "0.75rem 0.5rem",
                                    minHeight: "2.5rem",
                                    whiteSpace: "normal",
                                    wordWrap: "break-word",
                                    overflowWrap: "break-word",
                                  },
                                  "& td": {
                                    fontSize: "12px",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& thead": {
                                    display: "table-header-group",
                                  },
                                  "& tbody": {
                                    display: "table-row-group",
                                  },
                                  "& tr:nth-of-type(even)": {
                                    backgroundColor: tableRowEvenBg,
                                  },
                                }}
                              >
                                <ReactMarkdown remarkPlugins={[remarkGfm]} rehypePlugins={[rehypeRaw]}
                                  components={{
                                    table: ({ children, ...props }) => {
                                      const tableData = extractTableData(children)
                                      const transposedData = transposeTable(tableData)
                                      if (transposedData.length === 0) {
                                        return (
                                          <table
                                            {...props}
                                            style={{
                                              width: "100%",
                                              display: "table",
                                              boxSizing: "border-box",
                                            }}
                                          >
                                            {children}
                                          </table>
                                        )
                                      }
                                      const headerRow = transposedData[0] || []
                                      const dataRows = transposedData.slice(1)
                                      return (
                                        <table
                                          {...props}
                                          style={{
                                            width: "100%",
                                            display: "table",
                                            boxSizing: "border-box",
                                          }}
                                        >
                                          <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                              {headerRow.map((cell, index) => (
                                                <th key={index}>{cell}</th>
                                              ))}
                                            </tr>
                                          </thead>
                                          <tbody>
                                            {dataRows.map((row, rowIndex) => (
                                              <tr key={rowIndex}>
                                                {row.map((cell, cellIndex) => (
                                                  <td key={cellIndex}>{cell}</td>
                                                ))}
                                              </tr>
                                            ))}
                                          </tbody>
                                        </table>
                                      )
                                    },
                                  }}
                                >
                                  {content}
                                </ReactMarkdown>
                              </Box>
                            </Box>
                          )
                        })()
                      ) : (
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No execution result content
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : (
                    <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                      No execution results available
                    </Text>
                  )}
                </VStack>
              </Box>
              )
            })
          ) : (
            <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic" textAlign="center" py={4}>
              No disks attached to this application
            </Text>
          )}
        </VStack>
      </VStack>
    </Box>
  )
}

// Export with React.memo and custom comparison function
export const AIGridItem = React.memo(AIGridItemComponent, (prevProps, nextProps) => {
  const prevIsPinned = prevProps.data?.isPinned || false
  const nextIsPinned = nextProps.data?.isPinned || false
  const prevIsEditMode = prevProps.isEditMode || false
  const nextIsEditMode = nextProps.isEditMode || false
  const prevIsSelected = prevProps.isSelected || false
  const nextIsSelected = nextProps.isSelected || false
  // Always re-render if isPinned changes
  if (prevIsPinned !== nextIsPinned) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: isPinned changed, will re-render", {
      prevIsPinned,
      nextIsPinned,
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
    })
    return false // false = should re-render
  }
  
  // Always re-render if isEditMode changes (critical for three-dot menu visibility)
  if (prevIsEditMode !== nextIsEditMode) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: isEditMode changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevIsEditMode,
      nextIsEditMode,
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Always re-render if isSelected changes
  if (prevIsSelected !== nextIsSelected) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: isSelected changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevIsSelected,
      nextIsSelected,
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Re-render if data reference changes
  if (prevProps.data !== nextProps.data) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: data reference changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i,
      prevIsPinned: prevProps.data?.isPinned,
      nextIsPinned: nextProps.data?.isPinned
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Re-render if onTogglePin reference changes
  if (prevProps.onTogglePin !== nextProps.onTogglePin) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: onTogglePin reference changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Re-render if callback functions change
  if (prevProps.onSelect !== nextProps.onSelect ||
      prevProps.onEdit !== nextProps.onEdit ||
      prevProps.onDelete !== nextProps.onDelete ||
      prevProps.onRun !== nextProps.onRun) {
    console.log("🔄 React.memo: callback functions changed, will re-render", {
      itemId: prevProps.data.i
    })
    return false
  }
  
  // Skip re-render if nothing changed
  console.log("⏭️ React.memo: skipping re-render (no changes)", {
    itemId: prevProps.data.i,
    isPinned: prevIsPinned,
    isEditMode: prevIsEditMode,
    isSelected: prevIsSelected,
  })
  return true // true = skip re-render
})

AIGridItem.displayName = "AIGridItem"

```

```typescriptreact
import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react"
import { Box, VStack, HStack, Text, Badge, useColorModeValue, IconButton, Tooltip, Menu, MenuButton, MenuList, MenuItem, Portal } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { FiLock, FiUnlock, FiMoreVertical, FiEdit, FiTrash2, FiType, FiPlay, FiRefreshCw, FiEye } from "react-icons/fi"
import ReactMarkdown from "react-markdown"
import remarkGfm from "remark-gfm"
import rehypeRaw from "rehype-raw"
import type { EChartsOption } from "echarts"
import type { JSONContent } from "@tiptap/core"
import { GridItemData } from "./types"
import { SafeReactECharts } from "./SafeReactECharts"
import { TipTapEditor, TipTapToolbar } from "./tiptap/TipTapEditor"
import { useEditor } from "@tiptap/react"
import { buildEditorExtensions } from "./tiptap/extensions"
import {
  createEmptyTipTapDoc,
  markdownToTipTapDoc,
  parseRichTextContent,
  serializeTipTapContent,
  tiptapDocToSafeHtml,
} from "./utils/richTextFormatUtils"

interface AIGridItemProps {
  data: GridItemData
  onResize?: () => void // Reserved for future use
  onTogglePin?: (itemId: string) => void
  isEditMode?: boolean
  isSelected?: boolean
  onSelect?: () => void
  onEdit?: () => void
  onDelete?: () => void
  onRun?: () => void
  onTextEditChange?: (payload: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number; markdown: string }) => void
  onTextEditCommit?: (payload: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number; markdown: string; persistToSpace?: boolean }) => Promise<void> | void
  onRefreshDisk?: (payload: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number }) => Promise<void> | void
}

// 判断是否为有效的ECharts配置
function isEChartsConfig(content: string): boolean {
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    // 检查是否是有效的ECharts配置（包含常见的ECharts字段）
    return (
      typeof parsed === "object" &&
      parsed !== null &&
      (parsed.hasOwnProperty("series") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("xAxis") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("yAxis") ||
        parsed.hasOwnProperty("option") ||
        (parsed.hasOwnProperty("type") && parsed.type === "echarts"))
    )
  } catch {
    return false
  }
}

// 提取ECharts配置
function extractEChartsOption(content: string): EChartsOption | null {
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    // 如果包含option字段，提取它；否则直接使用解析的对象
    return parsed.option || parsed
  } catch {
    return null
  }
}

// 调整 ECharts 配置，为 title 和 legend 预留空间，避免重叠
function adjustEChartsOptionForGrid(option: any): any {
  if (!option || typeof option !== 'object') {
    return option
  }

  const adjusted = { ...option }
  
  // 确保 grid 配置存在
  if (!adjusted.grid) {
    adjusted.grid = {}
  } else {
    adjusted.grid = { ...adjusted.grid }
  }

  // 计算需要的顶部空间
  let topSpace = 20 // 基础顶部间距
  
  // 如果存在 title，增加顶部空间
  if (adjusted.title && typeof adjusted.title === 'object') {
    const title = adjusted.title
    // title 通常在顶部，需要预留空间
    if (title.show !== false) {
      topSpace += 40 // title 高度约 30-40px
    }
  }
  
  // 如果存在 legend 且在顶部，增加顶部空间
  if (adjusted.legend && typeof adjusted.legend === 'object') {
    const legend = adjusted.legend
    if (legend.show !== false) {
      // 判断 legend 位置：如果有 bottom 属性，说明在底部；否则在顶部
      const isLegendAtBottom = legend.bottom !== undefined && legend.bottom !== null
      const isLegendAtTop = !isLegendAtBottom
      
      if (isLegendAtTop) {
        // legend 在顶部，需要预留空间
        topSpace += 35 // legend 高度约 30-35px
      }
    }
  }

  // 设置 grid.top 为计算出的顶部空间
  adjusted.grid.top = topSpace

  // 计算底部空间需求
  let bottomSpace = 50 // 基础底部空间（为 X 轴标签预留）
  
  // 检查 X 轴标签是否旋转
  if (adjusted.xAxis) {
    const xAxis = Array.isArray(adjusted.xAxis) ? adjusted.xAxis[0] : adjusted.xAxis
    if (xAxis && typeof xAxis === 'object' && xAxis.axisLabel) {
      const axisLabel = xAxis.axisLabel
      // 如果标签旋转了（rotate 不为 0），需要更多底部空间
      if (axisLabel.rotate && axisLabel.rotate !== 0) {
        bottomSpace = 80 // 旋转的标签需要更多空间
      }
    }
  }
  
  // 如果存在 legend 且在底部，需要额外空间
  if (adjusted.legend && typeof adjusted.legend === 'object') {
    const legend = adjusted.legend
    if (legend.show !== false) {
      const isLegendAtBottom = legend.bottom !== undefined && legend.bottom !== null
      if (isLegendAtBottom) {
        // legend 在底部，需要额外空间（在 X 轴标签空间基础上增加）
        bottomSpace = Math.max(bottomSpace, 50) + 30 // 至少 50px，如果有旋转标签则保持 80px，再加 30px 给 legend
      }
    }
  }
  
  // 设置 grid.bottom
  adjusted.grid.bottom = bottomSpace

  // 设置左右边距，确保图表内容不贴边
  adjusted.grid.left = adjusted.grid.left || 50
  adjusted.grid.right = adjusted.grid.right || 30

  return adjusted
}

// 提取表格数据：从 React 元素树中提取所有单元格内容
function extractTableData(tableChildren: React.ReactNode): string[][] {
  const rows: string[][] = []
  
  const processElement = (element: any, depth: number = 0): void => {
    if (!element || typeof element !== 'object') {
      return
    }
    
    // 处理 React 元素
    if (element.type) {
      const type = element.type
      const typeName = typeof type === 'string' ? type.toLowerCase() : (typeof type === 'function' ? type.name || 'function' : String(type))
      
      // 如果是 tr（表格行），直接提取行数据
      if (typeName === 'tr') {
        const row: string[] = []
        const processCell = (cell: any): void => {
          if (cell && cell.props && cell.props.children !== undefined) {
            const cellContent = extractTextContent(cell.props.children)
            row.push(cellContent.trim())
          }
        }
        
        // 处理 children（td 或 th）
        if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
          const cellChildren = Array.isArray(element.props.children) 
            ? element.props.children 
            : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
          cellChildren.forEach(processCell)
        }
        
        if (row.length > 0) {
          rows.push(row)
        }
        return // 找到 tr 后不再递归，避免重复处理
      }
      
      // 如果是 thead 或 tbody，递归处理其子元素
      if (typeName === 'thead' || typeName === 'tbody') {
        if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
          const childElements = Array.isArray(element.props.children)
            ? element.props.children
            : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
          childElements.forEach((child: any) => processElement(child, depth + 1))
        }
        return
      }
      
      // 其他元素递归处理子元素
      if (element.props && element.props.children !== undefined) {
        const childElements = Array.isArray(element.props.children)
          ? element.props.children
          : element.props.children !== null ? [element.props.children] : []
        childElements.forEach((child: any) => processElement(child, depth + 1))
      }
    }
    
    // 处理数组
    if (Array.isArray(element)) {
      element.forEach(item => processElement(item, depth + 1))
    }
  }
  
  if (!tableChildren) {
    return rows
  }
  
  const childArray = Array.isArray(tableChildren) ? tableChildren : [tableChildren]
  childArray.forEach(child => processElement(child, 0))
  
  return rows
}

// 提取文本内容：从 React 节点中提取纯文本
function extractTextContent(node: React.ReactNode): string {
  if (typeof node === 'string' || typeof node === 'number') {
    return String(node)
  }
  
  if (Array.isArray(node)) {
    return node.map(extractTextContent).join('')
  }
  
  if (node && typeof node === 'object' && 'props' in node) {
    if (node.props && node.props.children) {
      return extractTextContent(node.props.children)
    }
  }
  
  return ''
}

// 转置表格数据：行变列，列变行
function transposeTable(data: string[][]): string[][] {
  if (data.length === 0) return []
  
  const maxCols = Math.max(...data.map(row => row.length))
  const transposed: string[][] = []
  
  for (let col = 0; col < maxCols; col++) {
    const newRow: string[] = []
    for (let row = 0; row < data.length; row++) {
      newRow.push(data[row][col] || '')
    }
    transposed.push(newRow)
  }
  
  return transposed
}

const AIGridItemComponent: React.FC<AIGridItemProps> = ({ 
  data, 
  onTogglePin,
  isEditMode = false,
  isSelected = false,
  onSelect,
  onEdit,
  onDelete,
  onRun,
  onTextEditChange,
  onTextEditCommit,
  onRefreshDisk,
}) => {
  // New style: white background, no border (or very subtle), no rounded corners
  const bgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const textColor = useColorModeValue("gray.800", "gray.200")
  const resultBgColor = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800")
  const tableBorderColor = useColorModeValue("gray.300", "gray.600")
  // Blue theme for table header
  const tableHeaderBg = useColorModeValue("blue.500", "blue.600")
  const tableHeaderTextColor = "white"
  const tableHeaderBorderBottom = useColorModeValue("blue.600", "blue.700")
  const tableRowEvenBg = useColorModeValue("#f9fafb", "#1a202c")
  
  // Font style constants - Arial 12px for non-title/non-header text
  const bodyTextStyle = {
    fontSize: "12px",
    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
  }
  
  // Font style constants - Arial 14px for all titles/headers
  const titleTextStyle = {
    fontSize: "14px",
    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
  }
  
  // Scrollbar colors for grid item (light by default, dark on hover)
  // Light mode: light gray track and thumb
  // Dark mode: darker gray track and thumb
  const gridScrollbarTrackLight = useColorModeValue("#f5f5f5", "#2d3748")
  const gridScrollbarThumbLight = useColorModeValue("rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)", "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)")
  const gridScrollbarThumbDark = useColorModeValue("rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)", "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)")
  
  const [isMenuOpen, setIsMenuOpen] = useState(false)
  const [refreshingDiskIds, setRefreshingDiskIds] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set())
  const primaryDisk = data.disks[0]
  const canEditText = !!primaryDisk
  const primaryDiskStatus = primaryDisk?.status
  const primaryDiskCategory = primaryDisk?.category
  const canEditDiskProperties = primaryDiskStatus === "draft" && primaryDiskCategory === "report"
  const editMenuLabel = canEditDiskProperties ? "编辑APP" : "浏览APP"
  const editMenuIcon = canEditDiskProperties ? <FiEdit /> : <FiEye />
  const [editingSession, setEditingSession] = useState<{
    diskId: number | null
    initialDoc: JSONContent
    isSaving: boolean
  }>({
    diskId: null,
    initialDoc: createEmptyTipTapDoc(),
    isSaving: false,
  })
  const [cachedContentByDisk, setCachedContentByDisk] = useState<Map<number, string>>(new Map())
  const editorExtensions = buildEditorExtensions({ placeholder: "Edit disk content..." })
  const editor = useEditor({
    extensions: editorExtensions,
    content: editingSession.initialDoc,
    autofocus: "end",
  })

  useEffect(() => {
    if (editor && editingSession.diskId) {
      editor.commands.setContent(editingSession.initialDoc)
    }
  }, [editor, editingSession.initialDoc, editingSession.diskId])
  const scrollPaddingRight = isMenuOpen ? "calc(var(--chakra-space-4) - 10px)" : "calc(var(--chakra-space-4) - 8px)"
  const scrollMarginRight = isMenuOpen ? "-6px" : "-6px"
  const gridItemRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isEditMode && isMenuOpen) {
      setIsMenuOpen(false)
    }
  }, [isEditMode, isMenuOpen])

  const isPinned = data.isPinned || false

  const closeEditorSession = useCallback(() => {
    setEditingSession({
      diskId: null,
      initialDoc: createEmptyTipTapDoc(),
      isSaving: false,
    })
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isEditMode && editingSession.diskId) {
      closeEditorSession()
    }
  }, [closeEditorSession, editingSession.diskId, isEditMode])

  const resolveRawContent = useCallback(
    (disk: GridItemData["disks"][number] | undefined) => {
      if (!disk) {
        return ""
      }
      return cachedContentByDisk.get(disk.id) ?? disk.latestResult?.conclusion_detail ?? ""
    },
    [cachedContentByDisk]
  )

  const handleEditText = useCallback(
    (disk: GridItemData["disks"][number] | undefined) => {
      if (!disk) return
      const rawContent = resolveRawContent(disk)
      const parsed = parseRichTextContent(rawContent)
      const doc =
        parsed.kind === "tiptap"
          ? parsed.payload.doc
          : markdownToTipTapDoc(parsed.markdown)
      setEditingSession({
        diskId: disk.id,
        initialDoc: doc,
        isSaving: false,
      })
    },
    [resolveRawContent]
  )

  const handleEditorCancel = useCallback(() => {
    closeEditorSession()
  }, [closeEditorSession])

  const handleEditorLiveChange = useCallback(
    (doc: JSONContent, isInitial: boolean) => {
      if (!editingSession.diskId || isInitial) {
        return
      }
      const serialized = serializeTipTapContent(doc)
      setCachedContentByDisk((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        const previous = next.get(editingSession.diskId!)
        if (previous === serialized) {
          return prev
        }
        next.set(editingSession.diskId!, serialized)
        return next
      })
      onTextEditChange?.({
        gridItemId: data.i,
        diskId: editingSession.diskId,
        markdown: serialized,
      })
    },
    [data.i, editingSession.diskId, onTextEditChange]
  )

  const handleEditorSave = useCallback(
    async (doc: JSONContent) => {
      if (!editingSession.diskId) {
        return
      }
      const serialized = serializeTipTapContent(doc)
      console.log("💾 [AIGridItem] handleEditorSave - START", {
        gridItemId: data.i,
        diskId: editingSession.diskId,
        source: data.source,
        persistToSpace: data.source === "space",
        serializedLength: serialized.length,
        serializedPreview: serialized.substring(0, 200),
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      })
      setEditingSession((prev) => ({ ...prev, isSaving: true }))
      setCachedContentByDisk((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        next.set(editingSession.diskId!, serialized)
        return next
      })
      onTextEditChange?.({
        gridItemId: data.i,
        diskId: editingSession.diskId,
        markdown: serialized,
      })
      try {
        await onTextEditCommit?.({
          gridItemId: data.i,
          diskId: editingSession.diskId,
          markdown: serialized,
          persistToSpace: data.source === "space",
        })
        console.log("💾 [AIGridItem] handleEditorSave - SUCCESS", {
          gridItemId: data.i,
          diskId: editingSession.diskId,
          persistToSpace: data.source === "space",
        })
        closeEditorSession()
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("💾 [AIGridItem] handleEditorSave - ERROR", {
          gridItemId: data.i,
          diskId: editingSession.diskId,
          error,
        })
        throw error
      } finally {
        setEditingSession((prev) => ({ ...prev, isSaving: false }))
      }
    },
    [closeEditorSession, data.i, data.source, editingSession.diskId, onTextEditChange, onTextEditCommit]
  )

  
  // Handle click to select (only in edit mode)
  const handleClick = (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    if (isEditMode && onSelect) {
      // Don't select if clicking on buttons or menu
      const target = e.target as HTMLElement
      if (!target.closest('button') && !target.closest('[role="menu"]')) {
        onSelect()
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Border style: selected state shows blue border, pinned state shows orange border
  const borderWidth = isSelected ? "2px" : (isPinned ? "3px" : "0px")
  const borderColorPinned = "orange.500"
  const borderColorSelected = "blue.500"
  const finalBorderColor = isSelected ? borderColorSelected : (isPinned ? borderColorPinned : "transparent")


  return (
    <Box
      ref={gridItemRef}
      w="100%"
      h="100%"
      bg={bgColor}
      borderWidth={borderWidth}
      borderStyle="solid"
      borderColor={finalBorderColor}
      borderRadius="0"
      pt={4}
      pl={4}
      pr={4}
      pb={2}
      overflowY="auto"
      overflowX="hidden"
      shadow={isSelected ? "lg" : "none"}
      sx={{
        paddingRight: scrollPaddingRight,
        marginRight: scrollMarginRight,
        scrollbarWidth: 'thin',
        scrollbarGutter: 'auto',
        scrollbarColor: `${gridScrollbarThumbLight} ${gridScrollbarTrackLight}`,
        '&::-webkit-scrollbar': {
          width: '8px',
        },
        '&::-webkit-scrollbar-track': {
          background: gridScrollbarTrackLight,
          borderRadius: '4px',
        },
        '&::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb': {
          background: gridScrollbarThumbLight,
          borderRadius: '4px',
          transition: 'background 0.2s ease',
          '&:hover': {
            background: gridScrollbarThumbDark,
          },
        },
      }}
      position="relative"
      transition="border-width 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s"
      onClick={handleClick}
      cursor={isEditMode ? "pointer" : "default"}
      _hover={isEditMode ? { borderColor: isSelected ? "blue.500" : "gray.300", borderWidth: "1px" } : {}}
    >
      {editingSession.diskId !== null && isEditMode && editor && (
        <Box
          position="sticky"
          top={0}
          zIndex={1000}
          bg="white"
          mb={2}
          pb={2}
          borderBottom="1px solid"
          borderColor="gray.200"
        >
          <TipTapToolbar editor={editor} />
        </Box>
      )}
      {/* Selection corner indicators (blue squares) */}
      {isSelected && (
        <>
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            top="-4px"
            left="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            top="-4px"
            right="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            bottom="-4px"
            left="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            bottom="-4px"
            right="-4px"
            w="8px"
            h="8px"
            bg="blue.500"
            zIndex={1002}
          />
        </>
      )}

      {/* Draggable handle - only this area can be used to drag (disabled in edit mode) */}
      {!isEditMode && (
        <Box
          className="grid-drag-handle"
          position="absolute"
          top={0}
          left={0}
          right={0}
          bottom={0}
          cursor="grab"
          _active={{ cursor: "grabbing" }}
          zIndex={1}
        />
      )}
      {/* Top Right Buttons Container - Refresh button and Pin button in non-edit mode, three-dot menu in edit mode */}
      {/* Position adjusted to avoid overlap with scrollbar (scrollbar width ~8-17px); add extra 8px spacing */}
      <Box 
        position="absolute" 
        top={2} 
        right="28px"
        zIndex={1001}
        pointerEvents="auto"
      >
        {/* Three dots menu (only in edit mode) */}
        {isEditMode ? (
          (() => {
            console.log("🔵 AIGridItem rendering three-dot menu (edit mode):", {
              itemId: data.i,
              isEditMode,
              hasOnEdit: !!onEdit,
              hasOnDelete: !!onDelete,
            })
            return (
              <Menu
                onOpen={() => setIsMenuOpen(true)}
                onClose={() => setIsMenuOpen(false)}
              >
                <MenuButton
                  as={IconButton}
                  aria-label="More options"
                  icon={<FiMoreVertical />}
                  size="sm"
                  variant="ghost"
                  colorScheme="gray"
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    console.log("🔵 Three-dot menu button clicked")
                  }}
                  onMouseDown={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    if (e.nativeEvent) {
                      e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                    }
                  }}
                  _hover={{ bg: "gray.100" }}
                />
                <Portal containerRef={gridItemRef}>
                  <MenuList
                    onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                    overflow="visible"
                    maxH="unset"
                    onWheel={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                    onTouchMove={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                    sx={{ scrollbarWidth: 'none' }}
                    css={{
                      '&::-webkit-scrollbar': { display: 'none' },
                    }}
                  >
                    <MenuItem icon={editMenuIcon} onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      console.log("🔵 Edit menu item clicked")
                      onEdit?.()
                    }}>
                      {editMenuLabel}
                    </MenuItem>
                    <MenuItem icon={<FiType />} isDisabled={!canEditText} onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      handleEditText(primaryDisk)
                    }}>
                      编辑文本
                    </MenuItem>
                    <MenuItem icon={<FiPlay />} onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      onRun?.()
                    }}>
                      运行
                    </MenuItem>
                    <MenuItem icon={<FiTrash2 />} color="red.500" onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      onDelete?.()
                    }}>
                      Delete
                    </MenuItem>
                  </MenuList>
                </Portal>
              </Menu>
            )
          })()
        ) : (
          /* Refresh button and Pin/Unpin Button (only in non-edit mode) - arranged horizontally */
          <HStack spacing={1} align="center">
            {/* Refresh button for primary disk */}
            {primaryDisk && onRefreshDisk && (
              <Tooltip 
                label={primaryDisk.category === "dashboard" ? "刷新图表配置" : "刷新最新结果"} 
                placement="top"
              >
                <IconButton
                  aria-label={primaryDisk.category === "dashboard" ? "Refresh dashboard charts" : "Refresh disk result"}
                  icon={<FiRefreshCw />}
                  size="sm"
                  variant="ghost"
                  colorScheme="gray"
                  isLoading={refreshingDiskIds.has(primaryDisk.id)}
                  onClick={async (e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    if (!onRefreshDisk || refreshingDiskIds.has(primaryDisk.id)) return

                    setRefreshingDiskIds((prev) => new Set(prev).add(primaryDisk.id))
                    try {
                      await onRefreshDisk({ gridItemId: data.i, diskId: primaryDisk.id })
                    } catch (error) {
                      console.error("Failed to refresh disk:", error)
                    } finally {
                      setRefreshingDiskIds((prev) => {
                        const next = new Set(prev)
                        next.delete(primaryDisk.id)
                        return next
                      })
                    }
                  }}
                  onMouseDown={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    if (e.nativeEvent) {
                      e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                    }
                  }}
                  _hover={{ bg: "gray.100" }}
                  transition="all 0.2s"
                />
              </Tooltip>
            )}
            {/* Pin/Unpin Button */}
            {onTogglePin && (
              <Tooltip label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"} placement="top">
                <IconButton
                  aria-label={isPinned ? "Unpin" : "Pin"}
                  icon={isPinned ? <FiLock /> : <FiUnlock />}
                  size="sm"
                  variant="ghost"
                  colorScheme={isPinned ? "orange" : "gray"}
                  onMouseDown={(e) => {
                    e.preventDefault()
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    if (e.nativeEvent) {
                      e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                    }
                    if (onTogglePin) {
                      onTogglePin(data.i)
                    }
                  }}
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.preventDefault()
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    if (e.nativeEvent) {
                      e.nativeEvent.stopImmediatePropagation()
                    }
                    if (onTogglePin) {
                      onTogglePin(data.i)
                    }
                  }}
                  _hover={{
                    transform: "scale(1.05)",
                    bg: isPinned ? "orange.100" : "gray.100",
                  }}
                  transition="all 0.2s"
                  borderRadius="md"
                />
              </Tooltip>
            )}
          </HStack>
        )}
      </Box>
      <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} h="100%" position="relative" zIndex={2} minW="0" w="100%">
        {/* Disks Section */}
        <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4} flex="1" overflow="visible">
          {data.disks.length > 0 ? (
            data.disks.map((disk) => {
              const rawContent = resolveRawContent(disk)
              const parsedContent = parseRichTextContent(rawContent)
              const isEditingThisDisk = editingSession.diskId === disk.id
              const tiptapHtml =
                !isEditingThisDisk && parsedContent.kind === "tiptap"
                  ? tiptapDocToSafeHtml(parsedContent.payload.doc)
                  : null
              return (
                <Box key={disk.id} w="100%" minW="0" flexShrink={1}>
                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={2} w="100%" minW="0">
                  {/* Disk Header */}
                  <HStack spacing={2}>
                    <Badge colorScheme="blue" size="sm">
                      DISK
                    </Badge>
                    <Text {...titleTextStyle} fontWeight="semibold" color={textColor}>
                      {disk.name}
                    </Text>
                    {data.source === "space" && (
                      <Badge colorScheme="blue" variant="outline" fontSize="10px">
                        SPACE
                      </Badge>
                    )}
                  </HStack>

                  {/* Execution Result or Dashboard Charts */}
                  {disk.category === "dashboard" ? (
                    // Dashboard type disk: render charts from requirement
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="0"
                    >
                      {disk.dashboardError ? (
                        <Box
                          p={4}
                          bg="red.50"
                          borderRadius="md"
                          border="1px solid"
                          borderColor="red.200"
                        >
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.600" fontWeight="medium" mb={1}>
                            Dashboard Error
                          </Text>
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="red.500">
                            {disk.dashboardError}
                          </Text>
                        </Box>
                      ) : disk.dashboardMessage ? (
                        <Box
                          p={4}
                          bg="gray.50"
                          borderRadius="md"
                          border="1px solid"
                          borderColor="gray.200"
                        >
                          <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.600">
                            {disk.dashboardMessage}
                          </Text>
                        </Box>
                      ) : disk.dashboardCharts && disk.dashboardCharts.length > 0 ? (
                        <Box
                          w="100%"
                          overflow="visible"
                        >
                          <HStack
                            spacing={4}
                            align="stretch"
                            flexWrap="wrap"
                          >
                            {disk.dashboardCharts.map((chart, index) => (
                              <Box
                                key={index}
                                flex="1 1 360px"
                                minW="260px"
                                maxW="100%"
                                p={3}
                                bg={useColorModeValue("white", "gray.900")}
                                borderRadius="0"
                              >
                                <VStack align="stretch" spacing={4}>
                                  <Tooltip
                                    label={chart.question_title}
                                    placement="top"
                                    hasArrow
                                    bg="gray.700"
                                    color="white"
                                    fontSize="sm"
                                    maxW="400px"
                                    openDelay={300}
                                  >
                                    <Text
                                      {...titleTextStyle}
                                      fontWeight="semibold"
                                      color={textColor}
                                      mb={1}
                                      noOfLines={3}
                                      w="100%"
                                      whiteSpace="normal"
                                      wordBreak="break-word"
                                      lineHeight="1.5"
                                      cursor="help"
                                    >
                                      {chart.question_title}
                                    </Text>
                                  </Tooltip>
                                  <Box h="320px" w="100%">
                                    <SafeReactECharts
                                      option={adjustEChartsOptionForGrid(chart.echarts_option)}
                                      style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                      opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                      notMerge={true}
                                      lazyUpdate={true}
                                    />
                                  </Box>
                                </VStack>
                              </Box>
                            ))}
                          </HStack>
                        </Box>
                      ) : (
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500" fontStyle="italic">
                          No dashboard charts available
                        </Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  ) : disk.latestResult ? (
                    <Box
                      w="100%"
                      minW="0"
                      flexShrink={1}
                      p={3}
                      bg={resultBgColor}
                      borderRadius="0"
                    >
                      <HStack spacing={2} mb={2}>
                        <Badge
                          colorScheme={disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "green" : "yellow"}
                          size="sm"
                          fontSize="12px"
                          fontFamily="Arial, sans-serif"
                        >
                          {disk.latestResult.is_processed ? "Processed" : "Pending"}
                        </Badge>
                        <Text {...bodyTextStyle} color="gray.500">
                          {new Date(disk.latestResult.created_at).toLocaleString("en-US")}
                        </Text>
                      </HStack>

                      {/* Content Rendering */}
                      {isEditingThisDisk ? (
                        <TipTapEditor
                          key={`editor-${disk.id}`}
                          initialContent={editingSession.initialDoc}
                          onCancel={handleEditorCancel}
                          onSave={handleEditorSave}
                          isSaving={editingSession.isSaving}
                          editor={editor}
                        onContentChange={handleEditorLiveChange}
                        />
                      ) : parsedContent.kind === "tiptap" ? (
                        <Box
                          w="100%"
                          minW="0"
                          maxW="100%"
                          flexShrink={1}
                          position="relative"
                          overflowX="hidden"
                          overflowY="visible"
                          sx={{
                            "& table": {
                              width: "100%",
                              borderCollapse: "collapse",
                              border: "1px solid",
                              borderColor: tableBorderColor,
                              borderRadius: "md",
                              marginY: "1rem",
                              fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                            },
                            "& th, & td": {
                              border: "1px solid",
                              borderColor: tableBorderColor,
                              padding: "0.75rem",
                              textAlign: "left",
                              fontSize: "12px",
                              fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                            },
                            "& th": {
                              backgroundColor: tableHeaderBg,
                              color: tableHeaderTextColor,
                              fontWeight: "bold",
                              borderBottom: "2px solid",
                              borderBottomColor: tableHeaderBorderBottom,
                            },
                            "& tr:nth-of-type(even)": {
                              backgroundColor: tableRowEvenBg,
                            },
                          }}
                          dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: tiptapHtml ?? '' }}
                        />
                      ) : parsedContent.kind === "markdown" && parsedContent.markdown ? (
                        (() => {
                          const content = parsedContent.markdown
                          if (isEChartsConfig(content)) {
                            const echartsOption = extractEChartsOption(content)
                            if (echartsOption) {
                              return (
                                <Box w="100%" h="300px" minH="200px">
                                  <SafeReactECharts
                                    option={echartsOption}
                                    style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
                                    opts={{ renderer: "svg" }}
                                    notMerge={true}
                                    lazyUpdate={true}
                                  />
                                </Box>
                              )
                            }
                          }
                          return (
                            <Box
                              w="100%"
                              minW="0"
                              maxW="100%"
                              flexShrink={1}
                              position="relative"
                              overflowX="hidden"
                              overflowY="visible"
                            >
                              <Box
                                w="100%"
                                minW="0"
                                maxW="100%"
                                overflowX="hidden"
                                overflowY="visible"
                                position="relative"
                                display="block"
                                sx={{
                                  "& h1, & h2, & h3, & h4, & h5, & h6": {
                                    fontWeight: "bold",
                                    marginTop: "1rem",
                                    marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                    fontSize: "14px",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& p": {
                                    marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                    lineHeight: "1.6",
                                    fontSize: "12px",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& ul, & ol": {
                                    marginLeft: "1.5rem",
                                    marginBottom: "0.5rem",
                                    fontSize: "12px",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& li": {
                                    marginBottom: "0.25rem",
                                    fontSize: "12px",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& blockquote": {
                                    borderLeft: "4px solid",
                                    borderLeftColor: "gray.200",
                                    paddingLeft: "1rem",
                                    color: "gray.600",
                                    marginY: "1rem",
                                    fontStyle: "italic",
                                    fontSize: "12px",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& table": {
                                    width: "100%",
                                    marginY: "1rem",
                                    borderCollapse: "collapse",
                                    borderSpacing: 0,
                                    border: "1px solid",
                                    borderColor: tableBorderColor,
                                    borderRadius: "md",
                                    overflow: "hidden",
                                    tableLayout: "fixed",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& th, & td": {
                                    border: "1px solid",
                                    borderColor: tableBorderColor,
                                    padding: "0.75rem",
                                    textAlign: "left",
                                    whiteSpace: "normal",
                                    wordWrap: "break-word",
                                    overflowWrap: "break-word",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& th": {
                                    backgroundColor: tableHeaderBg,
                                    color: tableHeaderTextColor,
                                    fontWeight: "bold",
                                    borderBottom: "2px solid",
                                    borderBottomColor: tableHeaderBorderBottom,
                                    fontSize: "14px",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                    padding: "0.75rem 0.5rem",
                                    minHeight: "2.5rem",
                                    whiteSpace: "normal",
                                    wordWrap: "break-word",
                                    overflowWrap: "break-word",
                                  },
                                  "& td": {
                                    fontSize: "12px",
                                    fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
                                  },
                                  "& thead": {
                                    display: "table-header-group",
                                  },
                                  "& tbody": {
                                    display: "table-row-group",
                                  },
                                  "& tr:nth-of-type(even)": {
                                    backgroundColor: tableRowEvenBg,
                                  },
                                }}
                              >
                                <ReactMarkdown remarkPlugins={[remarkGfm]} rehypePlugins={[rehypeRaw]}
                                  components={{
                                    table: ({ children, ...props }) => {
                                      const tableData = extractTableData(children)
                                      const transposedData = transposeTable(tableData)
                                      if (transposedData.length === 0) {
                                        return (
                                          <table
                                            {...props}
                                            style={{
                                              width: "100%",
                                              display: "table",
                                              boxSizing: "border-box",
                                            }}
                                          >
                                            {children}
                                          </table>
                                        )
                                      }
                                      const headerRow = transposedData[0] || []
                                      const dataRows = transposedData.slice(1)
                                      return (
                                        <table
                                          {...props}
                                          style={{
                                            width: "100%",
                                            display: "table",
                                            boxSizing: "border-box",
                                          }}
                                        >
                                          <thead>
                                            <tr>
                                              {headerRow.map((cell, index) => (
                                                <th key={index}>{cell}</th>
                                              ))}
                                            </tr>
                                          </thead>
                                          <tbody>
                                            {dataRows.map((row, rowIndex) => (
                                              <tr key={rowIndex}>
                                                {row.map((cell, cellIndex) => (
```
